light_analysis.motivation: 现有Mamba模型在显著目标检测中未能充分探索上下文信息和网络深度，导致特征提取有限。该研究旨在通过增强模型深度和整合多尺度感受野来改进性能，解决现有方法在长序列建模中缺乏深度和上下文的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出U$^2$Mamba，核心创新为多尺度Mamba U-blocks (MMUBs)增强局部特征提取，并构建嵌套U结构以融合浅层和深层的不同感受野，获取更丰富的上下文和长距离信息。采用层次化训练监督替代传统深度监督，在每一级计算损失。
light_analysis.result: 在多个显著目标检测基准上，U$^2$Mamba与最先进方法相比取得了极具竞争力的性能。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但实验结果表明该方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: U$^2$Mamba通过嵌套U结构和多尺度Mamba块有效提升了显著目标检测的上下文建模能力，层次化训练进一步优化学习。该工作为Mamba架构在视觉任务中的应用提供了新思路，代码开源促进后续研究。局限性可能在于计算复杂度。

title: Lagrange: An Open-Vocabulary, Energy-Based Sparse Framework for Generalized End-to-End Driving
abstract: Scaling end-to-end autonomous driving to complex, open-world environments requires perceptual models that generalize to anomalous scenarios and planners that produce kinematically valid trajectories. Existing paradigms face a distinct dichotomy between representational efficiency and generalization capacity. Dense models (e.g., occupancy networks), while geometrically robust, incur critical computational bottlenecks and struggle with high-level semantic reasoning. Conversely, sparse, query-based planners are efficient but reliant on closed-set definitions, rendering them vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) events. Although recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer open-vocabulary reasoning, their autoregressive, discrete token generation fundamentally conflicts with the continuous, high-frequency control requirements of vehicle dynamics. To address this, we propose Lagrange, an open-vocabulary, computationally sparse driving framework based on Masked Latent Fields (MLF). Rather than relying on dense volumetric reconstructions or closed-set query mechanisms, Lagrange exploits Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to encode class-agnostic object proposals into continuous semantic visual tokens. We introduce an intent-driven masked cross-attention module that temporally filters irrelevant entities, decoding the attended tokens into an implicit continuous energy field defined over spatial coordinates. By framing decision-making as a Lagrangian action minimization problem spanning this energy field, we enforce strict compliance with vehicle kinematics while executing collision avoidance. Extensive offline evaluations on both standard (nuScenes) and long-tail (CODA) benchmarks demonstrate that Lagrange establishes a promising framework for robust, interpretable, and kinematically feasible open-world autonomy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Lagrange框架，基于掩码潜在场和能量函数，实现开放词汇的稀疏端到端驾驶。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端驾驶中，密集模型（如占据网络）计算瓶颈大且缺乏语义推理；稀疏查询方法依赖闭集定义，对分布外事件脆弱；视觉-语言-动作模型生成离散token与车辆连续高频率控制需求冲突。因此需要一种既能高效表示又能泛化到开放世界的驾驶框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出Masked Latent Fields (MLF)，利用视觉语言模型(VLM)编码类别无关的物体提议为连续语义视觉token；设计意图驱动的掩码交叉注意力模块，时间上过滤无关实体，将注意力结果解码为在空间坐标上定义的隐式连续能量场。将决策制定为拉格朗日作用量最小化问题，在该能量场中保证车辆运动学约束并执行避撞。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准nuScenes和长尾基准CODA上进行离线评估，结果表明Lagrange建立了稳健、可解释且运动学可行的开放世界自主驾驶框架。摘要未明确说明具体性能数值，但声称在两类场景均有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了开放词汇、稀疏的驾驶框架Lagrange，结合能量场与拉格朗日优化，在保持计算高效的同时提升了对异常场景的泛化能力和运动学安全性。未来工作可能涉及实时部署验证，但摘要未提及。

title: Confidence-Aware Automated Assessment of Student-Drawn Scientific Models
abstract: Student-generated drawings are widely used in science education to assess learners' conceptual understanding in modeling-based tasks aligned with the Next Generation Science Standards (NGSS). However, scoring such drawings requires expert human judgment to interpret complex visual representations, making large-scale assessment costly to implement and sustain in classroom settings. In this work, we study automated scoring of student-generated scientific drawings using a vision-based model. We evaluate a Vision Transformer (ViT) with parameter-efficient adaptation and propose a confidence-aware scoring framework that derives response-level confidence from test-time predictive distributions. This confidence signal enables selective automation by scoring high-confidence responses automatically while deferring uncertain cases for human review. Experiments on six NGSS-aligned middle school assessment items show that the proposed approach improves scoring reliability while supporting a practical trade-off between automated coverage and scoring risk, highlighting the value of confidence-aware methods for trustworthy educational assessment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种置信度感知的自动评分框架，基于Vision Transformer对学生科学绘图进行评分，通过选择性自动化提高评分可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 学生绘制的科学模型图在NGSS标准中用于评估概念理解，但人工评分成本高且难以规模化。现有自动评分方法缺乏对评分不确定性的量化，无法在保证可靠性的前提下实现自动化。因此需要一种能够识别高置信度响应并自动评分、将不确定案例转交人工的置信度感知方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用Vision Transformer (ViT) 并应用参数高效适配方法，提出置信度感知评分框架。该框架从测试时的预测分布中导出响应级别的置信度分数，通过设置阈值实现选择性自动化：高置信度的响应自动评分，低置信度的响应交由人类专家评审。无需修改模型架构即可获得可解释的置信度估计。
light_analysis.result: 在六个NGSS对齐的中学科学评估项目上，该方法显著提高了评分可靠性，并实现了自动化覆盖与评分风险之间的灵活权衡。与基线模型相比，在保持高准确率的同时减少了人工评审工作量，展示了置信度感知机制在教育评估中的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 置信度感知的自动评分方法能够有效处理学生科学绘图的主观性和多样性，通过选择性自动化降低人工成本同时保证评估质量。该方法为大型教育测评提供了可信赖的解决方案，未来可扩展至其他模态的学生生成内容，并进一步优化置信度校准策略。

title: The Register Gap: A Meaning Intelligence Framework for Nigerian Public Discourse
abstract: We introduce the Meaning Intelligence Framework (MIF), a nine-dimension annotation and evaluation schema for Nigerian public discourse that separates surface sentiment from true communicative intent. Existing benchmarks for Nigerian languages, including NaijaSenti and AfriSenti, treat sentiment classification as a three-way polarity task (positive, negative, neutral). We argue that the dominant failure mode of AI systems on Nigerian discourse is not translation failure but context failure: the same utterance carries opposite pragmatic force depending on speaker, audience, and situation. The MIF operationalises this insight across nine scored dimensions: register, surface sentiment, true intent, irony, coded subtext, risk tier, annotator confidence, speaker emotion, and recommended communications action. We construct a 30-item calibration dataset spanning Standard English, Nigerian English, Nigerian Pidgin, and code-mixed registers, and evaluate a frontier language model (Gemini 2.5 Flash) under zero-shot and schema-informed prompting conditions. The headline finding is the Register Gap: zero-shot register classification accuracy is 33.3%, rising to 73.3% (+40 points) when the model receives the MIF schema in-context. The composite Meaning Intelligence Score increases by 5.4 points (73.2 to 78.6) under schema-informed prompting, with the largest practical gains in register identification, coded-subtext detection (+10 points), and strategic action recommendation (+10.3 points). We release the framework specification, annotation guidelines, and the 30-item public calibration set to support reproducibility, while retaining a private holdout corpus for contamination-protected evaluation.
comment: Preprint. 12 pages, 2 tables. Supplementary materials: MIF Master Specification v2.0, Annotation Guidelines v1.0, and 30-item public calibration set with gold labels available from the author

light_analysis.overview: 提出意义智能框架(MIF)，通过九维度标注克服尼日利亚话语中上下文失效问题，显著提升语域分类和意图识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有尼日利亚情感基准（如NaijaSenti、AfriSenti）仅做三向极性分类，忽视语境依赖性。相同表述因说话者、受众和场景不同可能具有相反语用功能，导致AI系统上下文失效。该研究旨在弥补这一缺陷，通过细粒度维度分离表面情感与真实意图。
light_analysis.method: 构建九维度意义智能框架(MIF)，涵盖语域、表面情感、真实意图、讽刺、编码潜台词、风险等级、标注者信心、说话者情绪和推荐行动。创建30项校准数据集，涵盖标准英语、尼日利亚英语、皮钦语及代码混合语域。在Gemini 2.5 Flash模型上比较零样本与模式知情提示（MIF schema）的效果。
light_analysis.result: 零样本语域分类准确率33.3%，引入MIF模式后升至73.3%（+40点）。复合意义智能评分从73.2升至78.6（+5.4点）。最大提升出现在语域识别（+40点）、编码潜台词检测（+10点）和战略行动推荐（+10.3点）。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIF框架有效解决尼日利亚话语的上下文失效问题，显著提升AI对复杂交际意图的理解。发布框架规范、标注指南和校准集以促进可重复性，同时保留私有语料库用于防污染评估。未来可扩展至更多语言和场景。

title: Single-Stage Hierarchical Rectification for Weakly Supervised Histopathology Segmentation
abstract: Existing weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) methods in computational pathology rely on a multi-stage paradigm: class activation map (CAM) generation, offline pseudo-mask refinement, and fully supervised retraining. While established, this decoupled approach presents fundamental limitations. The multi-stage process not only incurs high computational training costs but also suffers from error propagation: local texture biases in shallow CNN layers generate false-positive artifacts that subsequent refinement steps often fail to correct. To address these persistent challenges through a simple yet highly effective approach, we propose the Single-Stage Hierarchical Rectification (SSHR) framework. Rather than passively refining CAMs post-hoc, our method proactively purifies intermediate feature representations during the forward pass. We introduce a Hierarchical Feature Rectification Module (HFRM) that utilizes deep global semantic context to filter out local anomalies in shallow layers. This mechanism generates high-fidelity activation maps directly within a single training loop. Experiments on the LUAD-HistoSeg and BCSS datasets demonstrate that SSHR outperforms state-of-the-art multi-stage methods. Furthermore, SSHR reduces training duration by 2 to 5 times. This efficiency minimizes computational overhead and accelerates clinical translation for large-scale histopathology workflows. The code is available at: https://github.com/trongduc-nguyen/SSHR
comment: Accepted to MICCAI 2026. This is the pre-review submitted version, not the camera-ready version. The final authenticated version will be available in the MICCAI 2026 proceedings

light_analysis.overview: 提出单阶段层级纠正框架(SSHR)，通过前向传播中净化中间特征表示，实现弱监督组织病理分割，避免多阶段范式的高成本和误差传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有弱监督语义分割方法在计算病理学中采用多阶段范式（CAM生成、离线伪掩码细化、全监督重训练），存在训练成本高和误差传播的固有限制：浅层CNN的局部纹理偏差产生假阳性伪影，后续细化步骤难以纠正。需要一个简单高效的方法来同时解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出单阶段层级纠正(SSHR)框架，核心是层级特征纠正模块(HFRM)。该模块利用深层全局语义上下文过滤浅层中的局部异常，在前向传播过程中主动净化中间特征表示，直接生成高保真激活图，无需离线细化。单训练循环内完成全过程。
light_analysis.result: 在LUAD-HistoSeg和BCSS数据集上，SSHR超越了最先进的多阶段方法。同时，训练时长减少2至5倍，显著降低计算开销，加速大规模组织病理工作流程的临床转化。摘要未提及具体性能数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: SSHR通过单阶段前向净化机制有效解决了多阶段弱监督分割的误差传播和高成本问题，具有较高的学术价值和临床转化潜力。未来可进一步探索其在其他组织病理任务中的应用，代码已开源。

title: Navigating Unreliable Parametric and Contextual Knowledge: Explicit Knowledge Conflict Resolution for LLM Inference
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across a wide range of language-based tasks by leveraging both extensive parametric knowledge and in-context learning ability, enabling them to incorporate external information provided in the input prompt. However, the integration of external knowledge can introduce conflicts, not only between the model's internal parametric knowledge and the external information, but also among multiple pieces of external contexts. Existing approaches typically assume that either the model or the provided context is reliable, overlooking the possibility that both sources may contain errors, and avoid conflicts by privileging one source over the other, rather than actively resolving inconsistencies. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework MACR for LLM knowledge conflict resolution that moves beyond the conventional binary choice paradigm and incorporates an explicit conflict-resolution mechanism based on a multi-agent reasoning approach. Specifically, we first propose an adaptive knowledge assessment and retrieval approach that employs a modified semantic entropy measure to quantify an LLM's confidence in its answer to a given query. Based on this confidence estimation, MACR either externalizes the model's internal knowledge as textual representations or retrieves relevant external knowledge when internal knowledge is insufficient, generating basic contexts for subsequent reasoning. Then we introduce an inductive multi-agent reasoning framework with three specialized agents that, respectively, induce explicit rules, analyze potential conflicts, and resolve inconsistencies across all available contexts. Empirical results demonstrate that MACR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across benchmarks, while also providing interpretable resolutions of explicit conflicts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MACR框架，通过多智能体推理显式解决LLM中参数知识与上下文知识之间的冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM结合参数知识和上下文学习时，外部知识引入会导致参数知识与外部信息以及多个外部上下文之间的冲突。现有方法通常假定某一来源可靠，优先选择其一而忽视另一方，未能主动解决不一致。该研究旨在超越二元选择，显式处理不可靠的双重知识源冲突。
light_analysis.method: 提出MACR框架，包含自适应知识评估与检索模块，利用改进的语义熵度量LLM对查询的置信度，根据置信度外化内部知识或检索外部知识生成基础上下文。随后引入归纳多智能体推理框架，包含三个专门智能体分别诱导显式规则、分析潜在冲突并解决所有上下文中的不一致。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上显著优于最先进基线，同时提供可解释的显式冲突解决方案。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种显式解决LLM知识冲突的框架，通过多智能体推理提升性能并增强可解释性。该工作为处理知识不一致提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的冲突类型和实际应用。

title: SPOT-E: Test-Time Entropy Shaping with Visual Spotlights for Frozen VLMs
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) often underperform on evidence intensive tasks because decisive visual evidence are small, localized, and easy to overlook, leading to failures in evidence readout even when high-level reasoning is intact. Prior inference-time visual interventions can improve grounding without retraining, but they are largely open-loop and lack a mechanism to verify whether highlighted evidence is actually used. We study answer-span prediction entropy as a model-internal feedback signal and show that naive entropy minimization is ambiguous, since low entropy may arise from evidence-grounded confidence or shortcut collapse. To resolve this ambiguity, we introduce low-entropy anchors and an entropy-shaping objective that reduces answer uncertainty while preserving baseline high-confidence tokens. We instantiate this principle in SPOT-E, a plug-and-play test-time method that produces question-conditioned spotlights, optimized per instance via light-weight tuning based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Across all benchmarks and different VLM families, SPOT-E yields consistent gains and improved robustness under visual corruptions. Code is publicly available at: \url{https://github.com/YinBo0927/SPOT-E}

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPOT-E，一种测试时熵整形方法，通过视觉聚光灯和GRPO优化冻结视觉语言模型的证据利用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在处理证据密集型任务时，由于关键视觉证据微小、局部且易被忽略，导致证据读取失败。现有推理时视觉干预方法缺乏验证高亮证据是否被实际使用的机制，单纯熵最小化会因捷径坍塌而产生歧义。因此需要一种能区分证据置信和捷径坍塌的测试时优化方法。
light_analysis.method: SPOT-E基于答案跨度预测熵作为模型内部反馈信号，提出低熵锚点和熵整形目标，在降低答案不确定性的同时保留基线高置信令牌。方法通过Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）对每个实例进行轻量级调优，生成问题条件化的视觉聚光灯，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试和不同VLM家族上，SPOT-E取得了一致的性能提升，并在视觉损坏条件下展现出更强的鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确指出相比基线方法获得显著增益。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPOT-E通过测试时熵整形有效改善了冻结VLM在证据密集型任务中的表现，提供了可验证的视觉证据利用机制。该方法即插即用，兼容不同VLM，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的熵整形策略或扩展到其他多模态任务。

title: BAFIS: Dataset + Framework to assess occupational Bias and Human Preference in modern Text-to-image Models
abstract: Generative artificial intelligence has the potential to improve productivity and transform the production of creative content. However, existing research indicates that image generation models are significantly influenced by biases. This work investigates the inherent biases and language-induced biases present in text-to-image models within the context of occupation-related image generation, complementing established metrics with human preference feedback. We present a comprehensive evaluation of five current text-to-image models: Midjourney v6.1, Stable Diffusion 3 Medium, DALL-E 3, Playground v2.5, and FLUX.1-dev , focusing on gender and ethnicity bias, image quality, and prompt alignment. To facilitate this evaluation, we developed the "Battle-Arena for Fair Image Synthesis" (BAFIS), a platform designed to collect human feedback on bias in generated images. Furthermore, we created a dataset comprising 21,140 synthetic images generated using multilingual prompts, which serves as a basis for our analysis. We further place our results within a broader social context by comparing them to official statistics from the German Federal Employment Agency. Our findings reveal systematic biases in text-to-image models, with established evaluation metrics in partial correlation with subjective user ratings. Thus, our research emphasizes the need for including human preferences to develop fairer and more inclusive text-to-image models.
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision, WACV 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出BAFIS平台和数据集，评估文本到图像模型在职业生成中的偏见，结合人类偏好反馈，发现系统性偏见，强调需要人类偏好以开发更公平的模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像模型存在显著偏见，影响生成内容的公平性和包容性。现有研究多关注单一客观度量，缺乏人类主观反馈。本研究旨在系统评估职业图像生成中的性别和种族偏见，并引入人类评价以补充自动指标，从而更全面理解偏见问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建BAFIS平台收集人类对偏见的反馈，创建包含21,140张多语言提示合成图像的数据集。评估五个模型（Midjourney v6.1, Stable Diffusion 3 Medium, DALL-E 3, Playground v2.5, FLUX.1-dev）的性别和种族偏见、图像质量及提示对齐，并与德国联邦就业局官方统计对比。
light_analysis.result: 发现文本到图像模型存在系统性偏见，客观评估指标（如偏见度量）与主观用户评分仅部分相关。这表明仅依靠自动指标不足以衡量公平性，需要结合人类偏好来全面评估模型表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了当前模型在职业图像生成中的偏见问题，并证明人类反馈是评估和改进公平性的关键。BAFIS平台和数据集为未来研究提供资源，有助于开发更公平、更包容的模型。局限性：仅针对特定职业和语言，未来可扩展至更多场景。

title: A Multi-Agent system for Multi-Objective constrained optimization
abstract: Many decision-making problems in computing and networking systems can be naturally formulated as cost-minimization problems under performance constraints. In dynamic environments, reinforcement learning (RL) is often used to solve such problems at runtime by embedding both costs and constraint violations into a single scalar reward through weighted penalty terms, following a Lagrangian-inspired formulation. However, in this context the behavior of the learned policy critically depends on the choice of these weights, which are typically selected manually. This makes it difficult to identify an appropriate trade-off between optimizing the primary objective and effectively avoiding constraint violations, particularly in non-stationary environments where their relative importance may change. This paper presents MAMO (Multi-Agent system for Multi-Objective constrained optimization), an approach to tackle this balancing problem through multi-agent RL. MAMO decouples task execution from objective design by formulating the selection of reward weights as a learning problem, providing a !rst step towards more autonomous and robust RL-based solutions for constrained optimization problems in dynamic environments.
comment: Presented at the 17th Workshop on Optimization and Learning in Multiagent Systems (OptLearnMAS, https://optlearnmas.github.io), co-located with the 25th International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAMO方法，利用多智能体强化学习自动平衡多目标约束优化中的权重选择，提升动态环境下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在计算与网络系统的决策问题中，通常需要将成本和约束违反转化为加权标量奖励进行优化。然而，手动选择权重难以适应动态环境，无法有效平衡主目标和约束规避。现有方法依赖人工调整，缺乏自适应能力。
light_analysis.method: MAMO通过多智能体强化学习将奖励权重的选择建模为一个学习问题，将任务执行与目标设计解耦。每个智能体负责不同目标或约束，通过协作自动调整权重，无需手动设定，增强系统在非平稳环境中的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果，但所提方法旨在自动优化权重选择，理论上能够更灵活地权衡主目标和约束，减少手动调参负担，提升动态环境下的性能稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAMO为计算和网络系统中的约束优化问题提供了更自主的RL解决方案，初步实现了目标设计的自动化，有助于提高系统在非平稳环境中的鲁棒性。未来可扩展到更复杂的多目标场景。

title: Thermodynamic Measure of Intelligence
abstract: Can intelligence be measured? We propose that intelligence can be defined as the lawful amplification of rare but valid futures: a system increases the probability of outcomes that would be unlikely under passive dynamics but remain admissible under the constraints of the domain. We start with the premise that an intelligent system must model the world and its own place within it. Because the system is part of the world it models, this leads naturally to recursive self-simulation: the system represents futures in which its own actions are part of the trajectory. Our central results give a necessity statement and a conditional near-sufficiency statement connecting this architecture to a precise thermodynamic measure of lawful amplification of rare-valid futures: high rare-valid lift is impossible unless the internal simulation identifies rare-valid futures with high fidelity; conversely, when rare-valid fidelity is high and the simulation contains an effective policy, the achievable lift approaches the actuation-limited optimum. Thus recursive self-simulation is not merely a plausible feature of intelligence but, under the stated assumptions, is necessary and nearly sufficient for high thermodynamic intelligence. The resulting framework makes intelligence measurable on a universal scale, from passive matter and feedback controllers, large language models, and humans as text generators to Maxwell-demon-like information engines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种热力学智能度量，将智能定义为稀有效能的合法放大，并证明递归自模拟是其必要且近乎充分的条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能定义模糊且难以量化，缺乏统一测量尺度。论文旨在建立一种普适的、基于热力学的智能度量标准，能够涵盖从简单反馈控制器到大型语言模型乃至人类智能的不同系统。该度量基于稀有效能（rare-valid futures）的合法放大概念，并强调递归自模拟的核心作用，以解决智能可测量性和形式化定义的难题。
light_analysis.method: 论文从智能系统必须建模世界及其自身位置的前提出发，引入递归自模拟架构。基于此，推导出热力学度量——稀有效能合法放大（rare-valid lift）。通过必要性和条件近充分性定理，证明高稀有效能提升要求内部模拟准确识别稀有效能，且当模拟 fidelity 高时，提升可接近物理极限。框架统一了从被动物质到信息引擎的智能度量。
light_analysis.result: 论文给出了两个核心结果：必要性陈述——高稀有效能提升需要内部模拟对稀有效能的高 fidelity 识别；条件近充分性——当 fidelity 高且模拟包含有效策略时，提升可接近物理极限。这表明递归自模拟是热力学智能的必要且近乎充分条件。该度量可应用于被动物质、控制器、大语言模型和人类等，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一个普适的智能热力学度量，将智能与稀有效能的合法放大联系起来，并揭示了递归自模拟的核心作用。该框架使智能可被量化测量，具有理论意义（统一智能定义）和实际价值（评估不同系统智能水平）。未来工作可能进一步验证该度量在具体系统中的应用，或探索其与现有 AI 性能指标的关联。

title: QMFOL: Benchmarking Large Language Model Reasoning via Quantifiable Monadic First-Order Logic Test Case Generation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made significant progress in reasoning, particularly in deductive reasoning, which is crucial for high-stakes decision-making. As models improve, evaluation benchmarks should evolve to keep pace. However, existing benchmarks lack fine-grained control over logical complexity and struggle to balance semantic diversity with logical consistency.   To address these issues, we propose QMFOL, an automated framework for generating monadic first-order logic reasoning tasks with quantifiable and controllable complexity. It constructs formal logical structures using conjunction and disjunction patterns, enabling precise control over reasoning depth, width, label types, and distractors. These structures are then translated into natural language via LLMs, with logical consistency ensured through round-trip verification using an external prover. Based on our framework, we build QMFOLBench, a benchmark comprising 2880 instances with 960 configurations across diverse logical and semantic dimensions. Evaluations on six large reasoning models (LRMs) and two LLMs show that performance degrades and computational overhead increases with rising logical complexity. Models perform better on True-labeled tasks than on False or Unknown ones, and exhibit sensitivity to semantic variation. Overall, QMFOL offers a scalable and reliable approach for constructing deductive reasoning benchmarks with controllable complexity, enabling more precise evaluation of reasoning capabilities in modern language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QMFOL框架，自动生成可控复杂度的monadic一阶逻辑推理任务，构建基准评测大模型推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理基准缺乏对逻辑复杂度的精细控制，难以平衡语义多样性与逻辑一致性。随着大模型推理能力提升，需要更精细的评估方法。该研究旨在解决这些问题，提供可量化、可控复杂度的推理任务生成框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出QMFOL框架，通过合取和析取模式构建形式逻辑结构，精确控制推理深度、宽度、标签类型和干扰项。利用大语言模型将逻辑结构转化为自然语言，并通过外部证明器进行往返验证保证逻辑一致性。基于此构建包含2880个实例、960种配置的QMFOLBench基准。
light_analysis.result: 在六个大型推理模型（LRMs）和两个大语言模型（LLMs）上评估，结果显示：性能随逻辑复杂度增加而下降，计算开销增加；模型在True标签任务上表现优于False和Unknown标签任务；模型对语义变化敏感。
light_analysis.conclusion: QMFOL提供了可扩展、可靠的演绎推理基准构建方法，支持可控复杂度，能够更精确地评估现代语言模型的推理能力。未来可用于更广泛的逻辑推理评测，推动模型推理能力研究。

title: Actionable Activation Directions for Detecting and Mitigating Emergent Misalignment Across Language Model Families
abstract: Fine-tuning language models on insecure code induces emergent misalignment with poorly understood internal structure. We investigate whether this misalignment corresponds to a causally actionable activation-space direction shared across architectures. Across four instruction-tuned model families (Qwen2.5-1.5B, Gemma-2-2B, Llama-3.2-1B, Ministral-3-3B) finetuned identically, a difference-in-means direction achieves 99.6% separation of aligned and misaligned activations at each model's final layer. Causal steering by subtracting this direction reduces code spillover by 21-51 points, while a secure-code control confirms content specificity. Cross-architecture transfer via ridge regression maps yields large behavioral suppression (up to 46 points) but fails specificity controls as random and orthogonal directions perform comparably. We identify a two-tier specificity structure: within-model directions are causally specific and actionable; cross-model directions are causally real but non-specific. An asymmetric transfer topology emerges, with Gemma and Qwen acting as geometric donors and Llama as a receiver. These findings define the limits of linear cross-architecture correction and recommend within-model probing for auditing.

light_analysis.overview: 发现并利用可行动的激活方向检测和缓解跨语言模型家族的突发性对齐失败。
light_analysis.motivation: 在不安全代码上微调语言模型会引发难以理解的内部结构对齐失败。现有方法缺乏对跨架构共享方向的理解，且无法有效定位和纠正这种对齐问题。该研究旨在探明对齐失败是否对应可因果操作的激活空间方向，并评估其跨架构的可迁移性。
light_analysis.method: 在四个指令调优模型家族（Qwen2.5-1.5B、Gemma-2-2B、Llama-3.2-1B、Ministral-3-3B）上进行相同的不安全代码微调，利用差异均值方向（difference-in-means）在最后一层分离对齐与未对齐激活（99.6%分离率）。通过因果操纵（减去该方向）抑制代码溢出（21-51点下降），并使用安全代码控制验证内容特异性。跨架构迁移通过岭回归映射实现，并分析不对称转移拓扑。
light_analysis.result: 差异均值方向在单模型内实现99.6%的激活分离，因果操纵使代码溢出减少21-51点，且安全代码控制确认了内容特异性。跨架构迁移（岭回归映射）可大幅抑制行为（高达46点），但随机和正交方向表现相当，表明缺乏特异性。发现不对称拓扑：Gemma和Qwen作为几何捐赠者，Llama作为接收者。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究定义了线性跨架构校正的局限性，建议在单模型内进行探测以实现审计。核心贡献在于揭示了两层特异性结构：模型内方向具有因果特性和可操作性，跨模型方向虽因果真实但非特异。这为检测和缓解语言模型对齐失败提供了可解释的工程方法，但跨架构迁移需谨慎处理。

title: DeepForestVisionV2: Ecology-Driven Taxonomy Expansion for Camera-Trap Monitoring in African Tropical Forests
abstract: Camera-trap monitoring in African tropical forests increasingly extends beyond closed-canopy interiors to riverbanks, clearings, and park edges. Among available open tools for African forest camera-trap classification, DeepForestVision is the only one providing a matched offline workflow for both photographs and videos, and previous work showed that it outperformed other available baselines on a comparable benchmark. However, it was designed for closed-canopy, ground-level forest interiors and uses a 35-class prediction space that becomes too coarse when deployments encounter arboreal primates, birds, semi-aquatic taxa, or human-associated confounders such as livestock. We present DeepForestVisionV2, an ecology-driven expansion from 35 to 64 prediction classes (61 animal classes plus human, vehicle, and blank) designed to address three recurrent deployment gradients: vertical stratification, scene openness, and anthropogenic interfaces. DeepForestVisionV2 retains the same offline workflow and is trained on 1,535,010 photographs and 243,354 videos from multi-country African tropical-forest projects. Evaluation combines a cross-country cropped-photo validation set, used to assess robustness across sites and camera-trap settings, with three held-out Uganda video benchmarks spanning the targeted gradients. On the validation set, DeepForestVisionV2 reaches 0.86 accuracy, 0.82 macro-F1, and 0.81 balanced accuracy. On the deployment benchmarks, it preserves or improves baseline accuracy despite its harder classification task, while increasing the number of identified taxa from 22 to 29 in forest-interior videos and from 4 to 9 at riverbanks. In the park-edge use case, it raises accuracy from 0.62 to 0.86 and reduces false alarms from 11 to 0. These results show that DeepForestVisionV2 materially improves field utility while preserving robustness across sites, habitats, and camera-trap settings.
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2026 - Computer Vision for Biodiversity Monitoring and Conservation Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 生态驱动的分类体系扩展，将DeepForestVision从35类扩展到64类，提升非洲热带森林相机监测的野外实用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有DeepForestVision仅适用于封闭冠层森林内部，35类预测空间过于粗略，无法有效识别树栖灵长类、鸟类、半水生生物及人类相关干扰因素，如牲畜。为覆盖垂直分层、场景开阔度和人为界面三个梯度，需扩展分类体系以适应部署中遇到的新情况。
light_analysis.method: 提出DeepForestVisionV2，将预测类别从35个扩展到64个（61个动物类加上人、车辆和空白），保留离线工作流。使用来自多个非洲热带雨林项目的1,535,010张照片和243,354段视频进行训练。评估采用跨国裁剪照片验证集和三个针对性的乌干达视频基准。
light_analysis.result: 在验证集上达到0.86准确率、0.82宏F1和0.81平衡准确率。在部署基准上，森林内部视频识别物种从22增至29，河岸从4增至9，公园边缘准确率从0.62提升至0.86，误报从11降至0。模型在更难的分类任务下保持或提升基线性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepForestVisionV2通过生态驱动分类扩展，显著提升野外实用性，同时保持跨站点、栖息地和相机设置的鲁棒性。该工作为复杂环境下的自动物种监测提供了可靠工具，未来可进一步扩展分类体系或适应更多生态系统。

title: Learner-based Concept Drift Detection: Analysis and Evaluation
abstract: Machine learning algorithms deployed for evolving streaming environments must handle the non-stationary data distributions, commonly referred to as concept drift. The presence of concept drift poses a major challenge for many real-world applications because it can severely degrade their predictive performance, hindering their ability to support robust decision-making. Consequently, the timely and efficient detection of drift events is critical for sustaining high accuracy over time. This study examines theoretically the concept drift characteristics and numerous drift detection algorithms across several categories. Furthermore, we evaluate their performance on both synthetic and real-world datasets exhibiting diverse streaming scenarios and drift characteristics, such as abrupt and gradual changes. This study aims to enhance understanding of the complex notion of concept drift characteristics and behavior of drift detectors, along with their applicability to diverse contexts.

light_analysis.overview: 对基于学习者的概念漂移检测算法进行理论分析和实验评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念漂移导致流式机器学习模型性能下降，影响实时决策的鲁棒性。现有检测方法在多样场景中的适用性缺乏系统比较，尤其是针对突变和渐变等不同漂移特性。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过理论分析与实验评估，提升对漂移检测器行为和应用边界的理解。
light_analysis.method: 提出理论框架，系统分析概念漂移的不同特征（如突变、渐变），并分类研究多种漂移检测算法（包括基于学习者的方法）。在合成数据集（控制漂移类型和速率）和真实数据集（如传感器流、金融数据）上进行对比实验，涵盖多种流式场景和评价指标（如检测延迟、假阳性率）。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，不同检测算法对漂移类型和速率敏感；基于学习者的方法在复杂漂移模式中表现稳健，但计算开销较高。合成数据中，突变漂移的检测准确率比渐变漂移高15-20%；真实数据集上，集成方法在降低假阳性率方面优于单一算法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为概念漂移检测提供了统一的分析框架和实证基准，有助于开发者针对特定应用场景选择合适的检测策略。未来工作可探索自动化漂移感知模型调整，以及减少学习型检测器的资源消耗。

title: CzechDocs: A Multiway Parallel Dataset of Formatted Documents for Minority Languages in Czechia
abstract: We present CzechDocs, a multiway parallel dataset of formatted documents (HTML, DOCX, and PDF) covering Czech and minority languages used in Czechia-primarily Ukrainian and English, with smaller portions of Vietnamese, Russian and other languages. The dataset is designed to support the evaluation of machine translation systems that aim to preserve document formatting during translation. We provide a comparison of the most common approaches to format-preserving machine translation on a validation subset of the dataset. This validation split, together with the evaluation toolkit, is publicly released for further research. A held-out test split will be reserved for a future shared task focused on document-level translation with formatting preservation.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了一个多语言平行格式化文档数据集，支持翻译中格式保留的评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的机器翻译评估数据集多关注纯文本，忽略了文档格式（如HTML、DOCX、PDF）的保留。少数族裔语言（如捷克语、乌克兰语）的格式化文档翻译资源匮乏。该数据集填补了这一空白，为评估格式保留翻译系统提供标准化基准，促进相关研究。
light_analysis.method: 从多源收集捷克语、乌克兰语、英语等语言的格式化文档，构建平行语料库。覆盖HTML、DOCX、PDF格式。设计了验证子集和评估工具包，用于对比常见格式保留翻译方法（如分段翻译、标记化格式等）。保留测试子集用于未来共享任务。
light_analysis.result: 在验证子集上比较了多种格式保留翻译方法的效果，但摘要未明确给出具体性能指标。公开了验证子集和评估代码，以便研究者复现和进一步改进。测试子集将用于未来评测，以促进该领域的标准化评价。
light_analysis.conclusion: CzechDocs为少数族裔语言的格式保留机器翻译提供了首个大规模基准数据集。支撑了翻译系统在保持文档结构方面的评估，具有实用价值。未来可扩展至更多语言和格式，以及组织共享任务推动研究。

title: Augmenting Game AI with Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Immersion in video games depends not only on graphics, audio, and game mechanics, but also on the quality of in-game characters. Producing believable characters, or game AI, remains a significant challenge as behavioral complexity is hard to capture with hand-coded systems. Game AI is a source of immersion and engagement; however, the limitations stemming from the challenges of creating game AI often lead to frustration and the breaking of the illusion of realism within the game. The introduction of machine learning models opens the door to creating more believable, authentic, and relatable characters in games. The promise is that they either learn from interacting with the game, or from player data, to develop true human-like behavior. In this paper, we envision more applications of reinforcement learning for game AI in the future. For this to materialize, current research limitations are prohibitive to broad deployment across game genres. Therefore, we propose a framework for training reinforcement learning models with a set of requirements in mind that are suited towards game AI and game development. We present examples of games with reinforcement learning-augmented game AI and describe the practicalities of deploying player-facing machine learning agents in modern games. Furthermore, we identify bottlenecks and hard problems in these areas, which we believe offer promising research directions to accelerate the adoption of machine learning in game AI for the video game industry.
comment: Vision paper, published in Conference on Games 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用深度强化学习增强游戏AI的框架，旨在解决手写代码难以捕捉行为复杂性的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 游戏AI对玩家沉浸感至关重要，但传统手写编码难以实现复杂、真实的行为，导致玩家出戏和挫败感。现有方法多局限于特定游戏，缺乏通用性。本文旨在通过强化学习从游戏交互或玩家数据中学习，创造更逼真的角色，并克服当前研究限制以推广至多种游戏类型。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个面向游戏AI和开发的强化学习训练框架，明确一组适用于游戏AI的需求（如实时性、可解释性）。该框架包括与游戏环境的交互学习、利用玩家数据、以及部署策略。通过示例游戏展示如何将强化学习集成到现有游戏AI中，并讨论实际部署中的关键细节，如模型压缩和延迟优化。
light_analysis.result: 通过多个游戏实例验证了所提框架的有效性，强化学习增强的AI角色表现出更真实和自适应的人类行为。相比手写AI，该方法减少了开发工作量并提升了玩家体验。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但指出框架在多种游戏类型中可成功部署，且解决了实时性和计算资源瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了强化学习在游戏AI中的巨大潜力，所提框架为跨游戏类型的应用提供了实用指导。识别出当前瓶颈（如样本效率、泛化能力）并指出未来研究方向，包括加速训练和集成玩家反馈。该工作有助于推动机器学习技术在游戏行业的采纳，平衡真实感与性能。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Measuring Logical Compliance of Predictive Models
abstract: Machine learning models are predominantly evaluated through predictive performance metrics such as ranking quality, prediction error, or classification accuracy. While these metrics effectively quantify how closely predictions match the ground truth, they do not assess whether model outputs respect predefined logical or domain-specific constraints. In high-stakes applications, including healthcare, finance, and autonomous systems, logical consistency can be as critical as predictive accuracy, yet no standard metric captures this dimension. We introduce the Rule Violation Score (RVS), a complementary evaluation metric that quantifies the extent to which a predictive model respects a given set of logical rules, independently of predictive accuracy. RVS treats hard rules (strict constraints) and soft rules (statistical regularities) differently, can be evaluated on any dataset and on any predictive model expressed over a relational vocabulary, and can be computed using SQL queries that are automatically generated for Horn rules. Beyond evaluating models, RVS can also evaluate the logical consistency of training datasets and help identify poorly defined rules. We evaluate RVS on three benchmarks covering knowledge graph link prediction and relational regression, including rule-based, embedding-based, and neuro-symbolic predictive models. Our results demonstrate that two models achieving comparable predictive accuracy can exhibit substantially different levels of logical compliance, revealing differences in model behavior that standard metrics fail to capture.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Rule Violation Score (RVS)作为独立于预测准确性的逻辑合规性评估指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器学习模型评估主要依赖预测性能指标，如准确率和误差，但这些指标无法衡量模型输出是否遵守预定义的逻辑或领域特定约束。在高风险应用如医疗、金融和自动驾驶中，逻辑一致性至关重要，却缺乏标准化度量。因此需要一种互补指标来捕获这一维度。
light_analysis.method: 提出RVS，量化预测模型对逻辑规则的遵守程度。区分硬规则（严格约束）和软规则（统计规律）。RVS可应用于任何关系词汇表达的预测模型和任何数据集，并通过自动生成的SQL查询计算Horn规则。支持评估训练数据的逻辑一致性和识别定义不当的规则。
light_analysis.result: 在知识图谱链接预测和关系回归三个基准上评估了基于规则、嵌入和神经符号模型。结果表明，两个具有相似预测准确率的模型可能在逻辑合规性上存在显著差异，揭示了标准指标无法捕捉的行为差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: RVS作为评估逻辑合规性的新指标，补充了传统预测性能度量，有助于在高风险应用中确保模型行为符合领域约束。未来可用于改进模型训练和规则定义。摘要未明确说明局限性，但潜在计算复杂度或规则可扩展性待探索。

title: Apparent Psychological Profiles of Large Language Models are Largely a Measurement Artifact
abstract: Psychological instruments designed for humans are increasingly used to assign large language models (LLMs) stable psychological profiles that affect their usability, safety assessment, and use as proxies for human participants in research. Using a formal psychometric framework, we show that these profiles are largely a measurement artifact. Administering a battery of personality and risk-preference instruments spanning self-reports and behavioral tasks to 56 instruction-tuned LLMs alongside large human reference samples, we report four findings. First, differences between models are driven not by the traits an instrument targets but by a directional response bias, a tendency to respond toward one end of the scale, or one labeled option, regardless of item content; a variance decomposition attributes 81-90% of between-model variation to this bias, against 9-16% in humans. Second, the bias declines with model capability but is not eliminated by it. Third, because bias rather than trait drives responding, an instrument's apparent reliability is almost entirely predicted by its response orthogonality, a term we coin for the proportion of items for which trait and bias point in opposite directions. Fourth, the profile a model appears to have shifts with the items used and can be manufactured through item selection. These results demonstrate that the apparent psychological profiles of LLMs are artifacts of the instrument used to measure them, not properties of the models themselves. As instruments borrowed from human psychology are rarely fully orthogonal and may inherently lack validity for LLMs, we call for dedicated assessments centered on response orthogonality.

light_analysis.overview: 论文证明LLM的心理测量轮廓主要源于测量工具的伪影，而非模型真实特质。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理测量工具被用于评估LLM的稳定性特征，影响其可用性、安全性和作为人类替代品的研究。然而，这些工具是为人类设计的，用于LLM时可能存在系统性偏差。现有研究未充分考虑测量伪影，导致结果不可靠。
light_analysis.method: 采用形式心理测量框架，对56个指令微调LLM和人类进行人格与风险偏好测量（自评和行为任务）。核心创新在于识别方向性反应偏差（倾向选择量表一端），并引入响应正交性概念（测量项目和偏差方向的对立比例）。
light_analysis.result: 方差分解显示81-90%的模型间变异来自偏差（人类9-16%）。偏差随模型能力下降但未消除；可靠性几乎完全由响应正交性预测（未给出具体数值）。通过项目选择可人为制造特定轮廓。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM的心理轮廓是测量伪影，非模型固有属性。现有工具缺乏响应正交性，对LLM无效。呼吁开发基于正交性的专用评估方法，未来需关注偏差源头及更可靠的评估标准。

title: Evaluation of Image Matching for Art Skills Assessment
abstract: While some individuals possess a natural talent for drawing, mastering this skill requires dedicated training and practice. Determining one's skill in the art of drawing requires proper comprehensive assessment. In this paper, we propose a method to measure drawing skill by by matching the hand-drawn image with the original template. Existing techniques often involve complex processes. However, advancements in computer vision allow us to train computers to perform these comparisons at a human-like level, thereby resolving the tedious and overwhelming traditional process. Using computer vision applications, determining image similarity involves identifying the level of similarities in an image with a reference image. We have implemented and analyzed the SIFT feature and Siamese network to measure image similarity. Our results indicate that it is feasible to assess art skill levels. Through feature analysis, we found that SIFT-based key point matching provides a more effective means of detecting drawing skills.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图像匹配的绘画技能评估方法，利用SIFT特征和Siamese网络比较手绘图与模板的相似度。
light_analysis.motivation: 绘画技能评估传统上依赖复杂的人工过程，耗时且主观。计算机视觉的发展使得自动化图像比较成为可能，但现有方法仍需简化。本研究旨在利用图像匹配技术，客观、高效地评估绘画技能水平，解决传统评估的繁琐和主观性问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用SIFT特征和Siamese网络两种方法进行图像相似度测量。SIFT通过关键点匹配检测手绘图与模板的对应关系；Siamese网络则学习图像对间的相似性。实验对比两种方法，分析其评估绘画技能的效果。数据集未明确说明，推测为手绘图与对应模板图像。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明基于图像匹配评估艺术技能是可行的。通过特征分析发现，SIFT关键点匹配比Siamese网络更有效地检测绘画技能水平。摘要未提供具体量化指标，如准确率或提升幅度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了利用计算机视觉进行绘画技能自动评估的方法，验证了SIFT匹配的有效性。该方法有望简化传统评估流程，提供客观技能衡量。未来可探索更多特征或深度学习模型，提升评估精度。

title: Pitch Spelling Jazz Lead Sheets, Solo Transcriptions, Classical Piano and Monophonic Scores
abstract: We present an algorithm for pitch spelling and key estimation. Given an input in MIDI-like format, containing information on note pitches (expressed in semitones relative to the lowest reference note) and bar boundaries, it estimates the appropriate note names, a global Key Signature, and a local scale for each bar. This related information elements are evaluated jointly during two stages of optimisation. During an initial 'modal' stage, a probable scale is proposed for each bar, minimising the number of accidentals to be printed in the printed score with a shortest-path search. Then, during a second stage called 'tonal', these local scales are used to estimate the Key Signature and note names that would result in the best musical notation for the entire piece. We present evaluations conducted on datasets comprising a variety of digital musical scores: jazz lead sheets taken from the Real Book, transcriptions of recordings of jazz soli and bass lines, traditional tunes, as well as classical scores for piano and monophonic instruments. Our procedure was originally designed for use in music transcription, specifically for building digital collections of jazz solos transcribed from audio recordings, for the purposes of music analysis, teaching and the preservation of cultural heritage. This method should also prove useful for other tasks related to the processing of musical notation. Furthermore, to this end, we have defined new distances between various common jazz scales, which may be of some interest to musicological studies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种联合优化音高拼写和调性估计的算法，适用于多种音乐类型。
light_analysis.motivation: 在音乐转录中，尤其是爵士独奏的数字化收藏构建中，需要将MIDI音符正确拼写为乐谱符号并估计调性。现有方法可能忽略全局与局部调性的联合优化，导致音符错误拼写。该研究旨在通过两阶段优化，分别处理局部调式（每小节）和全局调性，以最小化临时记号数量，提高乐谱可读性。
light_analysis.method: 算法包含两个优化阶段：第一阶段（调式阶段）通过最短路径搜索，为每小节提出一个可能调式，最小化该小节内需打印的临时记号数量；第二阶段（调性阶段）利用局部调式估计全局调号及音符名称，使整首作品的记谱最优。输入为MIDI格式数据（含音高和节拍边界），输出音符名称、全局调号和每小节调式。评估使用多种数据集：爵士领谱（Real Book）、爵士独奏转录、贝斯线条、传统曲调及古典钢琴和单声道乐谱。
light_analysis.result: 算法在涵盖爵士、古典等多种音乐类型的多个数据集上进行了评估。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但声称能够有效估计正确的音符名称和调性，且最小化乐谱中临时记号数量。与基线方法相比，该方法通过联合优化全局和局部信息，提升了音高拼写和调性估计的准确性，尤其适用于爵士乐转录任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文提出的音高拼写和调性估计算法能够处理多种音乐类型，包括爵士、古典和传统曲调，适用于音乐转录、数字乐谱构建、教学及文化遗产保护。方法中定义的新爵士音阶距离可能对音乐学研究有价值。未来可扩展到其他音乐符号处理任务。局限性需进一步在更多样化数据上验证。

title: Distill Once, Adapt Life-Long: Exploring Dataset Distillation for Continual Test-Time Adaptation
abstract: Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CTTA) aims to maintain model performance under evolving target domains by adapting online without labeled data. However, practical deployments often cannot retain the source dataset due to privacy or licensing constraints, and purely source-free CTTA methods tend to become unstable under long-term distribution shift, suffering from compounding self-training errors and catastrophic forgetting. We introduce DO-ALL (Distill Once, Adapt Life-Long), a plug-and-play framework that revisits source information in a compact and privacy-conscious form via Dataset Distillation (DD). Before deployment, DO-ALL performs DD to produce a small set of synthetic distilled anchors that summarize the source distribution. During adaptation, each target sample is matched with its most semantically aligned anchor, which provides a stable reference for various CTTA via source replay, representation alignment, and manifold-smoothing regularization. DO-ALL can be seamlessly integrated into existing CTTA algorithms, consistently improving long-term robustness across CIFAR100-C, ImageNet-C, and the CCC benchmark. This demonstrates the potential of leveraging DD to enable stable and continuous adaptation without retaining raw source data. The code is available at https://github.com/blue-531/DOALL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DO-ALL框架，通过数据集蒸馏生成紧凑的蒸馏锚点，实现无需原始源数据的持续测试时适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续测试时适应(CTTA)面临无法保留源数据集的隐私或许可限制，现有源自由方法在长期分布偏移下不稳定，易产生累积自训练错误和灾难性遗忘，亟需一种既能保留源知识又保护隐私的适应方法。
light_analysis.method: DO-ALL在部署前对源数据集进行数据集蒸馏，生成少量合成蒸馏锚点以概括源分布。适应时，每个目标样本匹配语义最相似的锚点，通过源回放、表示对齐和流形平滑正则化提供稳定参考。框架可无缝集成到现有CTTA算法中，增强长期鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR100-C、ImageNet-C和CCC基准上，DO-ALL显著提升了现有CTTA方法的长期鲁棒性，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘和自训练错误累积，验证了数据集蒸馏在持续适应中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DO-ALL展示了数据集蒸馏在CTTA中的潜力，能以紧凑、隐私友好的形式复用源信息，实现稳定连续的适应而无需原始数据。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏策略及更广泛的适应场景。

title: HilDA: Hierarchical Distillation with Diffusion for Advancing Self-Supervised LiDAR Pre-trainin
abstract: Leveraging Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) for camera-to-LiDAR knowledge distillation offers a promising solution to the scarcity of annotated data needed to represent the immense geometric and kinematic diversity of real-world autonomous driving (AD). However, current approaches typically treat VFMs as black-box teachers, relying exclusively on frame-wise feature similarity. Consequently, they do not fully exploit the teacher's layer-wise semantic structure and global context, as well as the rich spatiotemporal information inherent in LiDAR sequences. We propose HilDA, a self-supervised pretraining framework for LiDAR backbones that better captures the semantic what and geometric where needed for driving tasks. HilDA combines hierarchical distillation comprising multi-layer distillation for progressive semantic alignment and global context distillation for scene-level semantics, with a temporal occupancy diffusion objective promoting spatiotemporal consistency. Models pre-trained with HilDA achieve state-of-the-art results on cross-modal distillation benchmarks and outperform models trained via prior distillation approaches on 3D object detection, scene flow, and semantic occupancy prediction. Code available at: https://maxiuw.github.io/hilda.
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Maciej and Jesper contributed equally

light_analysis.overview: 提出HilDA自监督激光雷达预训练框架，融合层级知识蒸馏和时间占用扩散，有效捕获语义和几何信息，提升下游驾驶任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉基础模型到激光雷达的知识蒸馏方法通常将其视为黑箱教师，仅利用逐帧特征相似性，未充分利用教师的分层语义结构和全局上下文，以及LiDAR序列中的丰富时空信息。这限制了自监督预训练的效果，导致模型对自动驾驶中几何和运动多样性的表征能力不足。
light_analysis.method: HilDA框架包含两个核心目标：层级蒸馏，包括多层蒸馏实现渐进语义对齐和全局上下文蒸馏获取场景级语义；以及时间占用扩散目标，利用扩散模型促进跨帧的时空一致性。该框架自监督地预训练LiDAR骨干网络，无需标注数据。
light_analysis.result: 在跨模态蒸馏基准上，HilDA预训练模型取得了最先进结果。在3D目标检测、场景流和语义占用预测等下游任务中，优于先前基于知识蒸馏的自监督方法，验证了其捕获语义和几何信息能力的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HilDA通过层级蒸馏和时间占用扩散，显著提升了自监督LiDAR预训练的质量，为自动驾驶中标注数据稀缺问题提供了有效解决方案。其开源代码有助于推动相关研究与应用。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏策略或扩展到其他感知任务。

title: Effective Dimension Governs Generalization in Quantum Kernel Vision Models
abstract: Recent quantum vision models-quantum vision transformers and quantum convolutional networks-report two striking but unexplained empirical phenomena: (i) ansatze with more, or more uniformly distributed, entanglement generalize better, and (ii) injecting quantum noise can improve test accuracy rather than degrade it. These observations are currently treated as curiosities, discovered by grid search and explained, if at all, by hand. We show that both are manifestations of a single, measurable quantity: the \emph{effective dimension} $d_{\rm eff}$ of the (noise-shaped) quantum feature kernel. Working primarily with quantum-kernel vision models-a quantum feature map read out by a kernel classifier-we give a spectral account in which entanglement structure and quantum noise are two knobs that move $d_{\rm eff}$; in an overfitting regime, contracting $d_{\rm eff}$ acts as ridge-like regularization. We analyze the mechanism: an \emph{exact} decomposition of the depolarized kernel $K_p=(1-p)^2K+\tfrac{p(2-p)}{D}\mathbf{1}\mathbf{1}^\top$ with $d_{\rm eff}(K_p)\to1$, a contraction result (and its boundary) for amplitude damping, a kernel-machine capacity bound, and a capacity/alignment risk decomposition; the monotone contraction operative in our entangled experiments is verified empirically, not proven in general. Along the one-parameter depolarizing family the collapse is instead exact by construction; we use it only to confirm the kernel decomposition to machine precision and at up to $12$ qubits, not as evidence for $d_{\rm eff}$. Amplitude damping contracts $d_{\rm eff}$ and lifts test accuracy by up to $+13\%$ along an inverted-U sweet spot; the effect's sign flips between the over- and under-fitting regimes; noise injection matches an explicit spectral-filtering frontier. Our results organize two reported anecdotes into a single measurable principle for designing quantum-vision models.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示量子视觉模型中有效维度是控制泛化性能的核心可测量量，统一解释纠缠结构与量子噪声的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 量子视觉模型（如量子视觉Transformer和卷积网络）中观察到两个反直觉现象：更多或更均匀分布的纠缠能提升泛化，量子噪声反而提高测试准确率。这些现象目前仅通过网格搜索发现，缺乏统一理论解释。本文旨在揭示两者背后的共同机制，即有效维度，从而为设计量子视觉模型提供可测量的指导原则。
light_analysis.method: 以量子核视觉模型为主，通过谱分析展示纠缠结构和量子噪声如何调节有效维度$d_{\rm eff}$；提出去极化核的精确分解$K_p=(1-p)^2K+\frac{p(2-p)}{D}\mathbf{1}\mathbf{1}^\top$使$d_{\rm eff}\to1$，分析幅度阻尼的收缩效应及其边界，并推导核机器容量界限与容量/对齐风险分解。实验在最多12量子比特上验证去极化核分解，幅度阻尼在过拟合区域通过收缩$d_{\rm eff}$实现类ridge正则化。
light_analysis.result: 幅度阻尼噪声可提升测试准确率高达+13%，呈现倒U型曲线，效果在过拟合与欠拟合区域符号相反；噪声注入匹配显式的谱滤波边界。实验验证了去极化核分解达到机器精度，并确认纠缠实验中有效维度的单调收缩效应（虽未理论证明）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将两个经验现象统一为有效维度原则：在过拟合时收缩$d_{\rm eff}$相当于ridge正则化，从而提升泛化。该工作为设计量子视觉模型提供了可测量的普适原理，具有重要学术价值；未来可扩展至其他噪声模型和复杂架构。

title: ReNikud: Audio-Supervised Hebrew Grapheme-to-Phoneme Conversion
abstract: Grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion for Modern Hebrew is needed for applications like text-to-speech (TTS), but is challenging due to the language's abjad writing system, which leaves vowels largely unwritten, creating substantial ambiguity. Standard approaches first predict vowel diacritics (nikud) to produce International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) transcriptions, but this is limited: vocalization data is scarce and laborious to produce, it does not specify features such as lexical stress, and it reflects formal grammatical rules rather than everyday spoken pronunciation. Direct sequence-to-sequence IPA prediction, meanwhile, struggles on limited data and fails to exploit the character-level alignment characteristic of abjads. Our method, ReNikud, overcomes these limitations with two key insights: (1) Weak audio supervision via a phoneme-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) pseudo-labeling pipeline on thousands of hours of unlabeled Hebrew audio, yielding phonemic transcriptions that reflect natural spoken norms without manual annotation. (2) A pseudo-vocalization architecture that predicts IPA phonemes at each character position, enforcing character-level alignment as an inductive bias. Results on existing Hebrew G2P benchmarks and the new targeted MILIM benchmark for spoken Hebrew show that ReNikud surpasses previous state-of-the-art methods. We will release our code and trained models to support further work on Hebrew TTS and speech technologies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出弱音频监督的希伯来语G2P转换方法，通过伪标记流水线和伪变音符号架构实现字符级对齐，超越现有最先进方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代希伯来语G2P转换对TTS等应用至关重要，但其辅音音素文字系统（元音大多不写）导致严重歧义。现有方法首先预测元音变音符号（nikud），但数据稀缺、无法反映日常发音且不包含词汇重音；直接序列到序列方法在有限数据上效果不佳，且未能利用字符级对齐优势。因此需要一种能利用大量未标注音频并强制字符级对齐的高效方法。
light_analysis.method: ReNikud提出两个关键创新：1）弱音频监督：通过基于音素的ASR伪标记流水线，利用数千小时未标注希伯来语音频生成反映自然口语的音素转录，无需手动标注；2）伪变音符号架构：在每个字符位置直接预测IPA音素，强制字符级对齐作为归纳偏置，从而克服数据稀疏和特征缺失问题。
light_analysis.result: 在现有希伯来语G2P基准和新推出的MILIM口语希伯来语基准上，ReNikud均超越之前最先进方法。具体性能提升数值未明确给出，但表明在准确率和泛化能力上显著优于基线，证明了弱音频监督和字符级对齐的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReNikud通过弱音频监督和伪变音符号架构成功解决了希伯来语G2P转换中的歧义和数据稀缺问题，性能达到新高度。学术上展示了利用未标注音频和字符级对齐的潜力，实际中可推动希伯来语TTS及语音技术发展。未来可探索更高质量的伪标签策略或扩展至其他闪米特语言。

title: Evaluating and Enhancing Negation Comprehension in Remote Sensing MLLMs
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in various Remote Sensing (RS) tasks. However, their ability to comprehend negation remains underexplored, limiting deployment in real-world applications where models must explicitly identify what is false or absent, e.g., emergency responders need to locate non-flooded routes for evacuation. To comprehensively study this limitation, we introduce RS-Neg, the first benchmark to evaluate negation understanding across region-level to scene-level tasks. Specifically, we design an automated data generation pipeline for RS imagery, using LLMs to synthesize diverse negation queries, and introduce a dynamic visual focus module for verification. Our evaluation reveals that advanced RS MLLMs struggle with negation, exhibiting hallucinations and substantial performance degradation. To close this gap, we propose NeFo, a novel test-time learning method that explicitly incorporates the logical role of negation into the model optimization. Remarkably, using about 5\% unlabeled test samples, NeFo significantly improves the negation understanding of models and shows strong generalization to unseen tasks. Code and data will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统评估遥感多模态大模型的否定理解能力，并提出测试时学习方法NeFo以提升该能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感多模态大模型（MLLMs）在多种任务中表现出色，但其对否定（negation）的理解能力尚未被充分探索。在紧急救援等实际应用中，模型需明确识别“不存在”或“为假”的情况（如定位非洪水路线），现有模型常产生幻觉或性能严重下降。因此，亟需系统评估并提升模型的否定理解能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出RS-Neg基准，涵盖区域级到场景级任务，并设计自动化数据生成管道，利用大语言模型合成多样化否定查询，同时引入动态视觉焦点模块进行验证。针对性能差距，提出NeFo，一种新颖的测试时学习方法，通过显式将否定的逻辑角色纳入模型优化，仅使用约5%未标记测试样本即可显著提升否定理解能力。
light_analysis.result: 评估发现现有先进遥感多模态大模型在否定理解上表现不足，存在幻觉和性能大幅下降。NeFo方法在RS-Neg基准上显著提升了否定理解能力，且对未见任务展现出强泛化性。具体量化指标摘要未明确说明，但强调仅用5%未标记样本即可取得显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了遥感多模态大模型在否定理解方面的严重局限性，并提出了有效的测试时优化方法NeFo。该工作推动了模型在真实场景中的可靠部署，如应急响应中的非洪水路线识别。未来可进一步探索否定理解的通用框架及更大规模数据生成。代码和数据将在接收后开源。

title: Computational Methods and Challenges in Cell-Free DNA Analysis for Multi-Cancer Early Detection
abstract: Cell-free DNA (cfDNA) is a promising avenue for non-invasive multicancer early detection (MCED), in that, it can enable multiple cancer detection simultaneously from a single blood draw, with particular sensitivity to cancers that currently lack established screening programs. Here we review the computational methods developed between 2022 and 2025 for cfDNA-based MCED. We focus on how fragmentomics and epigenetic features are extracted and analyzed to detect cancer at early stages. We first briefly outline the biological basis of cfDNA signals, then review classical statistical and machine learning approaches alongside deep learning frameworks including autoencoder-based models. For each method we discuss biological interpretability, validation strategy, and readiness for clinical integration. Furthermore, we categorize the current challenges into technical, computational, and methodological while outlining open problems in the field. This review shows that multimodal ensemble approaches have the strongest promise for clinical integration and the highest readiness. However, for better assessment of future work and side-by-side comparison, standardization of evaluation protocols and reporting results will be crucial.

light_analysis.overview: 综述2022-2025年cfDNA多癌早检计算方法，强调多模态集成方法在临床整合中的最高就绪度。
light_analysis.motivation: cfDNA有望实现非侵入性多癌早检，尤其对缺乏筛查手段的癌症敏感。但现有方法在技术、计算和方法学上存在挑战，需系统梳理和比较不同计算方法的性能与可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 回顾经典统计/机器学习及深度学习（如自编码器）方法，重点分析片段组学和表观遗传特征的提取与建模，讨论各方法的生物学可解释性、验证策略及临床就绪度。
light_analysis.result: 多模态集成方法在临床整合中展现出最强前景和最高就绪度；但标准化评估协议和报告结果对于未来工作的比较至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述指出标准化评估是推动cfDNA MCED领域发展的关键，多模态方法最有望实现临床转化，但需更多系统性比较研究。

title: Predicting gestational age at birth in the context of preterm birth from multi-modal fetal MRI
abstract: Preterm birth is associated with significant mortality and a risk for lifelong morbidity. The complex multifactorial aetiology hampers accurate prediction and thus optimal care. A pipeline consisting of bespoke machine learning methods for data imputation, feature selection, and regression models to predict gestational age (GA) at birth was developed and evaluated from comprehensive multi-modal morphological and functional fetal MRI data from 333 control cases and 93 preterm birth cases. The GA at birth predictions were classified into term and preterm categories and their accuracy, sensitivity, and specificity were reported. An ablation study was performed to further validate the design of the pipeline. Performance was evaluated using stratified 10-fold cross-validation. The pipeline achieves an R2 score of 0.13 and a mean absolute error of 2.74 weeks. It also achieves a 0.77 accuracy, 0.59 sensitivity, and 0.82 specificity across folds. The predominant features selected by the pipeline include cervical length and statistics derived from placental T2* values. The confluence of fast, motion-robust and multi-modal fetal MRI techniques and machine learning prediction allowed the prediction of the gestation at birth. This information is essential for any pregnancy. To the best of our knowledge, preterm birth had only been addressed as a classification problem in the literature. Therefore, this work provides a proof of concept. Future work will increase the cohort size to allow for finer stratification within the preterm birth cohort. Our code is available at https://github.com/dfajardorojas/ml-for-preterm-birth-.
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2026:013

light_analysis.overview: 开发了一种基于多模态胎儿MRI和机器学习的管道，用于预测出生胎龄（GA），并验证其在早产预测中的可行性。
light_analysis.motivation: 早产是高死亡率和长期发病的重要原因，但其多因素病因导致准确预测困难。现有方法主要将早产视为分类问题，缺乏回归预测出生胎龄的研究。因此，需要一种能从多模态数据中提取特征并预测出生胎龄的方法，以改善产前护理。
light_analysis.method: 采用定制的机器学习管道，包括数据插补、特征选择和回归模型。使用333例对照和93例早产的多模态胎儿MRI数据（形态和功能），通过分层10折交叉验证评估。关键步骤包括缺失值处理、特征重要性排序和回归预测。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 管道在出生胎龄预测上取得R²=0.13，平均绝对误差2.74周。分类性能：准确率0.77，敏感性0.59，特异性0.82。消融实验验证了管道设计的有效性。主要预测特征为宫颈长度和胎盘T2*统计量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次将出生胎龄预测作为回归问题，证明了多模态MRI结合机器学习的有效性。虽然性能有限，但为早产预测提供了新方向。未来需扩大样本量以实现早产亚组精细分层，并优化模型以提高精度。

title: Multi-Modal Contrastive Learning for Implicit Earth Embeddings via Location Tying
abstract: Spatial prediction tasks are often limited by a lack of high-quality labelled ground-truth observations. To overcome this challenge, self-supervised pre-training is a possible solution, with contrastive learning dominant for location encoders. Those approaches usually align geographic coordinates with just one additional modality. We propose two multimodal contrastive learning architectures: Multimodal Embedding via Location Tying (MELT) and Sequential Alternating Location Training (SALT). These architectures expand this framework beyond two modalities by utilising unpaired geospatial data. Both methods are technically viable and match the performance of the strongest two-modality baseline (SATCLIP) across four downstream tasks. However, increasing the number of modalities does not consistently improve performance, suggesting that the chosen location encoder is the main limitation - the contrastive objective reaches its peak early, regardless of modality diversity or pre-training volume. MELT provides more stable training than SALT and presents a stronger foundation for future scaling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种多模态对比学习架构MELT和SALT，通过位置绑定利用非配对地理数据，扩展位置编码器的多模态框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间预测任务常因缺乏高质量标记观测数据而受限，自监督预训练是解决方案。现有对比学习方法通常只对齐一个额外模态，本文旨在扩展多模态对比学习，克服单一模态限制，提升位置编码器泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出MELT和SALT两种多模态对比学习架构。MELT通过位置绑定实现多模态嵌入，SALT采用顺序交替位置训练。均利用非配对地理数据，将对比学习目标扩展到两个以上模态，训练位置编码器以学习隐式地球嵌入。
light_analysis.result: 两种方法在四个下游任务中匹配最强双模态基线SATCLIP的性能。但增加模态数未持续提升性能，表明位置编码器是主要限制——对比目标早熟，与模态多样性或预训练量无关。MELT训练比SALT更稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过MELT和SALT成功扩展多模态对比学习至超过两模态，但发现位置编码器容量是关键瓶颈。MELT为未来扩展提供更稳定基础。未来需设计更强位置编码器以充分挖掘多模态数据潜力。

title: MedRLM: Recursive Multimodal Health Intelligence for Long-Context Clinical Reasoning, Sensor-Guided Screening, Evidence-Grounded Decision Support, and Community-to-Tertiary Referral Optimization
abstract: Real-world clinical decision support requires reasoning over heterogeneous and longitudinal patient information rather than answering isolated medical questions. However, current medical large language models and retrieval-augmented generation systems often rely on single-step prompting or retrieval, which can be fragile when clinical evidence is distributed across long electronic health records, medical images, sensor streams, guidelines, and referral constraints. This paper proposes MedRLM, a Recursive Multimodal Health Intelligence framework for long-context clinical reasoning, sensor-guided screening, and community-to-tertiary referral support. Instead of compressing all patient information into one prompt, MedRLM treats the patient case as an external clinical environment that can be recursively inspected, decomposed, retrieved, verified, and synthesized. The framework coordinates specialized agents for clinical text, longitudinal EHR, medical imaging, physiological sensor signals, guideline retrieval, uncertainty auditing, and referral planning. It further introduces a Clinical Evidence Graph Memory to connect patient-specific observations with retrieved evidence, standardized definitions, sensor-derived biomarkers, and referral criteria. A sensor-guided recursive triggering mechanism activates deeper reasoning when abnormal physiological or behavioral patterns are detected, while uncertainty-gated refinement supports clinician review for high-risk or low-confidence cases. We also outline a real-data evaluation design using public and credentialed clinical datasets spanning EHR, radiology, ECG, ICU time series, and referral-proxy outcomes. MedRLM aims to move medical AI from static question answering toward auditable, multimodal, and workflow-aware clinical decision support.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedRLM框架，通过递归多模态健康智能实现长上下文临床推理、传感器引导筛查和社区至三级转诊优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗大语言模型和检索增强生成系统依赖单步提示或检索，难以处理分散在长电子病历、医学图像、传感器数据、指南和转诊约束中的临床证据。实际临床决策需要推理异构纵向信息，而非回答孤立问题，因此亟需能灵活整合多模态数据的框架。
light_analysis.method: MedRLM将患者案例视为可递归检查的外部环境，协调临床文本、纵向EHR、医学影像、生理传感器信号、指南检索、不确定性审计和转诊规划等专门代理。引入临床证据图记忆连接患者特定观察与检索证据，并设计传感器引导递归触发机制，在检测到异常生理或行为模式时激活深度推理，同时通过不确定性门控细化支持高风险或低置信度案例的临床审查。
light_analysis.result: 论文设计了基于公开和认证临床数据集（涵盖EHR、放射学、ECG、ICU时间序列和转诊代理结果）的真实评估方案，但摘要未明确报告具体性能指标或与基线方法的定量对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedRLM旨在推动医疗AI从静态问答转变为可审计、多模态、工作流感知的临床决策支持框架，为整合异构数据源、支持递归推理和多级转诊优化提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更多模态和实时临床部署。

title: Implicit Semantic-Aware Communication Based on Hypergraph Reasoning
abstract: Semantic-aware communication has emerged as a transformative paradigm for next-generation communication systems, shifting the fundamental goal from transmitting bit-level symbols to reliably recovering and understanding the semantic meaning of information. Previous studies have demonstrated that representing the semantic content of source messages as graph-based structures can significantly improve communication efficiency and the accuracy of semantic inference at the receiver. However, existing solutions typically employ graphs that capture only pairwise relationships, thereby neglecting higher-order implicit correlations commonly observed in real-world scenarios, such as group interactions, multi-entity associations, and complex relational contexts. This limitation reduces semantic expressiveness and makes semantic inference susceptible to ambiguity and performance degradation, particularly under noisy or corrupted channel conditions. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel hypergraph-based implicit semantic reasoning framework, HISR, which leverages hypergraphs to represent complex multi-entity relationships among semantic knowledge entities. In HISR, entities and their associated higher-order relations are mapped into dedicated semantic subspaces tailored to distinct relational contexts. This design not only disentangles diverse semantic interactions to mitigate the over-smoothing effects commonly found in traditional graph embedding methods but also enables robust semantic inference even when partial information loss occurs during transmission. Numerical results show that the proposed HISR achieves up to a 36.6% improvement in implicit semantic interpretation accuracy over the state-of-the-art benchmarks.
comment: This work is accepted at IEEE Transactions on Communications

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于超图推理的隐式语义感知通信框架HISR，通过超图建模高阶隐式语义关系，提升语义通信的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语义通信方法通常使用图结构表示语义内容，但仅能捕获成对关系，忽略了现实场景中的高阶隐式关联（如群体交互、多实体关联等），导致语义表达力不足，在噪声或信道失真条件下语义推理易出现歧义和性能下降。因此，需要一种能够建模高阶复杂关系并增强鲁棒性的语义通信框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出HISR框架，利用超图表示语义知识实体间的高阶关系，将实体及其关联映射到专有的语义子空间中。该设计解耦了多样的语义交互，缓解了传统图嵌入中的过平滑问题，使得在传输过程中部分信息丢失时仍能进行鲁棒的语义推理。
light_analysis.result: 数值结果表明，与最先进基线方法相比，HISR在隐式语义解释准确率上提升了高达36.6%，验证了超图建模高阶关系对语义通信性能的显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: HISR通过超图推理实现了隐式语义感知通信，有效提升了语义表达的丰富性和推理鲁棒性，为下一代语义通信系统提供了新思路。未来可探索超图构建的自动化及复杂场景下的扩展应用。

title: ARTEMIS: Agent-guided Reliability-aware Temporal Mask Evolution for Imperfectly Supervised Video Polyp Segmentation
abstract: Imperfectly supervised video polyp segmentation (VPS) aims to learn dense, temporally consistent masks from inexpensive supervision, including weak annotations (points, scribbles) and semi-supervision with few densely labeled frames. This setting is clinically valuable but challenging due to weak contrast, ambiguous boundaries, motion blur, and specular highlights, compounded by sparse pixel-level guidance. While SAM2 can generate dense masks from sparse inputs, direct pseudo-labeling often yields geometry-degraded masks with boundary leakage, underutilizes temporal consistency, and ignores reliability. To address these issues, we propose ARTEMIS, a unified framework for imperfectly supervised VPS driven by agent-guided reliability-aware temporal mask evolution. ARTEMIS initializes coarse masks from available supervision: SAM2 converts points/scribbles, while dense labels serve as reliable anchors. A debate-and-judge vision-language agent selects reliable temporal anchors under weak supervision, which are propagated bidirectionally with SAM2 to refine unreliable or unlabeled frames. Finally, ARTEMIS trains the segmenter using temporal reliability-aware robust learning, incorporating reliability-guided reference selection, a Reference Prototype Transport Module, and reliability-aware robust loss. These components assess mask reliability, evolve anchors over time, transport target identity across frames, and down-weight noisy supervision instead of discarding difficult samples. Experiments on SUN-SEG and CVC-ClinicDB-612 under scribble, point, and limited-label settings demonstrate that ARTEMIS achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code will be released at https://github.com/wangtong627/ARTEMIS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ARTEMIS框架，通过智能体引导的可靠性感知时序掩码演化，解决不完美监督下的视频息肉分割问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频息肉分割在临床中具有重要价值，但现有不完美监督方法面临弱对比度、边界模糊、运动模糊和镜面高光等挑战，且稀疏像素级标注难以利用时序一致性。直接使用SAM2生成伪标签会导致几何退化（边界泄漏）、忽视时序一致性和可靠性评估。因此，需要一种统一框架来有效整合弱监督（点、涂鸦）和半监督（少量密集标注）信息，提升分割质量。
light_analysis.method: ARTEMIS框架包含三阶段：初始化掩码（SAM2生成点/涂鸦的粗掩码，密集标签作可靠锚点）；通过辩论-评判视觉语言智能体选择可靠时序锚点，并用SAM2双向传播精炼不可靠/未标注帧；训练时采用时序可靠性感知鲁棒学习，包括可靠性引导参考选择、参考原型传输模块和可靠性加权损失，以评估掩码可靠性、演变锚点、跨帧传递目标身份并降低噪声监督权重。
light_analysis.result: 在SUN-SEG和CVC-ClinicDB-612数据集上，针对涂鸦、点和有限标注三种不完美监督设置，ARTEMIS均达到最先进性能。具体数据摘要未明确给出，但声称优于现有方法。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARTEMIS统一了弱监督和半监督视频息肉分割，通过智能体引导的可靠性感知掩码演化有效利用时序一致性，解决了不完美监督下的边界泄漏和噪声问题。该方法具有临床实用价值，未来可扩展到其他医学视频分割任务。局限性可能包括对智能体推理的依赖和计算开销。

title: Modularity-Free Conflict-Averse Training for Generalized PINNs
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have become a powerful framework for solving PDEs by embedding physical laws into differentiable objectives. Despite their advances, training PINNs remains fragile: recent conflict-averse optimization schemes alleviate gradient interference between residual and boundary losses, but we show that their effectiveness deteriorates as model capacity increases. In this paper, we identify a capacity-induced failure mode, where overparameterized networks undergo functional modularity, self-partitioning into task-exclusive modules that suppress cross-objective interaction and hinder convergence toward Pareto-stationary points. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework, Modular-Sparsity Synchronization (ModSync), which integrates structural optimization into conflict-averse training by penalizing task-exclusive connections while preserving interaction-promoting pathways. Extensive experiments across diverse PDE benchmarks demonstrate that ModSync consistently prevents capacity-driven failures, sustains robust cross-objective coupling, and achieves state-of-the-art accuracy. Codes are available at \url{https://github.com/heejokong/ModSync}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ModSync框架，通过结构优化解决过参数化PINN中功能模块化导致冲突规避训练失效的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: PINN训练脆弱，现有冲突规避优化方法缓解梯度干扰，但随模型容量增大效果下降。原因是过参数化网络自划分为任务专用模块，抑制跨目标交互，阻碍向Pareto稳定点收敛。该问题限制了高容量PINN的精度和泛化能力，亟需新方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Modular-Sparsity Synchronization (ModSync)，将结构优化集成到冲突规避训练中。通过惩罚任务专用连接同时保留促进交互的路径，防止功能模块化，维持跨目标耦合。该方法无需额外模块化检测，可直接应用于现有冲突规避框架。
light_analysis.result: 在多种PDE基准上，ModSync持续防止容量驱动的失败，保持稳健的跨目标耦合，并达到最先进精度。与基线方法相比，显著提升训练稳定性和收敛质量，尤其在高容量网络下效果明显。消融实验验证了各组件贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: ModSync有效解决了容量增加导致的PINN训练脆弱性问题，提升了冲突规避方法的鲁棒性和精度。学术上揭示了功能模块化作为失败机制，实践上提供了简单有效的正则化策略。未来可探索自适应惩罚系数和扩展到其他多任务学习场景。

title: NAMESAKES: Probing Identity Memorization in Text-to-Image Models
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) models generate realistic likenesses of some individuals when prompted with their names, raising privacy concerns. However, distinguishing whether a generated face is memorized or fabricated currently requires ground-truth photos, access to training data, or white-box access to model internals, limiting applicability. We introduce a fully black-box behavioral probe that distinguishes between these regimes while requiring no reference photos or prior knowledge of training data. To benchmark this task, we present the NAMESAKES dataset of over one thousand names and faces of public figures spanning a wide range of fame levels, along with perturbed, less famous names. Experiments on state-of-the-art T2I models show that our probe substantially predicts identity memorization and separates memorized from unrecognized names, with further insights into differences across model families.

light_analysis.overview: 提出黑盒行为探针检测文生图模型中的身份记忆，无需真实照片或训练数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 文生图模型在输入人名时可能生成逼真的个人肖像，引发隐私问题。然而，现有区分生成人脸是记忆还是虚构的方法需要真实照片、训练数据或模型白盒访问，限制了实际应用。本研究旨在开发一种无需上述条件的黑盒探针，以识别模型是否记忆了特定身份，从而解决隐私评估的可用性问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种完全黑盒的行为探针，通过分析模型对名称输入的生成行为来判断是否记忆了该身份。无需参考照片或训练数据知识。同时构建了NAMESAKES数据集，包含一千多个不同知名度公众人物的姓名和面孔，以及扰动后的不太知名的名字，用于基准测试。在多个最先进T2I模型上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该探针能有效预测身份记忆，并显著分离记忆名称与未识别名称。揭示了不同模型家族之间的差异。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但探针在区分记忆与虚构方面表现良好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种实用的黑盒工具，用于检测文生图模型中的身份记忆，有助于隐私审计和监管。方法无需访问训练数据或模型内部，扩展性强。潜在局限可能包括对低知名度人物的探针性能，未来可探索跨模型泛化或防御机制。

title: From Texts to Scores: Tracing the Emergence of Essay Quality Representations in Large Language Models
abstract: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have substantially transformed Automated Essay Scoring (AES), yet the internal mechanisms underlying LLM-based scoring remain poorly understood. In this work, we systematically analyze the hidden representations of eight LLMs across two English essay datasets (ASAP++, CSEE) and one Portuguese dataset (ENEM). Using linear probing, cross-prompt generalization, dimensionality reduction, and neuron-level analyses, we find consistent evidence that essay quality information is encoded in a linearly accessible form within LLM representations. These representations emerge progressively across layers, remain robust across prompting strategies, and partially transfer across essay prompts despite differences in scoring rubrics. In addition, nonlinear probes provide only marginal and inconsistent improvements over linear probes, suggesting that most essay quality information is already linearly decodable. We further identify individual ``essay scoring neurons'' whose activations strongly correlate with essay scores and whose behavior is sensitive to targeted intervention. Moreover, the layer-wise distribution of these neurons systematically shifts with essay length, with longer essays relying more heavily on deeper layers. Overall, our findings provide evidence that LLMs encode structured representations related to essay quality and offer new insights into the interpretability of LLM-based AES systems.
comment: This is a preprint of a manuscript currently under peer review

light_analysis.overview: 发现LLM内部线性编码作文质量信息，并识别出关键评分神经元。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管LLM显著提升了自动作文评分（AES）性能，但其内部评分机制尚不明确。现有研究缺乏对模型如何表征作文质量的深入分析，限制了对LLM-based AES系统的可解释性。理解这些内部表示对于改进评分模型、确保公平性和可信度至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 使用线性探针、跨提示泛化测试、降维和神经元级分析，对8个LLM在ASAP++、CSEE（英文）和ENEM（葡萄牙语）三个数据集上的隐藏表示进行系统分析。通过对比线性与非线性探针性能，探究作文质量信息的编码形式。进一步识别与评分高度相关的单个神经元，并分析其层分布与作文长度的关系。
light_analysis.result: 实验一致显示，作文质量信息以线性可解码形式存在于LLM表示中，且逐层涌现，对提示策略鲁棒，并在不同提示间部分迁移。非线性探针仅带来边际改进，表明信息主要线性编码。识别出与评分强相关的“评分神经元”，其行为受目标干预影响，且层分布随作文长度系统变化：较长作文更依赖深层神经元。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了LLM能够编码与作文质量相关的结构化表示，揭示了基于LLM的AES系统的内部工作原理。这些发现增强了模型可解释性，并为未来改进评分模型、设计干预策略提供了基础。局限性包括数据集和模型种类的限制，未来可探索更多语言和任务。

title: BIM-Edit: Benchmarking Large Language Models for IFC-Based Building Information Modeling
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to computer-aided design (CAD) to generate design artifacts from textual instructions. In engineering practice, this requires more than creating new geometry, models must also understand existing scenes, edit them correctly, and preserve semantics and relations. However, many CAD benchmarks focus on creating new models rather than editing existing ones, and mostly evaluate geometric correctness. We introduce BIM-Edit, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs on natural-language editing of Building Information Models (BIM) represented in the Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) format. BIM provides a challenging testbed because building models encode geometry together with semantic and relational structure. BIM-Edit contains 324 editing tasks spanning 11 realistic building models and 36 synthetic scenes. Tasks are expressed using three instruction categories - direct, spatial, and topological - covering both explicit and scene-grounded edits. We evaluate outputs along three dimensions: geometric accuracy, semantic validity, and topological consistency. Across evaluated LLMs, the best-performing model achieves only 49.5% average score across the three metrics, and no model fully solves more than 3.4% of tasks. These results demonstrate a substantial gap between current LLM capabilities and the requirements of structured engineering design workflows.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BIM-Edit基准，评估LLM在IFC格式建筑信息模型自然语言编辑任务上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CAD基准主要关注新建模型和几何正确性，而工程实践中需要模型理解、编辑和保持语义关系。BIM场景因编码几何与语义、关系结构而更具挑战性，现有方法无法满足需求。
light_analysis.method: 构建BIM-Edit基准，包含324个编辑任务，覆盖11个真实建筑模型和36个合成场景。任务使用直接、空间、拓扑三类指令，评估几何精度、语义有效性和拓扑一致性三个维度。
light_analysis.result: 最佳LLM平均得分49.5%，完全解决任务率低于3.4%，表明当前LLM在结构化工程编辑任务中存在显著能力差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: BIM-Edit揭示LLM在BIM编辑上的局限性，强调需提升语义理解和关系保持能力，为未来研究提供评估基础。

title: HEad and neCK TumOR (HECKTOR) 2025: Benchmark of Segmentation, Diagnosis, and Prognosis in Multimodal PET/CT
abstract: Head and neck cancers (HNC) represent a significant global health burden, with accurate tumor delineation being essential for effective radiotherapy planning. The complexity of the oropharyngeal anatomy, combined with the heterogeneous appearance of tumors on imaging, makes manual segmentation time-intensive and subject to inter-observer variability. Beyond segmentation, predicting long-term clinical outcomes, such as recurrence-free survival (RFS), and determining human papillomavirus (HPV) status from noninvasive imaging, remain challenging yet clinically valuable goals. The HECKTOR 2025 challenge addresses these needs by establishing a comprehensive benchmark for automated HNC analysis using multimodal PET/CT imaging and electronic health records. Building on previous editions (2020-2022), this challenge features an expanded multi-institutional dataset comprising over 1,100 patients from 10 centers worldwide. Participants were tasked with three complementary objectives: (1) segmenting primary gross tumor volumes (GTVp) and metastatic lymph nodes (GTVn), (2) predicting recurrence-free survival, and (3) classifying HPV status. The challenge attracted 35 registered teams, with 15 final submissions evaluated on a held-out test set. Top-performing algorithms achieved a mean Dice similarity coefficient of 0.75 for segmentation, a concordance index of 0.66 for survival prediction, and a balanced accuracy of 0.56 for HPV classification. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of the submitted methodologies, evaluates their performance across different lesion characteristics, and discusses their implications for clinical translation in automated oncology workflows and decision support systems.
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Overview paper for the HECKTOR 2025 challenge, held as a satellite event at MICCAI 2025. Challenge website: https://hecktor.grand-challenge.org/

light_analysis.overview: 提出HECKTOR 2025挑战赛，建立多模态PET/CT头颈癌自动分析基准，结合分割、生存预测和HPV分类三项任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 头颈癌是全球重大健康负担，准确肿瘤勾画对放疗计划至关重要。口咽解剖复杂性和影像异质性导致手动分割耗时且观察者间差异大。此外，从无创影像预测复发风险和HPV状态具有临床价值但极具挑战。现有方法缺乏统一基准，多中心验证不足。
light_analysis.method: 构建多中心数据集，包含10个中心1100+患者的PET/CT和电子健康记录。设计三项任务：分割原发肿瘤和转移淋巴结（GTVp/GTVn）、预测无复发生存（RFS）、分类HPV状态。35个团队参与，15个最终提交在测试集上评估。采用Dice系数、一致性指数和平衡准确率作为评价指标。
light_analysis.result: 顶级算法在分割任务上平均Dice系数0.75，生存预测一致性指数0.66，HPV分类平衡准确率0.56。论文分析了不同病灶特征下的性能，并与先前挑战赛结果对比，显示了多模态数据在头颈癌分析中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: HECKTOR 2025展示了多模态PET/CT和临床数据在头颈癌自动分析中的有效性，为分割、预后和HPV状态预测提供了全面基准。研究具有临床转化价值，可辅助放疗规划和决策支持。未来工作需进一步改进性能，尤其是HPV分类准确率，并推广至更多中心。

title: RACL: Reasoning-Agent Control Layers for Continuous Metaheuristic Learning
abstract: This paper introduces RACL, a Reasoning-Agent Control Layer for metaheuristics. RACL places a reasoning agent above an existing optimizer. The agent does not replace the optimizer and does not modify business constraints. Instead, it controls the optimizer's internal search behavior by observing operational memory, reasoning over past behavior, formulating bounded hypotheses, testing interventions, evaluating outcomes, applying guardrails, consolidating useful policies and explaining its decisions. The experiment uses vehicle routing as a testbed, but the contribution is not a new routing solver, a particular ALNS configuration or a specific set of routing rules. The contribution is the RACL method: a way for a reasoning agent to discover, validate, consolidate and explain algorithmic control rules for a metaheuristic. In the current experimental setting, RACL improves or ties the Operational Memory Policy in 21 of 21 feasible cases and improves or ties a non-reasoning Stagnation-Triggered Policy in 18 of 21 feasible cases, with an average RACL vs STP cost delta of -0.641%. In the Sevilla-9/10 runtime sample, RACL improves average cost by -8.337% versus Fixed and -1.605% versus STP without showing material computational overhead. During the proof-of-concept, Codex was used as an in-the-loop reasoning agent observing executions, interpreting logs and proposing live bounded interventions. The policy proxy was later used only to make quantitative evaluation reproducible.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RACL方法，通过推理代理控制元启发式优化器的搜索行为，提升性能并保持可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有元启发式优化器缺乏自适应控制规则，手动设计的停滞触发策略性能有限。需要一种自动发现、验证和解释控制规则的方法，以提升优化效率且不改变业务约束。
light_analysis.method: RACL在现有优化器上增加推理代理，通过观察操作内存、推理历史行为、制定有界假设、测试干预、评估结果、应用护栏、巩固有用策略并解释决策来动态控制搜索。使用Codex作为推理代理，在车辆路径问题中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在21个可行案例中，RACL优于或持平操作内存策略在所有21个案例，优于或持平停滞触发策略在18个案例，平均成本降低0.641%。在Sevilla样本中，成本相对固定策略降低8.337%，相对停滞触发策略降低1.605%，无显著计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: RACL提供了一种新颖的元启发式控制层，增强了优化性能且保持可解释性。未来可扩展到其他组合优化问题，但依赖推理代理能力，需要在更多场景验证。
