The code is publicly available at \https://github.com/Funny0101/ReA-OVCD

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的可靠性感知开放词汇变化检测框架ReA-OVCD，通过语义和空间协同精炼策略，在多个遥感数据集上显著提升变化检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放词汇变化检测方法在建模变化时存在固有权衡：实例级比较忽略细粒度语义变化（如部分建筑扩建），而直接像素比较不可靠，产生不稳定响应和边界伪影。因此需要一种既能灵活定位变化区域又能保证可靠性的方法，以处理语义模糊性和空间不一致性问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出训练免费的ReA-OVCD框架。首先通过像素级语义差异获取候选变化区域，确保灵活且精细的定位。随后引入协同精炼策略：语义变化推理模块通过联合分析分布差异和响应变化来重新评估变化，抑制偶然不一致；边界感知精炼模块通过验证候选区域是否被可靠内部像素支持，缓解边界未对齐和不确定性导致的伪影。
light_analysis.result: 在LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD、DSIFN和SECOND四个遥感变化检测数据集上，所提方法在F1C指标上提升2.13%至9.75%，同时计算效率更高，全面超越现有最先进方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReA-OVCD有效解决了开放词汇变化检测中的可靠性与细粒度问题，无需额外训练，代码已开源。该框架为遥感变化检测提供了灵活且可靠的解决方案，未来可探索更高效的结构扩展或应用于其他视觉任务。

title: QG-MIL: A Gated Transformer Aggregator for Domain-Agnostic Multiple Instance Learning in Medical Imaging
abstract: Attention-based Multiple Instance Learning aggregators in medical imaging are prone to attention concentration, producing overconfident and unstable predictions. We introduce QG-MIL, a gated transformer aggregator that addresses this through four synergistic architectural components: RMSNorm-based pre-normalization, per-head QK normalization, fine-grained attention output gating, and SwiGLU-style feed-forward modules. Together, these design choices stabilize training and distribute attention more uniformly across instances without auxiliary losses, masking, or multi-stage regularization. We evaluate QG-MIL across six benchmarks spanning whole-slide pathology and cell-level hematology, covering two fundamentally different MIL scales. The best-performing QG-MIL variants outperform leading baselines on all six benchmarks, with an average improvement of +6.1 mean macro F1 points. Attention overlays and attention mass analysis confirm more distributed instance weighting. Ablation studies show that while individual components can match the full model on specific datasets, the QG-MIL design provides the most consistent cross-domain performance and tightest variance when compared to selected baselines. We release a configurable implementation to support reproducibility at: https://github.com/unica-visual-intelligence-lab/QG-MIL

light_analysis.overview: 提出QG-MIL，一种门控Transformer聚合器，通过四个协同组件解决MIL中注意力集中问题，在六个医学影像基准上取得平均+6.1 macro F1提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学影像中基于注意力的多实例学习（MIL）聚合器容易产生注意力集中，导致预测过于自信且不稳定，现有方法大多依赖辅助损失、掩码或多阶段正则化来缓解，但增加了复杂性且跨域泛化能力有限。QG-MIL旨在通过无需额外损失的架构设计，实现更均匀的注意力分布，提升模型稳定性和跨领域性能。
light_analysis.method: QG-MIL采用四个关键组件：RMSNorm预归一化稳定训练、每头QK归一化防止注意力爆炸、细粒度注意力输出门控（gating）控制信息流、SwiGLU风格前馈网络增强特征变换。这些设计协同工作，使注意力分布更均匀，无需辅助损失或掩码。模型在六个涵盖全切片病理和细胞级血液学的基准上评估，涉及两种不同规模的MIL。
light_analysis.result: 最佳QG-MIL变体在所有六个基准上均优于领先基线，平均macro F1提升6.1个百分点。注意力覆盖图和注意力质量分析证实实例权重更分散。消融研究表明，单个组件在某些数据集上可匹配全模型性能，但QG-MIL完整设计在跨域一致性上最优，且方差最小。
light_analysis.conclusion: QG-MIL通过门控Transformer架构有效解决了MIL中的注意力集中问题，提升了预测稳定性和跨域泛化能力。其无需额外正则化即可均匀分布注意力，在病理和血液学领域均取得显著提升。开源实现促进可重复性研究。未来可探索扩展到更多医学影像任务或与其他MIL范式结合。

title: Adaptive Distance-Aware Trunk Deep Operator Learning for Long-Span Roadway Bridges
abstract: Long-span roadway bridges exhibit highly localized structural responses under vehicular loading, making repeated FE analysis computationally expensive for applications such as influence surface generation and structural digital twins. Existing SciML approaches struggle to accurately capture these localized responses. To address this challenge, this study proposes an adaptive-trunk DeepONet for localized structural response prediction in large-scale bridge systems. The framework dynamically constructs a load-dependent learning domain using a KNN strategy, allowing the network to focus on structural influence zones. The trunk network is further enhanced using distance-aware features that encode the geometric relationship between the load and structural nodes. A physics-based full-field reconstruction is incorporated through a stiffness-informed Schur complement formulation, enabling predictions at adaptive nodes to be extended to the entire structural domain. To enable scalable training, response data are generated using a reduced-order equivalent shell model that preserves the dominant global behavior while significantly reducing computational cost. The proposed framework is validated on both a benchmark bridge model and the real-world Mussafah Bridge. Results show that the method achieves FEM-level accuracy with relative errors below 5%, while reducing the total response evaluation time (including full-field reconstruction) by approximately 60x; excluding the post-processing reconstruction step, the AD-DeepONet inference is up to four orders of magnitude faster than FEM. In addition, the framework enables rapid generation of full-field responses, influence lines, and influence surfaces under arbitrary vehicular loading configurations, demonstrating strong potential for large-scale bridge analysis and digital twin applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应距离感知干线深度算子学习（AD-DeepONet）框架，通过动态荷载相关学习域和距离感知特征编码，实现大跨桥梁局部结构响应的精准预测与近百倍加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 大跨桥梁在车辆荷载下呈现高度局部化结构响应，传统有限元分析计算成本高，难以满足实时应用需求；现有科学机器学习方法无法准确捕捉这些局部响应。因此，亟需一种高效且精确的替代模型，以支持影响面生成和结构数字孪生等任务。
light_analysis.method: 采用KNN策略动态构建荷载相关性学习域，使网络聚焦于结构影响区；干线网络融入距离感知特征，编码荷载与节点几何关系；引入基于刚度信息Schur补全的物理全场重构，将自适应节点预测扩展至全结构；使用降阶等效壳模型生成训练数据，在保持全局行为的同时降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在基准桥模型和真实Mussafah桥上验证，相对误差低于5%；总响应评估时间（含全场重构）加速约60倍，纯AD-DeepONet推理比有限元快四个数量级；能快速生成任意车辆荷载配置下的全场响应、影响线和影响面。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架兼具有限元级精度与极高计算效率，为大规模桥梁分析和数字孪生提供有效工具。未来可进一步探索更复杂荷载场景的适应性及模型泛化能力。

title: Hierarchical Control in Multi-Agent Games: LLM-based Planning and RL Execution
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved strong performance in sequential decision-making, yet scaling to complex multi-agent environments remains challenging due to sparse rewards, large state-action spaces, and the difficulty of learning coordinated strategies. We propose a hierarchical architecture where a pretrained large language model (LLM) acts as a centralized strategic controller that selects among specialized RL skill policies for a team of agents, while RL policies handle reactive low-level execution. We evaluate this hybrid system in a competitive 2v2 King of the Hill environment against behavior tree (BT) and \emph{``Flat''} RL (end-to-end training without skill decomposition) baselines. The LLM+RL system achieves task performance statistically equivalent to hand-crafted BT (46.4\% vs 51.5\% win rate, $p=0.103$) while both significantly outperform Flat RL trained without skill decomposition. A user study ($n=15$) reveals that 60\% of participants perceive LLM+RL agents as the most human-like ($p=0.027$), citing behavioral adaptability and tactical variability. These results demonstrate that pretrained LLM reasoning can effectively orchestrate pretrained RL skills, achieving competitive multi-agent coordination and superior perceived believability without manual rule engineering.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次化架构，用LLM做高层规划、RL技能做低层执行，实现多智能体协调，性能媲美手工规则且更类人。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在复杂多智能体环境中面临稀疏奖励、大状态动作空间和协调策略学习困难等问题，现有端到端RL方法性能不足，而手工规则工程成本高且缺乏适应性。本文旨在利用LLM的推理能力结合RL技能，在无需手工规则的前提下实现高效的团队协调。
light_analysis.method: 采用层次化架构：预训练LLM作为中央战略控制器，基于全局观测选择高-level任务并调用对应的RL技能策略（如移动、攻击等），RL策略负责低层反应式执行。在2v2 King of the Hill环境中评估，对比扁平RL（无技能分解）和行为树基线。
light_analysis.result: LLM+RL系统胜率46.4%，与手工行为树51.5%统计等价（p=0.103），两者均显著优于扁平RL。用户研究中60%参与者认为LLM+RL智能体最像人类（p=0.027），因其展现出行为适应性和战术可变性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明预训练LLM可有效编排预训练RL技能，实现竞争性多智能体协调，性能与手工规则相当，且感知可信度更高。避免了手工规则工程，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂场景或端到端联合训练。

title: Self-Adaptive Scale Handling for Forecasting Time Series with Scale Heterogeneity
abstract: Current time series forecasting (TSF) research predominantly focuses on scale-homogeneous data, where different time series share similar numerical magnitude ranges. However, in real-world industrial scenarios such as financial product sales, different time series often differ by orders of magnitude (scale heterogeneity). Since these series share similar temporal patterns, joint modeling is desirable for better data utilization, yet existing scaling methods either compress low-scale signals (global normalization) or destroy semantic discriminability and amplify inverse-scaling errors (window-based scaling). This paper proposes a self-Adaptive Scale-handling (AS) module that learns adaptive scale factors tailored to each input, preserving semantic discriminability while reducing inverse-scaling errors. AS consists of Scale Calibrating (SC), which calibrates prior mean scaling factors through neural networks, and Scaling Selection (SS), which decides whether to apply calibration or retain the original factor, avoiding over-calibration. Experiments on real-world fund sales datasets from Ant Fortune and Alipay show that AS seamlessly integrates into popular TSF models and consistently improves their performance. The code and dataset are available at the link https://github.com/Meteor-Stars/ASTSF.
comment: This is the full version of the paper accepted by the IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP). The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/Meteor-Stars/ASTSF

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应尺度处理模块，解决时间序列预测中尺度异质性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列预测研究多关注尺度均匀数据，而实际工业场景如金融产品销售中，不同时间序列数量级差异巨大（尺度异质性）。由于这些序列共享相似时间模式，联合建模有助于充分利用数据，但现有缩放方法如全局归一化会压缩低尺度信号，窗口缩放则破坏语义区分性并放大反缩放误差。因此需要一种自适应缩放方法，既能保持语义区分性又能减少误差。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应尺度处理（AS）模块，包含尺度校准（SC）和尺度选择（SS）。SC通过神经网络校准先验平均缩放因子，SS决定是否应用校准或保留原始因子以避免过度校准。AS模块可无缝集成到流行时间序列预测模型中，无需修改模型架构。实验使用蚂蚁财富和支付宝的真实基金销售数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在真实基金销售数据集上，将AS模块集成到多个流行TSF模型中，均一致提升了预测性能。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但实验结果表明AS模块有效改善了尺度异质性问题，且不依赖特定模型，具有良好的通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的AS模块针对时间序列预测中的尺度异质性挑战，通过自适应校准和选择机制实现了更好的缩放处理。其即插即用的特性使其易于集成到现有模型，提升实际工业应用中的预测精度。未来可探索更复杂的校准策略或扩展到其他领域的异质尺度问题。

title: VIMPO: Value-Implicit Policy Optimization for LLMs
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has become a central tool for improving the reasoning ability of large language models, but current methods face a trade-off between simplicity and credit assignment. Group-relative methods such as GRPO avoid training a critic, but typically assign a trajectory-level advantage to every token. Actor-critic methods provide denser learning signals, but require a learned value function with its own training instability. We introduce VIMPO, a critic-free policy optimization method that derives a policy-implied value function from the optimality conditions of KL-regularized reinforcement learning. For autoregressive generation, the resulting value recurrence can be written in terms of policy-reference log-ratios and anchored by the terminal condition that no future reward remains at the end of a trajectory. This gives a simple value loss that incorporates outcome-level verifiable rewards without training a critic. The same derivation also yields a critic-free actor advantage, allowing VIMPO to separate reward incorporation through the value loss from policy improvement through a PPO-style actor update. On mathematical RLVR benchmarks, VIMPO improves over GRPO across MATH-500, AIME 2024, AIME 2025, and OlympiadBench, with especially larger gains on competition-style evaluations. Under noisy rewards, VIMPO retains a consistent advantage over GRPO, suggesting that policy-implied value optimization can provide finer credit assignment while preserving the practical simplicity of critic-free training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VIMPO，一种无需critic的策略优化方法，通过策略隐含值函数实现细粒度信用分配，结合了GRPO的简洁性和actor-critic的密集信号优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法面临简单性与信用分配之间的权衡：组相对方法如GRPO避免训练critic，但为每个token分配轨迹级优势，信号粗糙；actor-critic方法提供密集学习信号，但需学习值函数，带来训练不稳定性。VIMPO旨在无需critic的情况下实现更精细的信用分配。
light_analysis.method: VIMPO从KL正则化强化学习的最优条件推导出策略隐含值函数，对于自回归生成，值递归可写为策略-参考对数比的形式，并由轨迹末端无未来奖励的终止条件锚定。由此得到一个简单的值损失，结合结果级可验证奖励而不训练critic。同时导出无critic的actor优势，通过PPO风格的actor更新分离奖励整合与策略改进。
light_analysis.result: 在数学RLVR基准上，VIMPO在MATH-500、AIME 2024、AIME 2025和OlympiadBench上均优于GRPO，尤其在竞赛风格评估中提升显著。在噪声奖励场景下，VIMPO保持对GRPO的一致优势，表明策略隐含值优化能提供更细的信用分配。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIMPO实现了无critic训练的简单性与细粒度信用分配的统一，在数学推理任务上显著优于GRPO，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索在更复杂推理任务上的扩展。

title: StreamKL: Fast and Memory-Efficient KL Divergence for Boosting Attention Distillation
abstract: Attention distillation, which trains one attention distribution to match another by minimizing their Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence, is widely used in knowledge distillation, model compression, continual learning, and sparse-attention LLM training. However, existing approaches materialize both attention distributions before computing the KL reduction, incurring $O(N_QN_K)$ memory and IO costs that become prohibitive at long context lengths. We present StreamKL, the first fused GPU primitive for attention KL divergence that eliminates this quadratic materialization. StreamKL derives a novel online formulation for the coupled two-distribution KL reduction, enabling a single one-pass forward kernel that streams query-key tiles through on-chip SRAM. For the backward pass, StreamKL recomputes attention probabilities tile-by-tile, avoiding storage of quadratic intermediates. We further design and implement efficient GPU kernels with dedicated optimizations. Experiments show StreamKL delivers up to $43\times$ and $14\times$ speedups over baseline methods in the forward and backward passes, respectively. Most importantly, StreamKL reduces the extra HBM footprint of attention distillation from $O(N_QN_K)$ to $O(1)$, enabling long-context distillation on a single GPU.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StreamKL，首个融合GPU原语，以O(1)内存实现注意力KL散度计算，显著加速注意力蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 注意力蒸馏通过最小化KL散度匹配注意力分布，广泛用于知识蒸馏、模型压缩和长文本LLM训练。但现有方法需物化两个注意力分布，导致O(N_QN_K)内存和IO成本，在长序列下变得不可行。
light_analysis.method: StreamKL提出在线公式用于耦合双分布KL归约，实现单遍前向核，通过片上SRAM流式处理查询-键块；反向传播逐块重计算注意力概率，避免存储二次中间结果，并设计高效GPU内核。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，StreamKL前向加速最高43倍，后向加速14倍，将额外HBM占用从O(N_QN_K)降至O(1)，使得单GPU长文本蒸馏可行。
light_analysis.conclusion: StreamKL显著提升了注意力蒸馏的速度和内存效率，尤其适用于长上下文场景，为知识蒸馏和模型压缩提供了高效工具。未来可扩展至其他KL散度应用场景。

title: Connect the Dots: Training LLMs for Long-Lifecycle Agents with Cross-Domain Generalization Via Reinforcement Learning
abstract: This work presents a general framework for training large language models (LLMs) to "Connect the Dots" (CoD), a meta-capability required by long-lifecycle agents: as an LLM-based AI agent gets deployed in an environment, it solves a long sequence of tasks while continuously exploring the environment, learning from its own experiences, and iteratively self-updating its context about the environment, thereby achieving progressively better performance on future tasks conditioned on the updated context. Major components of the CoD framework include: (1) algorithm design and infrastructure for end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) with long rollout sequences interleaving solve-task and update-context episodes; (2) tasks and environments for incentivizing and eliciting the targeted meta-capability in LLMs during training, as well as for faithfully measuring progress during evaluation. We present proof-of-concept implementations of the CoD framework, including a GRPO-style RL algorithm with fine-grained credit assignment, as well as tasks and environments tailored to the targeted meta-capability (rather than domain-specific LLM capabilities or standard task-by-task RL). Empirical results validate the efficacy of end-to-end RL training in the CoD setting, and demonstrate the potential for out-of-distribution generalization -- within the training domains, across different domains, and from CoD to Ralph-loop settings -- of the elicited meta-capability. Our investigation of CoD connects several lines of prior works, and opens up new opportunities for advancing LLMs and AI agents. To facilitate further research and applications, we release our implementations at \url{https://github.com/agentscope-ai/Trinity-RFT/tree/research/cod/examples/research_cod}.
comment: Work in progress; we will continuously update the codebase and arXiv version

light_analysis.overview: 提出Connect the Dots框架，通过端到端强化学习训练LLM具备长期生命周期代理的元能力，实现跨域泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的AI代理在长期部署中需要持续探索、学习和自我更新上下文，但缺乏针对这种元能力的通用训练框架。标准的任务级强化学习或领域特定微调无法有效激励模型在长序列中连接分散的经验，导致跨任务和跨域泛化能力不足。该研究旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出CoD框架，包含端到端强化学习算法和基础设施，支持长序列展开（交织任务解决和上下文更新）。采用GRPO风格RL算法，具备细粒度信用分配。设计专门的任务和环境来激励和评估元能力，而非领域特定能力。训练中通过自更新上下文实现渐进式性能提升。
light_analysis.result: 实验证明端到端RL训练在CoD设置中的有效性，并展示出所诱导元能力的分布外泛化：在训练域内、不同域间以及从CoD到Ralph-loop设置均表现良好。具体指标摘要未明确，但强调了泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作连接了多条先前研究路线，为提升LLM和AI代理的长期交互能力开辟新机遇。开放了实现代码以促进进一步研究。未来工作可探索更复杂的任务序列和更高效的训练策略。

title: Activation- and Influence-Aware Ranks (AIR): Function-Preserving SVD Compression for LLMs
abstract: We present Activation- and Influence-Aware Ranks (AIR), an SVD-based LLM compression framework that guides each weight matrix's low-rank approximation with a backward-signal influence metric. Starting from the activation-aware optimum of SVD-LLM(W), AIR runs a single closed-form alternating least squares (ALS) sweep that integrates influence element-wise under a monotone-descent guarantee. AIR is layer-local and composes orthogonally with end-to-end methods: alone it exceeds ACIP, and AIR+LoRA outperforms it further. AIR improves perplexity over SVD-LLM(W) by >18% at <=60% parameter retention, matches its quality with ~90% less calibration data, and turns parameter savings into FLOP, peak-memory, and per-token latency gains.
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Resource-Adaptive Foundation Model Inference (AdaptFM), Seoul, South Korea (non-archival)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于反向信号影响度量的SVD压缩框架AIR，通过闭式交替最小二乘扫描提升大语言模型压缩效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SVD压缩方法如SVD-LLM(W)仅考虑激活分布，忽略反向传播信号对低秩近似的影响，导致压缩后模型质量损失较大。如何在不显著增加计算成本的前提下，利用梯度信息指导秩的选择并保持函数等价性，是提升LLM压缩效率的关键问题。
light_analysis.method: AIR框架以SVD-LLM(W)的激活感知初始化为起点，引入闭式交替最小二乘（ALS）扫描，逐元素集成反向信号影响度量，并在单调下降保证下优化。该方法保持层局部性，可与LoRA等端到端方法正交组合。
light_analysis.result: 在参数保留不超过60%时，AIR相比SVD-LLM(W)将困惑度改进超过18%；使用约90%更少的校准数据可达到相近质量。AIR单独优于ACIP，与LoRA结合后进一步超越。参数节省转化为FLOP、峰值内存和每token延迟的实际收益。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIR提供了一种轻量级、函数保持的SVD压缩方案，通过融合激活与反向信号影响显著提升压缩质量。其层局部设计易于集成到现有流程，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更高效的影响度量计算或与其他量化方法结合。

title: Reward as An Agent for Embodied World Models
abstract: While RL has become a promising tool for refining world models, existing methods largely rely on conservative rollouts near the training distribution, limiting exploration, behavioral diversity, and richer dynamic discovery. In this work, we challenge this conservative paradigm. We argue that the core limitation is not exploration itself, but the lack of reliable verification strategies to support broader exploration. Without reliable verification, expanded exploration becomes highly susceptible to reward hacking, where policies exploit imperfect rewards without achieving genuine improvement. To evaluate this motivation, we instantiate our method in embodied world models, where physical plausibility, and task completion provide a rigorous testbed for scalable RL under complex dynamics. On the verification side, we introduce Reward as an Agent, an agentic reward framework that actively evaluates generated behaviors to provide robust reward signals and mitigate reward hacking under distribution shifts. On the exploration side, we introduce Dynamic-Aware Rollout Diversification through DynDiff-GRPO, which explicitly expands action-space exploration to diversify trajectories, broaden state-action coverage, and encourage richer embodied behaviors beyond conservative rollout regimes. By unifying Reward as an Agent with DynDiff-GRPO, we enable RL on a more reliable reward foundation with substantially diversified sampling, effectively mitigating reward hacking while yielding significant accuracy gains across multiple open-source world models, thereby demonstrating that broader exploration can scale successfully when grounded in robust verification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Reward as an Agent框架和DynDiff-GRPO方法，通过可靠验证支持更广泛的探索，解决奖励黑客问题，提升世界模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于RL的世界模型优化方法依赖保守的轨迹展开，限制探索和行为多样性。核心问题不是探索本身，而是缺乏可靠的验证策略来支持更广泛的探索，导致奖励黑客问题。本文旨在通过稳健验证支持可扩展的探索。
light_analysis.method: 提出Reward as an Agent，一种智能奖励框架，主动评估生成行为以提供鲁棒奖励信号，缓解分布偏移下的奖励黑客。同时提出Dynamic-Aware Rollout Diversification（DynDiff-GRPO），显式扩展动作空间探索以多样化轨迹。两者结合实现更可靠的奖励基础和多样化采样。
light_analysis.result: 在多个开源世界模型上取得显著精度提升，验证了更广泛的探索在稳健验证下可成功扩展。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但提及显著精度增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过统一Reward as an Agent和DynDiff-GRPO，有效缓解奖励黑客，提升世界模型性能。表明在稳健验证下，更广泛的探索可以成功扩展。摘要未明确提及局限性与未来方向。

title: Vision-Reasoning-Guided Occlusion Removal from Light Fields
abstract: Occlusion-robust scene recovery remains a major challenge in computational imaging, particularly in natural environments where dense foreground vegetation severely limits visibility. We propose a vision-reasoning-guided light field occlusion removal framework that combines the visibility recovery capability of light field integration (LFI) with the semantic reasoning capacity of vision-language models (VLMs). Multi-view observations are first integrated via LFI to suppress foreground occlusions and produce an initial visibility-enhanced representation. A VLM is then incorporated as a conditional semantic prior to restore degraded structures and recover fine details, guided by the observed measurements. To improve recovery consistency and reduce hallucination artifacts, we introduce a multi-sample fusion strategy that aggregates multiple generated hypotheses into a unified estimate. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving the highest average SSIM across four synthetic light field benchmark scenes (4-Syn) and strong generalization across structured and unstructured acquisition settings. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining physical imaging constraints with vision-language reasoning for robust perception under severe occlusion, with applicability to search-and-rescue and exploratory robotic navigation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视觉推理引导的光场去遮挡框架，融合光场积分与视觉语言模型，实现严重遮挡下的鲁棒场景恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然环境中密集前景植被严重遮挡视野，导致场景恢复困难。现有方法难以同时有效抑制遮挡并恢复细节，尤其在结构化和非结构化采集设置中。该研究结合光场积分的可见性恢复能力和视觉语言模型的语义推理能力，解决遮挡鲁棒场景恢复问题。
light_analysis.method: 框架首先通过光场积分抑制前景遮挡，生成初始可见性增强表示；然后引入视觉语言模型作为条件语义先验，基于观测测量恢复退化结构和细节；最后采用多样本融合策略聚合多个生成假设为统一估计，减少幻觉伪影。
light_analysis.result: 在四个合成光场基准场景上取得最高平均SSIM，并在结构化和非结构化采集设置中展现强泛化性。与现有方法相比，性能达到最优，验证了结合物理成像约束与视觉语言推理的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了光场积分与视觉语言模型结合在严重遮挡下的有效性，为计算成像提供新范式。适用于搜救和探索机器人导航等实际场景，未来可扩展至更复杂的遮挡环境。

title: Kolmogorov-Arnold Reservoir Computing
abstract: Reservoir computing offers a lightweight framework for forecasting dynamical systems but may struggle to capture long-range dependencies due to limited representational capacity. Conventional reservoir computing recurrently uses trainable reservoirs with hyperparameter sensitivity, while the next-generation reservoir computing removes recurrence at the cost of rapidly growing feature dimensions. Here, we develop Kolmogorov-Arnold Reservoir Computing (KARC), which replaces reservoirs with explicit basis-function expansions inspired by the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem. We rigorously show that KARC is a lightweight design of Kolmogorov-Arnold networks (KANs), preserving the potential expressive capacity of KANs while admitting efficient closed-form training of reservoir computing. At comparable cost, KARC outperforms existing reservoir computing methods on challenging benchmarks including partial differential equations. It can also be integrated with generative diffusion models for text-to-image generation. This work thus establishes a principled bridge between reservoir computing and KANs, enabling efficient and high-fidelity dynamical system forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kolmogorov-Arnold储层计算，结合KAN表达力与储层计算效率，实现高效动力系统预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统储层计算在预测动力系统时因表示能力有限难以捕获长程依赖，且超参数敏感；下一代方法去除递归但特征维度迅速膨胀。需一种轻量且表达能力强的框架，以高效准确地预测复杂动力学系统。
light_analysis.method: 基于Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，用显式基函数展开替代传统储层，形成Kolmogorov-Arnold储层计算。该方法保留了KAN的潜在表达能力，同时支持储层计算的闭式高效训练，避免了递归和超参数调优。
light_analysis.result: 在包括偏微分方程在内的挑战性基准上，KARC以相当成本超越现有储层计算方法。此外，可与生成扩散模型集成用于文本到图像生成，展示了跨任务适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了储层计算与KAN之间的原则性桥梁，为高效高保真动力系统预测提供新框架。未来可探索其在不同动力学场景以及更复杂生成任务中的应用。

title: ENPIRE: Agentic Robot Policy Self-Improvement in the Real World
abstract: Achieving dexterous robotic manipulation in the real world heavily relies on human supervision and algorithm engineering, which becomes a central bottleneck in the pursuit of general physical intelligence. Although emerging coding agents can generate code to automate algorithm search, their successes remain largely confined in digital environments. We conjecture that the missing abstraction to automate robotics research is a repeatable feedback loop for real-world policy improvement: reset the scene, execute a policy, verify the outcome, and refine the next iteration. To bridge this gap, we introduce ENPIRE, a harness framework for coding agents that instantiates this physical feedback routine with four core modules: an Environment module (EN) for automatic reset and verification, a Policy Improvement module (PI) that launches policy refinement, a Rollout module (R) to evaluate policies with one or multiple physical robots operating in parallel, and an Evolution module (E) in which coding agents analyze logs, consult literature, improve training infrastructure and algorithm code to address failure modes. This closed-loop system transforms real-world manipulation learning into a controllable optimization procedure, minimizing human effort while allowing fair ablations across training recipe and agent variants. Powered by ENPIRE, frontier coding agents can autonomously train a policy to achieve a 99% success rate on challenging, dexterous manipulation tasks, such as organizing a pin box, fastening a zip tie, and tool use, a process that further accelerates when we dispatch an agent team on a robot fleet. Our results suggest a practical and scalable path toward deploying coding agents to autonomously advancing robotics in the physical world.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ENPIRE框架，让编码代理通过闭环物理反馈实现真实世界机器人策略自主改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 灵巧操作依赖人工监督和算法工程，成为通用物理智能的瓶颈。现有编码代理仅在数字环境成功，缺乏真实世界策略改进的可重复反馈循环。ENPIRE旨在自动化场景重置、策略执行、结果验证和迭代优化，最小化人工干预。
light_analysis.method: ENPIRE包含四个模块：Environment模块自动重置和验证，Policy Improvement模块启动策略优化，Rollout模块并行评估策略，Evolution模块让编码代理分析日志、查阅文献、改进训练和算法代码。形成闭环系统，将真实操作学习转化为可控优化过程。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性灵巧操作任务（如整理针盒、固定扎带、工具使用）上，编码代理自主训练策略实现99%成功率。通过机器人集群调度代理团队可进一步加速，表明从数字到物理世界的可扩展路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: ENPIRE为真实世界机器人策略自主改进提供实用、可扩展框架，降低人类负担，促进通用物理智能发展。未来可探索更多复杂任务和更高效的代理协作模式。

title: CrossFlow: One-Step Generation Across Latent and Pixel Spaces
abstract: Most diffusion and flow-matching generators define the prior, probability path, and prediction target in the same representation space. Latent diffusion improves efficiency by moving this path into an autoencoder latent space, but the final sample is still produced by a separately trained decoder. This separation creates a mismatch: the generator is optimized for latent-space prediction, while final quality depends on how the decoder handles generated latents that may differ from clean encoder outputs. We introduce CrossFlow, a cross-space flow formulation that maps noisy latent inputs directly to pixel-space images. The key technical step is a velocity-free one-step objective: the latent trajectory defines the training path, but the supervised prediction is an image rather than a latent displacement. This lets one model act both as a one-step latent-to-pixel generator and as a decoder replacement for latent diffusion pipelines. On class-conditional ImageNet-1k at $256\times256$, CrossFlow-XL achieves 1.62 FID with one function evaluation. Ablations show that the latent encoder and pixel-space perceptual and adversarial losses are important for fidelity. These results indicate that cross-space flow objectives can combine the efficiency of latent representations with direct pixel-space supervision, without requiring a separate decoder at inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CrossFlow，一种跨空间流模型，直接从潜在表示一步生成像素空间图像，无需单独解码器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有潜扩散模型在潜空间训练生成器，但最终样本由单独解码器生成，造成生成器优化目标与最终质量不匹配。这种分离降低了生成效率和质量，亟需统一潜空间与像素空间的联合训练方法。
light_analysis.method: CrossFlow引入无速度的一步目标，用潜轨迹定义训练路径，但监督预测为像素图像而非潜位移。模型同时作为一步潜到像素生成器和潜扩散管道的解码器替代，结合潜编码器和像素空间感知及对抗损失优化。
light_analysis.result: 在类别条件ImageNet-1k 256×256上，CrossFlow-XL单次评估FID为1.62。消融实验表明潜编码器和像素空间感知及对抗损失对保真度至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 跨空间流目标结合了潜表示效率和像素空间直接监督，无需推理时单独解码器。该方法简化了生成流程，提升了效率，为未来高效图像生成提供了新范式。

title: Semantic-Anchored Evidential Fusion for Domain-Robust Whole-Slide Survival Analysis
abstract: Whole-slide images (WSIs) are widely used for computational cancer prognosis. However, most existing methods primarily focus on in-domain performance and fail to generalize across clinical centers. This limitation stems from their reliance on pixel-derived representations that are highly susceptible to domain-specific artifacts caused by staining protocols and scanner hardware. We hypothesize that high-level pathology semantics, such as tumor grade and micro-environmental architecture, provide a domain-invariant semantic representation that mirrors the robust diagnostic logic of human pathologists. Therefore, we propose a Semantic-Anchored Evidential Fusion Survival (SAEFS) framework, where SAEFS derives semantic anchors from WSIs via Visual Question Answering (VQA), employs a dual-stream WSI evidence extraction architecture, uses Dirichlet-based Subjective Logic to model uncertainty, and fuses semantic and visual evidence through a cautious conjunction rule to avoid overconfident fusion from correlated sources. Trained exclusively on one source domain and evaluated zero-shot across four unseen domains, SAEFS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models both in prediction accuracy and reliability, improving the average C-index by 10.2%. Quantitative analyses further show that VQA-derived semantic features exhibit significantly lower cross-center divergence than pixel-derived features, highlighting their robustness for cross-center clinical applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义锚定证据融合框架(SAEFS)，通过VQA提取域不变语义特征，结合主观逻辑不确定性建模，实现跨域鲁棒的生存分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有WSI生存分析方法主要关注域内性能，未能泛化到不同临床中心，因为依赖像素表示易受染色协议和扫描硬件差异影响。本文假设高级病理语义（如肿瘤分级）提供域不变的语义表示，模拟病理学家诊断逻辑，旨在解决跨中心泛化问题。
light_analysis.method: SAEFS框架通过VQA从WSI中提取语义锚点，采用双流证据提取架构分别处理语义和视觉特征，使用Dirichlet主观逻辑建模预测不确定性，并通过谨慎合取规则融合两种证据，避免相关源导致的过置信融合。训练仅在单一源域进行。
light_analysis.result: 仅在单一源域训练，在四个未见域零样本评估，SAEFS在C-index上平均提升10.2%，一致优于现有方法。量化分析显示VQA语义特征的跨中心散度显著低于像素特征，验证了其域鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAEFS证明了语义锚定与不确定性建模可有效提升生存分析的跨域泛化能力，为临床中心间的可靠预后提供了新范式。未来可探索更丰富的语义表示及多模态融合策略。

title: ROSE: Benchmarking the Perception-to-Action Gap in Multimodal Models
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly expected to act on visual information, yet the same scene may require different actions under different task contexts. How reliably can a model turn the same visual evidence into the action required by the current context? To answer this question, we introduce \textsc{ROSE} (\textbf{R}eference-conditioned \textbf{O}ddity and \textbf{S}ymbolic \textbf{E}xecution), a controlled benchmark that holds the visual scene fixed while varying region constraints and required symbolic outputs. Through coupled counting and coordinate-action tasks, \textsc{ROSE} tests whether models can infer an implicit majority reference and act on the resulting fine-grained visual evidence under changing contexts. Across nine recent MLLMs, performance drops by as much as 44.5 percentage points from counting-oriented tasks to region-conditioned action, despite 98.8\% human performance. The gap persists on paired scenes and regions for which the same model returns the correct count, while global-click and matched local controls show that coordinate grounding explains only part of the loss, revealing a distinct, model-dependent bottleneck in turning shared visual evidence into context-specific actions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ROSE基准，评估多模态大模型在固定视觉场景下根据上下文执行不同动作的能力，揭示感知到动作的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型需依据视觉信息执行动作，但同一场景在不同任务下需不同响应。现有方法缺乏对模型将固定视觉证据转化为上下文所需动作的可靠性测试。ROSE通过控制场景和变化区域约束与符号输出，量化这种差距，发现模型性能从计数任务到区域条件动作下降高达44.5个百分点，人类为98.8%。
light_analysis.method: ROSE基准通过引用条件奇异性和符号执行任务，固定视觉场景，变化区域约束和符号输出。包含耦合的计数和坐标动作任务，测试模型推断隐含多数参考并基于细粒度视觉证据行动的能力。使用九种近期多模态大模型评估，并辅以全局点击和匹配局部控制实验。
light_analysis.result: 九种MLLMs从计数到区域条件动作的性能下降高达44.5个百分点，人类达98.8%。差距在配对场景和区域中持续存在，即使模型计数正确。全局点击和匹配局部控制表明坐标定位仅解释部分损失，揭示从共享视觉证据到上下文特定动作的模型依赖瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: ROSE揭示了多模态大模型在感知-动作转换中的显著瓶颈，尤其当视觉证据需适应不同上下文时。研究强调了当前模型在推理和 grounding 上的不足，为未来改进方向提供基准。潜在局限包括任务类型有限，未来可扩展至更复杂交互场景。

title: Low-Energy Reduced RISC-V Instruction Subset Processor for Tsetlin Machine Inference at the Edge
abstract: Tsetlin Machine (TM) is a logic-based machine learning approach that relies on simple bitwise operations and finite-state automata, which makes it attractive for edge AI deployments. Recent work has focused on co-processor and accelerator designs based on Tsetlin Machines (TMs). Although these designs achieve high performance, they typically depend on tightly coupled interfaces, microcode-style programming, and external host processors, limiting flexibility and ease of programming. In this work, we present a domain-specific RISC-V microprocessor architecture and design flow tailored for TM inference. Leveraging the modular structure of RISC-V, we design a reduced instruction subset processor that retains programmability while targeting improved performance and lower energy consumption for TM workloads. Instruction profiling is employed to guide instruction reduction, followed by datapath and control path simplifications tailored to TM inference. Both the baseline RV32IM core and the proposed reduced core are evaluated across multiple datasets and compared with Binarized Neural Networks (BNNs), which serve as a hardware-efficient baseline due to their reliance on bitwise operations during inference. Results show that TM achieves comparable or higher accuracy (e.g., up to 88.18% on CIFAR-2 compared to 60.0% for BNN) while reducing execution time by up to 98% across multiple datasets. Furthermore, the proposed design achieves an average $29.7\times$ reduction in energy consumption, demonstrating its effectiveness for programmable and efficient edge AI systems.
comment: 6 pages, 6 Figures, Accepted in IEEE ISVLSI Conference 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种针对Tsetlin Machine推理的领域专用RISC-V处理器，通过指令子集缩减和硬件优化实现低能耗与高性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Tsetlin Machine协处理器依赖紧耦合接口和外部主机，缺乏灵活性和可编程性，难以适应边缘AI部署。本研究利用RISC-V模块化结构，设计可编程且高效的TM推理处理器，旨在解决边缘设备中能效与性能的平衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于RV32IM基线核心，采用指令分析精简指令子集，简化数据通路和控制逻辑。保留程序灵活性，并在多个数据集上评估。与二值神经网络（BNN）对比，凸显TM在比特运算上的硬件效率。
light_analysis.result: TM在CIFAR-2上准确率达88.18%（BNN为60.0%），执行时间最多减少98%，能量消耗平均降低29.7倍。表明该处理器在可编程性和能效方面优势显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了TM在边缘AI中的潜力，并通过设计的处理器实现了高能效与可编程性。适用于资源受限设备，未来可探索指令集进一步优化或扩展至更复杂任务。

title: Addressing Detail Bottlenecks in Latent Diffusion for RGB-to-SWIR Image Translation
abstract: Latent diffusion models (LDMs) enable efficient image-to-image translation but discard fine spatial details during compression, degrading downstream perception tasks. We identify two bottlenecks: the autoencoder, which loses spatial information, and the conditioning pathway, which further degrades the source signal through naive downsampling. We propose two lightweight, backbone-agnostic fixes: a Source-Conditioned Autoencoder (SCAE) that injects high-resolution source features into the decoder via skip connections, and a Learnable Guidance Encoder (LGE) that replaces naive downsampling with a learned conditioning signal. Evaluated on RGB-to-SWIR translation for driving scenes with two denoiser backbones (U-Net and DiT), our approach improves detection mAP by up to 2x over the latent diffusion baseline, with up to 3.4x gains on small objects (COCO-small, <32^2 px^2), while achieving state-of-the-art FID. We further show that FID and detection performance are poorly correlated, motivating multi-axis evaluation. Results generalise zero-shot to the public RASMD benchmark. We will publicly release test data with annotations, all checkpoints, and training code.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种轻量级、骨干无关的方法（SCAE和LGE），修复潜扩散模型在RGB-to-SWIR翻译中的细节瓶颈，显著提升下游检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜扩散模型在压缩过程中丢失精细空间细节，导致RGB-to-SWIR翻译后的图像在下游感知任务（如目标检测）中性能下降。现有方法在自动编码器和条件路径中存在两个瓶颈：自动编码器损失空间信息，条件路径通过朴素下采样进一步退化源信号。这些瓶颈限制了生成图像的质量和实用性，亟需有效的修复方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出两个模块：源条件自动编码器（SCAE），通过跳跃连接将高分辨率源特征注入解码器，保留空间细节；可学习引导编码器（LGE），用学习到的条件信号替代朴素下采样，增强条件路径。方法与骨干网络无关，分别基于U-Net和DiT去噪器在驾驶场景RGB-to-SWIR翻译任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在检测mAP上相比潜扩散基线提升最高2倍，小目标（COCO-small, <32²像素）提升达3.4倍；FID达到最优。实验发现FID与检测性能弱相关，强调多轴评估。零样本泛化到公共RASMD基准，展示了良好泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过两种轻量级、骨干无关的改进，有效解决了潜扩散模型在RGB-to-SWIR翻译中的细节瓶颈，显著提升了生成图像在下游感知任务中的性能。方法简单易集成，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至其他跨模态翻译任务，但需进一步验证在更广泛场景下的有效性。

title: SketchKeyAnime: Reference-anchored Sparse Key-Sketch Animation Synthesis
abstract: Traditional animation production relies heavily on manual drawing and iterative refinement, particularly for key-pose design, in-betweening, and character coloring. While existing animation and video generation methods have made notable progress, they typically depend on RGB boundary frames, dense frame-wise conditions, or complete sketch sequences, limiting their applicability under low-cost input conditions. We present SketchKeyAnime, a video diffusion framework for generating structurally controllable, appearance-consistent, and temporally coherent animations from sparse key-sketch inputs. Given a single reference RGB image and a few temporally indexed key sketches, SketchKeyAnime introduces a dual-branch conditioning mechanism to encode local geometric constraints alongside semantic-temporal context. It leverages Sketch Cross Attention to fuse reference image and sketch conditions with learnable gating, and incorporates an Adaptive Weighted Loss to strengthen supervision on key-sketch frames and line-art regions. Experimental results on the Aesthetic subset of Sakuga-42M show that our approach consistently outperforms representative animation interpolation and sketch-guided generation baselines. Compared to the best-performing baseline, SketchKeyAnime reduces EDMD by 31.9\% and FVD by 9.5\%, demonstrating superior sketch fidelity and temporal coherence, while achieving the best overall performance across most quantitative metrics. These results validate the proposed framework and highlight its potential for low-cost, highly controllable animation creation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SketchKeyAnime，一种基于视频扩散的稀疏关键草图动画合成框架，实现结构可控、外观一致和时间连贯的动画生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统动画生产依赖大量手工绘制和迭代，尤其是关键姿势设计、中间帧和角色着色。现有动画和视频生成方法通常依赖RGB边界帧、密集帧条件或完整草图序列，限制了在低成本输入条件下的适用性。因此，需要一种能从稀疏关键草图输入生成高质量动画的方法。
light_analysis.method: SketchKeyAnime采用双分支条件机制，编码局部几何约束和语义-时间上下文。通过草图交叉注意力融合参考图像和草图条件，并引入可学习门控。此外，使用自适应加权损失加强对关键草图帧和线条区域的监督。整体框架基于视频扩散模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Sakuga-42M数据集的Aesthetic子集上，SketchKeyAnime在多项指标上优于代表性的动画插值和草图引导生成基线。与最佳基线相比，EDMD降低31.9%，FVD降低9.5%，在草图保真度和时间连贯性方面表现最佳，总体性能最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: SketchKeyAnime验证了从稀疏关键草图生成高质量动画的可行性，具有低成本、高可控性的特点。未来可用于降低动画制作门槛，加速创作流程。局限性可能包括对参考图像质量的依赖，以及需要进一步扩展到更复杂的场景。

title: Towards Graph-Based Deep Learning for Map Generalization: Insights from Building Footprints Simplification and Aggregation
abstract: Map generalization remains one of the fundamental tasks in cartography, especially for the simplification and aggregation of complex building footprints. This study presents the first exploratory application of graph-based deep learning to both tasks, reformulating simplification as node movement prediction and aggregation as link prediction within a unified graph learning framework. We evaluate representative graph neural network architectures (GCN, GAT, and GraphSAGE) on multi-scale building datasets, showing that GraphSAGE demonstrates relative strengths in link prediction accuracy, while also revealing persistent challenges in precise node movement prediction. Beyond quantitative performance, the results highlight that aggregation poses greater complexity and challenges than simplification, underscoring the difficulty of capturing higher-level spatial relationships in map generalization with current deep learning approaches. Although limitations such as data imbalance and the need for post-processing remain, the study provides valuable insights and methodological directions for advancing automated map generalization with deep learning approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 首次探索图深度学习在地图综合中的应用，提出统一框架处理建筑足迹简化和聚合。
light_analysis.motivation: 地图综合是制图学基础任务，尤其涉及复杂建筑足迹的简化和聚合。现有方法难以有效捕获高阶空间关系，亟需新的深度学习技术。本研究首次将图深度学习应用于这两项任务，旨在探索图神经网络的潜力。
light_analysis.method: 将建筑足迹简化重构为节点移动预测，聚合重构为链路预测，在统一图学习框架下进行评估。使用GCN、GAT和GraphSAGE三种代表性架构，在多尺度建筑数据集上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: GraphSAGE在链路预测准确率上表现相对优越，但节点移动预测仍存在挑战。聚合任务比简化更复杂，揭示了当前深度学习方法在捕获高阶空间关系方面的困难。
light_analysis.conclusion: 尽管存在数据不平衡和后处理需求等局限，本研究为自动化地图综合提供了有价值的见解和方法方向，推动了深度学习在该领域的应用。

title: Confidence Calibration for Multimodal LLMs: An Empirical Study through Medical VQA
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show great potential in medical tasks, but their elicited confidence often misaligns with actual accuracy, potentially leading to misdiagnosis or overlooking correct advice. This study presents the first comprehensive analysis of the relationship between accuracy and confidence in medical MLLMs. It proposes a novel method that combines Multi-Strategy Fusion-Based Interrogation (MS-FBI) with auxiliary expert LLM assessment, aiming to improve confidence calibration in Medical Visual Question Answering (VQA). Experiments demonstrate that our method reduces the Expected Calibration Error (ECE) by an average of 40\% across three Medical VQA datasets, significantly enhancing MLLMs' reliability. The findings highlight the importance of domain-specific calibration for MLLMs in healthcare, offering a more trustworthy solution for AI-assisted diagnosis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合多策略融合询问与专家评估的置信度校准方法，在医疗VQA中平均降低ECE 40%。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在医疗辅助诊断中展现出巨大潜力，但其输出的置信度往往与实际准确性不一致，可能误导医生决策或低估正确建议。现有方法缺乏针对医疗领域置信度校准的专门研究，尤其是在视觉问答场景下。因此，研究医疗MLLMs的置信度校准问题对于提升AI辅助诊断的可靠性和安全性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种新颖的置信度校准方法，由两部分组成：多策略融合询问（MS-FBI）和辅助专家LLM评估。MS-FBI通过多种询问策略从MLLMs获取置信度表达，辅助专家LLM则对MLLM的回答进行额外评估以校准置信度。该方法专门针对医疗视觉问答任务设计，并在三个医疗VQA数据集上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在三个医疗VQA数据集上的实验表明，该方法将期望校准误差（ECE）平均降低了40%，显著增强了MLLMs的置信度校准性能。与基线方法相比，该方法的校准效果提升明显，表明其能有效缓解置信度与准确率之间的错配问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次系统性分析了医疗MLLMs的置信度校准问题，提出的方法有效提升了模型在医疗VQA任务中的可靠性。该工作强调了领域特定校准的重要性，为AI辅助诊断提供更可信的解决方案。未来可探索将校准方法扩展到其他医疗多模态任务，并进一步优化校准效率。

title: Advancing DialNav through Automatic Embodied Dialog Augmentation
abstract: For embodied agents capable of physical interaction, the capability to create and understand dialog is crucial to ensure both safety and effectiveness. While DialNav~\cite{han2025dialnav} provides a framework for holistic evaluation of the dialog--execution loop in photorealistic indoor navigation, its performance remains limited by a critical scarcity of training data (2K episodes). To address this, we propose an automatic generation pipeline, and construct the \textbf{RAINbow} dataset, a large-scale training dataset with 238K episodes for DialNav. Our pipeline converts existing VLN datasets into multi-turn dialog and creates cost-efficient and high-quality dataset. Then, we introduce two additional complementary advances to unlock the data's full potential: (1) Dual-Strategy Training, a navigation training scheme to align the navigation training with the dynamic dialog-navigation loop, and (2) a localization model that leverages VLN knowledge. By combining these complementary solutions, our model substantially outperforms the baseline in success rate on both \textbf{Val Seen} (58.24, \textbf{+89\%}) and \textbf{Val Unseen} (29.05, \textbf{+100\%}) splits, establishing a new state of the art.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自动生成训练数据的管道构建大规模RAINbow数据集，并引入双策略训练和定位模型，显著提升DialNav导航成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: DialNav框架为评估具身代理的对话-执行循环提供了平台，但其性能受限于训练数据严重不足（仅2K episodes）。现有方法无法有效利用已有的VLN数据集，且缺乏针对动态对话-导航循环的训练策略，导致导航成功率低。
light_analysis.method: 提出自动生成管道，将现有VLN数据集转换为多轮对话，构建238K episodes的RAINbow数据集。引入双策略训练方案，对齐导航训练与动态对话-导航循环；并基于VLN知识设计定位模型，弥补数据不足并提升导航决策能力。
light_analysis.result: 在Val Seen上成功率58.24（+89%），Val Unseen上29.05（+100%），显著超越基线，达到新最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过自动数据增强和双策略训练、定位模型的结合，有效解决了DialNav数据稀缺问题，大幅提升导航性能，为具身代理的对话-导航研究提供了大规模数据集和有效技术方案。

title: GEMS: Geometric Constraints Enable Multi-Semantic Superposition in LLMs
abstract: Activation steering controls model behavior by modifying intermediate hidden states at inference time without retraining. Existing methods handle only single-direction injection; when multiple semantic directions are superposed without constraints, the model collapses. We show that this collapse decomposes into two independently acting sources: distributional deviation, where additive perturbations accumulate in norm across layers and drive activations outside the training distribution, and directional interference, where non-orthogonal semantic vectors mutually dampen when superposed. These two sources define the design constraints that any training-free multi-directional intervention must address. As one instantiation of these principles, we propose GEMS, a training-free method that maps each source to a corresponding geometric constraint: norm-preserving weighted superposition and targeted attention-pathway injection for distributional deviation, and real-time orthogonalization for directional interference. On GSM8K, injecting three concurrent non-mathematical directions preserves accuracy at 98% (baseline 92%), while unconstrained addition collapses to 4%; on Wikitext-2, the same injection incurs only 2.2% PPL increase. Component ablation isolates the causal role of each constraint, and layer-level probes confirm that orthogonalized signals survive the FFN pathway and reach the output distribution with semantic specificity. Qualitative steering effects transfer across architectures from 3B to 31B.
comment: 30 pages, 5 figures, 20 tables. Code and logs are available at: https://github.com/LuLu663939/gems-multi-semantic-steering

light_analysis.overview: 提出GEMS方法，通过几何约束无需训练实现多语义方向叠加，解决LLM激活引导中多方向叠加导致的模型崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有激活引导方法仅处理单方向注入，当多个语义方向无约束叠加时，模型会崩溃。研究发现崩溃由两个独立来源导致：分布偏差（加法扰动在层间累积范数，驱动激活脱离训练分布）和方向干扰（非正交语义向量相互抑制）。这两个来源定义了无训练多方向干预必须满足的设计约束。
light_analysis.method: GEMS是无需训练的方法，针对两个崩溃来源分别施加几何约束：分布偏差通过范数保持加权叠加和定向注意力路径注入解决，方向干扰通过实时正交化解决。在GSM8K和Wikitext-2上验证，跨架构（3B-31B）迁移有效。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K上，注入三个非数学方向时，GEMS保持98%准确率（基线92%），而无约束叠加降至4%。Wikitext-2上，相同注入仅导致PPL增加2.2%。组件消融实验验证了每个约束的因果作用，层探针显示正交化信号能通过FFN路径并保留语义特异性到达输出分布。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEMS通过几何约束实现了无需训练的多语义方向叠加，揭示了模型崩溃的机制并提供了有效解决方案。学术价值在于为激活引导提供了新理论视角，实际应用可增强LLM的可控性与多任务能力。未来可探索更多几何约束或动态适应更复杂的干预需求。

title: Timage: A Generative Text-in-Image Paradigm for Fine-Tuning Vision-Language Models
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) often lose track of the right image regions during fine-grained spatial reasoning, because a textual query rarely carries any explicit geometric anchor into the pixel domain. Prevailing remedies either rewire the model's weights or pad the prompt with verbose instructions, yet neither reliably pins the language to the correct visual coordinates without eroding the backbone's general competence. We introduce Timage, a paradigm that recasts multimodal understanding as an alignment problem solved at the input: the query is drawn, as a typeset overlay, onto the image itself. The placement and appearance of this overlay are produced by a Constrained Schrödinger Bridge (cSB), an entropic optimal-transport sampler that factorizes layout synthesis into two coupled stochastic stages. The first stage, Region Search, transports noise toward query-aligned image zones while obeying a hard occlusion barrier that protects salient foreground content; the second stage, Appearance Shaping, sizes the glyphs through an ``ink-budget'' regularizer so that the rendered text stays legible and visually balanced. The resulting overlay behaves as an explicit attention beacon that channels the model's focus along spatial semantics. On the VMCBench suite, Timage paired with a modest 7B backbone clearly overtakes far larger proprietary systems as well as parameter-tuned baselines. The study positions deliberate input reconstruction as a powerful, architecture-neutral lever for strengthening multimodal reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Timage范式，通过将文本查询绘制到图像上作为显式注意力信标，解决MLLM细粒度空间推理中的区域定位问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在细粒度空间推理中常丢失正确图像区域，因为文本查询缺乏几何锚点。现有方法通过调整权重或填充指令来改善，但会侵蚀模型通用能力且不可靠。需要一种能精确对齐语言与视觉坐标的方法，同时保持模型原有性能。
light_analysis.method: Timage将查询作为排版覆盖绘制到图像上，覆盖点由约束薛定谔桥生成，分为两阶段：区域搜索阶段通过硬遮挡屏障保护前景内容，将噪声推向查询对齐区域；外观塑造阶段通过墨水预算正则化控制字型大小，确保文本可读和视觉平衡。覆盖层作为注意力信标引导模型沿空间语义聚焦。
light_analysis.result: 在VMCBench上，Timage搭配7B骨干模型超越大型专有系统和参数调优基线。具体性能提升摘要未明确数值，但声称清晰胜过更大规模和经过微调的模型，证明了输入重建策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Timage提出通过输入重建（将文本绘制到图像上）来增强多模态推理，是一种架构中立的方法，不修改模型权重即可提升空间推理能力。未来可探索更复杂的覆盖生成方式或应用于其他视觉任务。局限性可能是需要生成高质量的覆盖图，增加计算开销。

title: Compositionality Emerges in a Narrow Depth-Connectivity Regime: Architecture Constraints and Solution Manifolds
abstract: Compositionality is believed to be the foundation for generalization, enabling models to reuse meaningful primitives in novel combinations. Yet, models trained with standard gradient-based optimization rarely, and often only weakly, exhibit compositional internal structure, and it remains unclear how or why such compositionality forms. In this work, we show that compositionality emerges in a narrow connectivity-depth sweet spot. Along the connectivity axis, compositionality only appears in some specifically sparse networks, heavily depends on which connections remain rather than on weights' sparsity alone. Along the depth axis, compositionality emerges within a narrow, target-dependent regime, peaking at specific depths, while both shallower and deeper networks fail. When either the depth or connectivity condition is violated, gradient descent silently converges to fractured solutions rather than compositional ones. To discover and exploit this emergence, we introduce (i) similarity-based pruning (SP) to recover compositional connectivity and (ii) a heuristic depth predictor to estimate where compositionality is most likely to appear. Finally, we support these empirical findings with a theoretical framework based on compositional sparsity, volume-ratio arguments, and feature-interference bounds, explaining why compositional solutions are reachable only in a narrow depth-connectivity regime.

light_analysis.overview: 发现组合性仅在特定的窄深度-连接性区间涌现，并据此提出剪枝和深度预测方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合性被视为泛化的基础，但标准梯度训练很少产生组合性内部结构。现有研究不清楚组合性如何形成，缺乏对其涌现条件的系统理解。论文旨在揭示组合性涌现所需的网络架构条件，解释为何大部分网络无法形成组合性表征。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制网络深度和连接性两个维度，发现组合性在特定的窄区间涌现。引入相似性剪枝（SP）恢复组合性连接，并设计启发式深度预测器估计最佳深度。理论框架基于组合稀疏性、体积比论证和特征干扰界限，解释解的可达性条件。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，组合性仅在特定稀疏连接和特定深度下出现，偏离该区间则模型收敛至破碎解。相似性剪枝有效恢复组合性连接，深度预测器可准确估计组合性涌现的深度。理论推导与实验一致，验证了窄深度-连接性区间的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了组合性涌现的关键架构条件，为设计具备组合泛化能力的网络提供指导。方法可推广至其他任务。未来可探索更广泛的网络结构及动态剪枝策略。

title: DiffMath: Symbol- and Graph-Aware Latent Diffusion Transformer for Handwritten Mathematical Expression Generation
abstract: Handwritten Mathematical Expression Generation (HMEG) is challenging due to the complex two-dimensional layouts and long-range structural dependencies of mathematical expressions. Existing methods typically rely on explicit spatial supervision, such as symbol-level bounding boxes, which incurs high annotation costs and limits scalability. In this work, we propose DiffMath, a symbol- and graph-aware latent diffusion framework that leverages the hierarchical structure inherent in LaTeX as a structural prior, eliminating the need for positional supervision. First, we design a Relational Abstract Syntax Tree (RelAST), a generation-oriented representation that distills MathML trees into compact triplet sequences [S, R, D], where each token directly encodes a symbol identity, spatial relation, or nesting depth. Second, we introduce MathVAE, which learns structure-preserving latent representations through symbol-aware and relation-aware perceptual regularization, ensuring that the latent space captures both character semantics and spatial topology. Third, MathDiT performs conditional denoising in this structured latent space, further guided by a global symbol-count prior via Adaptive Layer Normalization (AdaLN) to improve structural coherence. Experiments show that DiffMath produces structurally consistent handwritten expressions, achieves superior performance over existing methods, and improves the accuracy of downstream OCR models through synthetic data augmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffMath，一种符号和图感知的潜在扩散变换器，利用LaTeX层次结构作为先验，无需显式位置监督即可生成结构一致的手写数学表达式。
light_analysis.motivation: 手写数学表达式生成(HMEG)因复杂二维布局和长程结构依赖而充满挑战。现有方法依赖符号级边界框等显式空间监督，标注成本高且可扩展性受限。为解决该问题，论文提出利用LaTeX固有的层次结构作为结构先验，消除对位置监督的需求。
light_analysis.method: 首先设计RelAST，一种面向生成的表示，将MathML树蒸馏为紧凑的三元组序列[S,R,D]，编码符号、空间关系和嵌套深度。其次提出MathVAE，通过符号感知和关系感知感知正则化学习保持结构的潜在表示。最后，MathDiT在此结构化潜在空间中进行条件去噪，并通过自适应层归一化(AdaLN)引入全局符号计数先验以增强结构一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DiffMath生成的结构一致的手写表达式在质量上优于现有方法。通过合成数据增强，显著提升了下游OCR模型的识别准确率，具体数据摘要未明确说明，但指出性能优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffMath通过探索LaTeX结构先验，无需显式位置监督即可生成高质量手写数学表达式，具有学术创新价值和应用潜力，可降低标注成本并提升下游任务性能。未来可探索更复杂的结构表示或扩展至其他序列生成任务。

title: Triangular Consistency as a Universal Constraint for Learning Optical Flow
abstract: We propose triangular consistency as a first-principled constraint for optical flow, which is agnostic to network architecture, supervision type, and dataset, and applies to both image-pair and multi-frame settings. This simple but powerful constraint is to compose two flows to induce a third flow and enforce consistency among the three. The composed flows may arise from (i) image pairs, yielding cycle consistency; (ii) multiple video frames, producing longer-range motion through temporal chaining; or (iii) image pairs combined with controlled synthetic transformations, which becomes data augmentation. This triangular consistency introduces negligible computational overhead and requires no additional annotations. Since it is derived directly from the geometry of optical flow, it does not rely on model-specific assumptions and serves as a ``universal'' plug-and-play component for optical flow training. Experiments show consistent improvement across supervised, unsupervised, and transfer learning settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出三角一致性作为光流学习的通用约束，可即插即用，适用于多种训练范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有光流方法通常依赖特定网络架构或监督信号，缺乏普适性约束，难以在不同设置下统一提升性能。三角一致性直接从光流几何性质推导，不依赖模型假设，可作为通用组件解决这一局限。
light_analysis.method: 通过组合两个光流场推导第三个流场并强制三者一致。组合来源包括：图像对（循环一致性）、多帧时序链接（长程运动）、图像对与合成变换结合（数据增强）。计算开销小，无需额外标注。
light_analysis.result: 在监督、无监督和迁移学习三种训练设置下均取得一致性能提升，验证了其作为通用约束的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 三角一致性是一种简单有效的通用约束，可嵌入任意光流训练流程，提升多种方法的效果。未来可探索其在更多视觉任务中的应用。

title: PhysDrift: Bridging the Embodiment Gap in Humanoid Co-Speech Motion Generation
abstract: Humanoid robots require co-speech motions that are not only expressive and speech-aligned, but also physically executable under embodiment constraints. Existing co-speech generation pipelines are predominantly human-centric: motions are first generated in human-body representations such as SMPL-X and subsequently retargeted to humanoid robots. In this work, we identify a fundamental embodiment gap in this paradigm, where the mismatch between human motion manifolds and humanoid embodiment constraints disrupts embodiment consistency during motion transfer and physical execution. Through extensive analysis, we show that although retargeting can preserve coarse motion semantics, it significantly compresses motion diversity and weakens prosody-motion synchronization, limiting expressive humanoid behaviors. To address this problem, we first propose IK-EER, a prosody-preserving humanoid motion curation framework that jointly optimizes kinematic feasibility and speech-motion temporal alignment during retargeting. Building upon the curated robot-native motion dataset, we further introduce PhysDrift, an embodiment-aware co-speech motion generation framework that directly predicts executable humanoid joint trajectories from speech without relying on intermediate human-body representations. Unlike conventional human-centric pipelines, PhysDrift maintains embodiment consistency throughout both training and inference while incorporating physical regularization to stabilize robot motion dynamics. Extensive experiments and real-world humanoid deployment demonstrate that embodiment-aware robot-native generation substantially improves speech-motion alignment, physical plausibility, motion smoothness, inference efficiency, and real-time interaction capability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhysDrift框架，通过直接预测人形机器人关节轨迹，解决了人体运动到机器人重定向中的具身差异问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有共语运动生成方法多基于人体表征（如SMPL-X）生成运动，再重定向到人形机器人。但人体运动流形与机器人约束存在根本性差异，导致重定向后运动多样性下降、韵律同步性减弱，阻碍了机器人表达性。需要一种具身感知的生成方法，直接输出可执行的机器人运动。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出IK-EER，一个保留韵律的人形机器人运动策划框架，联合优化运动学可行性和语音-运动时间对齐。基于策划的机器人原生数据集，引入PhysDrift框架，直接预测可执行的人形机器人关节轨迹，避免中间人体表征。在训练和推理中保持具身一致性，并通过物理正则化稳定运动动力学。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PhysDrift显著提升了语音-运动对齐、物理合理性、运动平滑性、推理效率和实时交互能力。真实人形机器人部署验证了方法的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但定性描述优于传统重定向方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhysDrift通过具身感知的机器人原生生成，有效弥合了人体与机器人之间的具身差距，提升了人形机器人的表达性和物理可行性。未来可扩展至更多机器人形态，并探索更复杂的运动控制。

title: Speeding up the annotation process in semantic segmentation industrial applications
abstract: Current machine learning models commonly require large and well-annotated datasets. However, the annotation process often becomes a bottleneck, with increased complexity leading to higher chances of human errors. Within this context, our goal in this paper is to leverage unsupervised algorithms to improve data annotation efficiency for complex semantic segmentation problems in industrial materials science. Previous research has quantified labeling time and others explored unsupervised methods. However, to the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to quantify how much unsupervised algorithms accelerate the labeling process. We aim to validate the extent to which this laborious process can be accelerated, focusing on semantic segmentation tasks that involve annotating each pixel of high-resolution images, such as the microstructure characterization challenge in materials science. Specifically, we demonstrate that by using unsupervised computer vision algorithms, the time required for the labeling process can be reduced from 170 hours to 37 hours, achieving an approximate reduction of 78\%. The dataset we work with includes large images of dimensions 1280x959 and 960x703, which further increases the complexity of the annotation task. Despite these challenges, we create and share the largest public steel microstructure segmentation dataset to date, available under MIT License with permanent DOI, contributing a fully annotated, high-resolution dataset to the field. Additionally, this is the first work to compare the labeling time from scratch (a common approach in previous studies) to the labeling time when using these unsupervised algorithms as a pre-annotation step. Furthermore, we provide a Deep Learning model trained on this dataset, validated by field experts, and deployed in an industrial setting, serving as an initial benchmark for this public dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 量化无监督算法将工业语义分割标注时间从170小时减少至37小时（降幅78%），并创建最大公开钢微观结构分割数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习依赖大规模高质量标注数据，但语义分割标注过程复杂耗时，尤其在材料科学中高分辨率图像像素级标注易出错。以往研究虽量化标注时间或探索无监督方法，却未量化加速程度。本研究旨在解决该空白，验证无监督算法能否显著提升标注效率。
light_analysis.method: 采用无监督计算机视觉算法作为预标注步骤，与从头标注对比。使用尺寸为1280x959和960x703的高分辨率图像。创建并公开最大钢微观结构分割数据集（MIT许可），包含全像素标注。同时训练深度学习模型作为基准，由领域专家验证并部署于工业环境。
light_analysis.result: 使用无监督算法预标注后，总标注时间从170小时压缩至37小时，减少78%。该结果表明预标注策略大幅提升效率。所提供深度学习模型在工业部署中表现有效，为后续研究建立初始基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证实无监督算法能显著加速工业语义分割标注，大幅降低成本与人力。公开的钢微观结构数据集和基准模型将推动材料科学领域研究。未来可探索其他无监督或半监督方法进一步优化。

title: Spatial-Aware Reduction Framework: Towards Efficient and Faithful Visual State Space Models
abstract: Mamba demonstrates strong efficiency in modeling long visual sequences. However, when token reduction is applied to structurally enhanced Mamba variants, these models exhibit a severe performance collapse. We attribute this degradation to the spatially agnostic nature of existing reduction methods, which violate the two-dimensional structural premise required by the selective scanning mechanism. In this work, we propose STORM, a spatial-aware token reduction framework designed to maintain structural integrity throughout the compression process. STORM reformulates reduction into a structured operation on spatial units, enforcing localized constraints to maintain both grid topology and neighborhood coherence. As a plug-and-play module, STORM equips existing reduction pipelines with explicit spatial awareness without any training. Empirical results demonstrate that STORM achieves state-of-the-art pruning accuracy across diverse vision Mamba backbones under training-free settings. Notably, STORM delivers a substantial accuracy recovery on VMamba, outperforming prior methods by up to 63.3\% in top-1 accuracy. Meanwhile, STORM incurs only a 1.0\% accuracy drop on PlainMamba, achieving performance comparable to ViT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STORM框架，通过空间感知的token缩减保持结构完整性，实现高效的视觉状态空间模型。
light_analysis.motivation: Mamba在长视觉序列建模中效率高，但现有token缩减方法应用于结构增强的Mamba变体时导致严重性能崩溃。原因是这些缩减方法缺乏空间感知，破坏了选择性扫描机制所需的二维结构前提。该问题阻碍了Mamba在视觉任务中的实际应用，需要一种保持结构完整性的缩减方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出STORM，一种空间感知的token缩减框架。它将缩减重构成对空间单元的结构化操作，施加局部约束以保持网格拓扑和邻域连贯性。作为即插即用模块，STORM无需训练即可为现有缩减管道赋予显式空间感知能力。
light_analysis.result: 在训练-free设置下，STORM在多种视觉Mamba骨干上实现最先进的剪枝精度。在VMamba上，性能提升显著，top-1准确率恢复高达63.3%；在PlainMamba上，仅下降1.0%准确率，性能与ViT相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: STORM有效解决了Mamba中token缩减的结构完整性丢失问题，实现高效且保真的视觉状态空间模型。无需训练即可提升性能，具有实用价值。未来可探索扩展至其他结构敏感模型。

title: CARE: Competence-Aware Reward Shaping for Adaptive Reasoning Length in Video-MLLMs
abstract: In multimodal video reasoning, reinforcement learning-based methods typically rely on simplistic and inflexible reasoning-length control strategies that fail to adapt to the model's evolving competence. This mismatch may suppress necessary exploration at early stages, while encouraging redundant reasoning and inefficient decoding once the model becomes more competent. In this paper, we propose CARE, a competence-aware reward shaping framework for adaptive reasoning length optimization in multimodal reasoning. Specifically, CARE maintains a smoothed competence estimate via an exponential moving average of pass rates, and uses it to route training into progressive stages that shift the reward preference from exploration-oriented long-form reasoning to efficiency-oriented concise reasoning. To avoid conflating verbosity with intrinsic task complexity, CARE further normalizes reasoning effort with batch-level statistics, and introduces a posterior amplifier to strengthen reward signals for unexpectedly strong performance on historically difficult samples. The proposed mechanism is seamlessly integrated into the GRPO training pipeline and incurs no additional inference-time overhead. Extensive experiments on multiple video reasoning and general video understanding benchmarks demonstrate that CARE consistently improves reasoning accuracy, stabilizes reinforcement learning, and significantly enhances token efficiency. Moreover, CARE exhibits a characteristic inverted-U trajectory of reasoning length during training, and yields shorter yet more informative reasoning traces at convergence, indicating effective adaptive allocation of reasoning budget. We provide the source code for our proposed CARE framework and experiments at https://github.com/1Pansy/Video-CARE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CARE框架，通过能力感知奖励塑形实现视频多模态推理的自适应推理长度优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的多模态视频推理方法采用固定且单一的推理长度控制策略，无法适应模型能力动态变化，导致早期抑制必要探索、后期产生冗余推理和低效解码。这种不匹配限制了模型性能提升和token效率。
light_analysis.method: CARE利用指数移动平均通过率维护平滑能力估计，并据此将训练分为渐进阶段，从探索性长推理转向高效精简推理。通过批级统计归一化推理努力，引入后验放大器增强历史困难样本的奖励信号。无缝集成到GRPO训练流程，无额外推理开销。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视频推理和理解基准上，CARE一致提升推理准确性，稳定强化学习训练，并显著提高token效率。训练中呈现倒U型推理长度轨迹，收敛时生成更短且信息更丰富的推理序列，表明有效自适应分配推理预算。
light_analysis.conclusion: CARE通过能力感知奖励塑形实现了推理长度的自适应优化，平衡了探索与效率。该方法提升了多模态推理性能，具有实际应用价值。开源代码促进后续研究，未来可探索更细粒度的能力估计或跨任务迁移。

title: The Tao of Agency: Autotelic AI, Embedded Agency and Dissolution of the Self
abstract: Most artificial intelligence systems are built on the assumption that goals are exogenous and specified by the designer. Exploring what happens when an agent begins generating its own goals opens the field of autotelic AI. Agents are expected not merely to pursue objectives but to discover them. In this article, we trace its consequences through intrinsic motivation, resource-driven priors, causal-interventional learning, homeostasis, and embeddedness; the last of which is found to be a necessary but not sufficient condition for autotelic agency. Embeddedness individuates the agent at the cost of revealing that the individuation is non-unique, such that the same dynamics admit many valid partitions, each defining a different candidate self.   The deepest problem with autotelic AI is therefore not how the agent generates goals, but how it generates and relativizes the self to which the goals are assigned. The agent must believe in its own boundary in order to act, and see through that boundary in order to understand. We consolidate these developments into a single framework and extend it along three directions: a quantum formulation in which the agent-environment cut becomes physical, a philosophical reading against non-dual contemplative traditions, and a concrete LLM-based agentic instantiation.

light_analysis.overview: 将自生主题AI与嵌入式代理结合，提出自我非唯一分割的量子公式和LLM实例化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI系统默认目标由设计者外生指定，忽略了代理自主发现目标的潜力。自生主题AI研究代理内生目标生成，但面临核心问题：代理如何生成并相对化其自我边界？嵌入性虽是个体化的必要条件，却导致分割非唯一，使得同一动力学可定义多个有效自我。这一矛盾阻碍了代理的自主性与理解力统一，急需新的框架来整合哲学、物理学与具体实现。
light_analysis.method: 首先梳理自生主题AI的关键维度：内在动机、资源驱动先验、因果干预学习、稳态与嵌入性。指出嵌入性个体化代理但暴露自我非唯一性。将上述发展整合为单一框架，并沿三个方向扩展：1）量子公式化，将代理-环境切割物理化；2）与非二元冥想传统的哲学对话；3）基于大型语言模型的具体代理实例化。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供定量实验结果。核心贡献是理论框架整合与三个扩展方向，特别是LLM实例化为未来实证研究奠定基础，但具体性能指标或对比基线未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文重新定义了自生主题AI的核心问题：不是如何生成目标，而是如何生成并相对化自我。通过跨学科框架（量子力学、哲学、LLM）为代理的自主性与边界认知提供了新视角。学术价值在于揭示自我非唯一性的深刻含义；实际应用上，LLM实例化可推动更自主的AI系统设计。未来需解决边界相对化后代理行动与理解如何统一。

title: eCNNTO: A Highly Generalizable ConvNet for Accelerating Topology Optimization
abstract: This work proposes an element-based Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to accelerate density-based Topology Optimization (TO), termed eCNNTO. TO generally undergoes a large number of iterations, where finite element analysis is performed in every iteration, leading to the efficiency bottleneck especially when dense meshes are used to achieve high-resolution designs. To address this limitation, eCNNTO is proposed to build upon Kallioras et al. (2020), where a Deep Belief Network (DBN) was trained for every element to predict its near-optimal density from its early history, thereby skipping the great majority of iterations and significantly accelerating the TO procedure. However, the method lacks spatial correlations among neighboring elements and may lead to disconnected features in the final structure. The proposed method employs CNN with residual connections to address this issue. On top of it, a novel training strategy is introduced to further enhance the optimization efficiency, where the training dataset consists of the final stage density histories rather than early ones. This change can also help reduce the required training data size. eCNNTO requires only a small dataset to train and yet it can be generalized to problems with largely different boundary conditions, loading cases, design domain geometries, mesh resolutions, as well as non-design domains. In the end, the generalization capabilities and efficiency of eCNNTO are demonstrated through a variety of examples in two and three dimensions, achieving up to 90% and 97% reduction of iterations, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 eCNNTO，一种基于元素的卷积神经网络，用于加速拓扑优化，具有强大的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 拓扑优化通常需要大量迭代，每次迭代进行有限元分析，在高分辨率网格下效率极低。现有基于深度置信网络的方法忽略了相邻元素的空间相关性，导致最终结构出现不连续特征。为解决此问题，需要一种能有效利用空间信息并加速迭代的方法。
light_analysis.method: eCNNTO 采用带有残差连接的卷积神经网络，为每个元素从其早期历史中预测近最优密度，从而跳过大部分迭代。同时提出新的训练策略：使用最终阶段密度历史而非早期历史，减少了所需训练数据量。网络仅需小数据集训练，即可泛化到不同边界条件、载荷、几何、网格分辨率及非设计域。
light_analysis.result: 在二维和三维示例中，eCNNTO 分别实现了高达 90% 和 97% 的迭代次数减少，验证了其在多种问题上的泛化能力和加速效率。相比于基线方法，显著提升了拓扑优化的计算效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: eCNNTO 通过 CNN 和残差连接解决了空间相关性缺失问题，新训练策略提高了数据效率。该方法可显著加速拓扑优化过程，并具有高度泛化性，适用于不同工程场景。未来可进一步探索更复杂的优化问题或扩展至其他物理场。

title: ADaPT: Token-Level Decoupling for Efficient Large Reasoning Models
abstract: Large reasoning models rely on long chain-of-thought to achieve strong performance, but applying such reasoning uniformly incurs high computational cost. Existing efficiency-oriented methods attempt to shorten or mix reasoning strategies, yet often degrade reasoning capability. We identify the root cause as sequence-level coupling between efficiency incentives and correctness optimization, which implicitly penalizes long but correct reasoning trajectories. To address this issue, we propose Adaptive Dual-Process Thinking (ADaPT), a token-level dual-process framework that explicitly decouples efficiency and correctness signals during training. ADaPT introduces a mode-selection token to control fast and slow reasoning, applying efficiency-related rewards exclusively to this token to avoid penalizing correct long reasoning while encouraging efficiency when appropriate. Moreover, ADaPT enables precise and continuous control over the efficiency-performance trade-off at inference time: by adjusting the generation probability of the mode-selection token, a single trained model can smoothly move along the efficiency-performance Pareto frontier. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ADaPT significantly reduces inference cost while maintaining strong reasoning performance across multiple benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ADaPT，一种token级解耦框架，通过模式选择token分离效率与正确性信号，实现高效推理且不牺牲性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大推理模型依赖长思维链导致计算成本高，现有效率优化方法因序列级耦合隐式惩罚正确长推理而降低能力。亟需一种解耦方法兼顾效率与正确性。
light_analysis.method: ADaPT采用token级双过程框架，引入模式选择token控制快慢推理，仅对该token施加效率奖励以避免惩罚正确长推理。推理时通过调整其生成概率，单个模型可沿效率-性能帕累托前沿平滑调节。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，ADaPT显著降低推理成本，同时保持强推理性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但实验证实了效率与性能的有效权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: ADaPT通过解耦效率与正确性信号，实现可调节的推理效率-性能平衡。学术上提出新训练范式，实际应用可大幅降低大模型推理成本。未来可探索更灵活的token控制机制。

title: SpatialSV: Internalizing Interpretable 3D Spatial Awareness in MLLMs via Task-Oriented Visual Supervision
abstract: Unlocking the spatial intelligence of multimodal large language model (MLLMs) is crucial for understanding and interacting with the 3D world. Prevailing approaches typically inject spatial priors via external tools, which impose significant inference overhead, or rely on latent feature distillation, which remains uninterpretable and lacks fine-grained geometric constraints. To address these issues, we propose SpatialSV, a framework designed to internalize robust 3D spatial awareness within MLLMs while simultaneously offering inherent interpretability. Deviating from passive feature imitation, SpatialSV employs task-oriented visual supervision, compelling the model to actively lift its 2D visual features into explicit 3D representations, including depth maps, camera poses, and point clouds. Crucially, this 2D-to-3D lifting process provides a transparent window into the model's representations: the resulting 3D reconstructions serve as an intuitive proxy for visualizing and diagnosing the quality of the model's intrinsic spatial knowledge. Extensive experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of SpatialSV in enhancing and interpreting MLLMs' spatial intelligence. Furthermore, the framework exhibits strong generalization in semi-supervised settings, validating its potential to leverage unlabeled visual data for scalable, interpretable spatial representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpatialSV框架，通过任务导向的视觉监督将3D空间意识内化到多模态大语言模型中，同时提供内在可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖外部工具注入空间先验，导致推理开销大；要么通过潜在特征蒸馏，缺乏可解释性和细粒度几何约束。因此需要一种无需外部工具、内化空间知识且可解释的方法。
light_analysis.method: SpatialSV采用任务导向的视觉监督，强迫模型将2D视觉特征主动提升为显式3D表示，包括深度图、相机位姿和点云。该2D到3D的提升过程为模型表征提供了透明窗口，生成的3D重构可作为可视化诊断模型内在空间知识质量的代理。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型和基准上的广泛实验证明了SpatialSV在增强和解释MLLMs空间智能方面的有效性。此外，框架在半监督设置中表现出强大的泛化能力，验证了其利用未标记视觉数据进行可扩展、可解释空间表示学习的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpatialSV成功内化了可解释的3D空间感知，避免了外部工具依赖，同时提供了直观的可视化手段。其半监督泛化能力为利用无标签数据扩展空间智能提供了新途径。未来可进一步优化3D表示质量和推理效率。

title: Multi-Agent Transactive Memory
abstract: The decentralized deployment of LLM agents with diverse capabilities across diverse tasks motivates infrastructure for knowledge sharing across heterogeneous agent populations. Just as search engines index human-generated artifacts to support human problem solving, retrieval systems can organize agent-generated artifacts for reuse across agent populations. We extend retrieval-augmented generation - which demonstrates the value of human-authored artifacts to individual agents - to retrieval of agent-generated artifacts supporting a population of agents. In particular, agent trajectories encode reusable procedural knowledge, yet these artifacts are typically discarded after a single use or retained only by the producing agent, forcing newly instantiated agents to repeatedly rediscover existing solutions. We propose Multi-Agent Transactive Memory (MATM), a framework for population-level storage and retrieval of agent-generated trajectories, where producer agents contribute trajectories to a shared repository and consumer agents retrieve them to improve task execution. We focus on interactive environments (ALFWorld and WebArena), where trajectories are long and encode especially rich procedural structure. Our experiments demonstrate that retrieving trajectories from MATM improves downstream task performance and reduces interaction steps without coordination or joint training. These results position MATM as a design pattern for population-level experience sharing in open agent ecosystems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体交互记忆(MATM)框架，实现智能体生成轨迹的群体级存储与检索，提升异构智能体群体的任务执行效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 去中心化部署的LLM智能体具有多样能力，执行多样任务，需要跨异构群体的知识共享基础设施。现有检索增强生成仅利用人类生成的工件，而智能体轨迹虽编码了可重用的过程知识，但通常被丢弃或仅由产生智能体保留，导致新智能体反复重新发现已有解决方案，造成资源浪费。因此亟需一个群体级别的轨迹存储与检索机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出多智能体交互记忆(MATM)框架，包含生产者智能体向共享仓库贡献轨迹，消费者智能体检索轨迹以改进任务执行。该框架扩展了检索增强生成到智能体生成工件，专注于交互式环境（ALFWorld和WebArena），其中轨迹长且富含过程结构。无需智能体间协调或联合训练，仅通过群体级经验共享实现知识复用。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld和WebArena环境下实验表明，从MATM检索轨迹可提升下游任务性能，并减少交互步骤。具体性能提升和步数减少幅度需参考原文，摘要未提供精确数值，但明确说明了性能改善和效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: MATM为开放智能体生态系统中的群体级经验共享提供了一种设计模式，通过解耦知识生产与消费，实现了无需协调的跨智能体知识复用。该研究对多智能体协作和持续学习具有学术价值，未来可扩展至更多复杂环境及异构智能体群体，但需注意轨迹质量控制和检索效率等潜在局限性。

title: Light-weight Pronunciation Assessment via Discrete Speech Token Surprisal
abstract: Training automated pronunciation assessment often relies on labeled learner errors or non-native corpora that are costly to collect. We propose a lightweight framework trained only on native speech resources, operating unsupervised or lightly calibrated with a small set of scored utterances. At inference, learner speech is discretized with an SSL encoder and a K-means codebook. A token language model trained on native sequences computes surprisal where higher surprisal indicates phonotactic deviation. We add a transcript-guided Text2DUnit--DTW module that predicts native token sequences from reference text and aligns them to acoustic tokens to derive error-sensitive features. Surprisal and alignment features are fused via simple regression. On SpeechOcean762, PCC improves from 0.60 to 0.66 with transcript guidance, near supervised baselines. Cross-dataset evaluation on L2-ARCTIC shows consistent gains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于离散语音令牌意外度的轻量级无监督发音评估框架，仅用母语资源训练，通过令牌语言模型和文本引导对齐实现有效评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统发音评估依赖标注的学习者错误或非母语语料库，采集成本高昂。现有方法需要大量标注数据，限制了实际应用。本文旨在开发一种仅利用母语语音资源即可进行发音评估的轻量级方法，降低数据需求，使模型更易部署。
light_analysis.method: 使用SSL编码器和K-means码本将学习者语音离散化为令牌序列；训练令牌语言模型在母语序列上计算意外度，高意外度表示音位偏差。同时，Text2DUnit-DTW模块将参考文本转化为预测的母语令牌序列并与声学令牌对齐，提取错误敏感特征。最后通过简单回归融合意外度和对齐特征进行评分。
light_analysis.result: 在SpeechOcean762数据集上，有文本引导时PCC从0.60提升至0.66，接近有监督基线性能。在L2-ARCTIC上的跨数据集评估也显示一致提升，验证了方法的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过离散令牌意外度和文本引导对齐，在无非母语标注数据条件下实现有效发音评估，显著降低数据依赖。方法轻量且跨数据集鲁棒，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂特征融合或适应多语言场景。

title: Gaussian Process Prior Variational Autoencoder for Endoscopic Videos
abstract: Endoscopic video analysis is essential for gastrointestinal diagnosis and computer-assisted interventions, but video sequences are routinely degraded by specular reflections, motion artifacts, and missing frames. These transient corruptions can distract clinicians, reduce image interpretability, and disrupt downstream tasks such as 3D reconstruction and navigation. Effective restoration therefore requires methods that exploit temporal continuity rather than treating frames in isolation. We introduce a Gaussian Process Prior Variational Autoencoder (GPVAE) framework for endoscopic video restoration that replaces the standard factorized latent prior with a temporal Gaussian process prior, enabling interpolation of missing frames with uncertainty-aware reconstruction.   The framework combines endoscopy-specific encoders, including a convolutional EndoVAE backbone and pretrained Vision Transformer encoders from GastroNet-5M, with two scalable GP approximations: Hierarchical Prior Approximation (HPA) and Sparse Precision Approximation (SPA). Specular reflections are handled using a DUCKNet-based masking pipeline that excludes corrupted pixels from the reconstruction objective. On the C3VDv2 colonoscopy dataset, the best GPVAE variants reduced image reconstruction RMSE by 21.9\% on average, and by up to 26.1\%, relative to matched VAE baselines. Downstream trajectory RMSE was reduced by 12.7\% on average across classical visual odometry and a pretrained PoseNet, at an average increase of 27.3\% in training time per epoch. Finally, the GP posterior provides per-frame uncertainty estimates that reflect temporal support and offer a confidence signal for restored frames.

light_analysis.overview: 提出高斯过程先验变分自编码器(GPVAE)用于内窥镜视频恢复，通过时间高斯过程先验实现缺失帧插值与不确定性感知重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 内窥镜视频常受镜面反射、运动伪影和缺失帧干扰，现有方法孤立处理帧，未利用时间连续性，导致恢复效果不佳。本文旨在通过时间建模提升视频恢复质量，降低对下游任务的影响。
light_analysis.method: 采用高斯过程先验替代标准因子化潜在先验，结合卷积EndoVAE和预训练Vision Transformer编码器，使用层次化先验近似(HPA)和稀疏精度近似(SPA)两种可扩展GP近似。镜面反射通过DUCKNet掩码管道排除损坏像素。在C3VDv2结肠镜数据集上训练与评估。
light_analysis.result: 最佳GPVAE变体相比VAE基线，图像重建RMSE平均降低21.9%，最高达26.1%；下游轨迹RMSE平均降低12.7%，但训练时间每轮增加27.3%。GP后验提供每帧不确定性估计，反映时间支持度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效恢复内窥镜视频，显著提升重建质量和下游视觉里程计性能，不确定性估计为恢复帧提供置信度信号。未来可探索更高效的GP近似以减少训练开销。

title: Linear Recurrent Unit with Semantic Modulation for Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Linear recurrent unit (LRU), designed with a principled formulation for stable linear recurrence, has demonstrated promising accuracy and robustness on long-range dependency tasks. However, its static parameterization and single-scan method limits its applicability to 2D vision tasks.
