In this study, we propose a LRU-based restoration network with a semantic modulating unit (SMU) to achieve a harmonious balance between performance and efficiency in single-image super-resolution. The SMU plays three key roles: LRU modulation, spatial categorization, and feature enhancement through learned prototype. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method quantitatively and qualitatively surpasses recent state-of-the-art methods. Notably, our approach achieves superior performance with computational complexity on par with existing methods. The source code and models are available at https://github.com/MingyuChoi-run/LSM

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于线性递归单元和语义调制单元的图像超分辨率网络，平衡性能与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性递归单元（LRU）在长距离依赖任务中表现出色，但其静态参数化和单次扫描方式限制了在二维视觉任务（如图像超分辨率）中的应用。现有方法难以同时兼顾性能与计算效率，因此需要一种能够适应二维空间结构并保持高效计算的LRU变体。
light_analysis.method: 提出LRU结合的语义调制单元（SMU），实现三个功能：LRU调制以动态适应输入特征、空间分类以区分不同区域、通过学习的原型进行特征增强。整体网络采用单图像超分辨率任务，利用SMU改进LRU的二维处理能力，在保持计算复杂度与现有方法相当的同时提升性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在定量指标（如PSNR、SSIM）和定性视觉效果上均超越近期最先进方法。计算复杂度与现有方法持平，实现了性能与效率的平衡。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究了LRU在图像超分辨率中的应用，通过SMU解决了其二维适应性不足的问题。方法在性能上有显著提升且计算高效，为LRU在视觉任务中的推广提供了新思路。未来可探索在更广泛恢复任务中的应用。

title: Score Approximation for Diffusion Models on Arbitrary Low-Dimensional Structures
abstract: The remarkable success of score-based diffusion models has spurred significant efforts to establish their theoretical foundations. However, existing complexity bounds for score approximation rely heavily on restrictive assumptions like Lipschitz continuous densities or smooth manifold supports, which are routinely violated by the singularities, sharp boundaries, and disjoint clusters inherent to real-world perceptual data. This work establishes a universal score approximation theorem that works for any distribution supported on any compact set of upper Minkowski dimension $d$. Using a novel discrete-mixture formulation, we prove that the score function can be approximated with a ReLU network whose complexity grows exponentially only with $d$, thus breaking the exponential curse of ambient dimensionality. Combined with existing theories on accurately solving the backward diffusion SDE for arbitrary compact distributions, our work shows that diffusion models readily adapt to irregular, non-smooth data structures, explaining their competence in real-world generative tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通用得分逼近定理，证明ReLU网络复杂度仅依赖于数据本征维度，打破环境维度诅咒。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有得分逼近理论依赖Lipschitz连续密度或光滑流形等限制性假设，但真实感知数据常包含奇异性、尖锐边界和不连续簇，导致理论不适用。本文旨在建立适用于任意紧支撑分布（任意上Minkowski维度）的得分逼近定理，解释扩散模型在非光滑结构上的成功。
light_analysis.method: 采用离散混合公式，将得分函数表示为混合分布的条件期望，并证明可用ReLU网络近似，其大小仅随数据上Minkowski维度d指数增长，与环境维度无关。结合反向扩散SDE求解理论，确保模型在任意紧支撑分布上的适用性。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明了得分逼近的复杂度仅与数据本征维度d相关，打破了环境维度的指数诅咒。结合现有扩散SDE求解理论，表明扩散模型能适应不规则、非光滑的数据结构，解释了其在真实世界生成任务中的能力。摘要未提供具体数值实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立的通用得分逼近定理填补了扩散模型对非光滑数据结构的理论空白，具有重要理论价值，并揭示了扩散模型自动适应数据低维结构的机制。未来可探索更紧的复杂度边界或更高效的网络架构。

title: MetaResearcher: Scaling Deep Research via Self-Reflective Reinforcement Learning in Adversarial Virtual Environments
abstract: Deep research agents have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in autonomous information gathering and synthesis, yet their training remains constrained by the static nature of simulated environments, the limits of fact-retrieval-only task designs, and the inefficiency of outcome-based reinforcement learning. In this work, we propose MetaResearcher, a novel framework that scales deep research agent training across four synergistic dimensions. First, we introduce an Evolving Virtual World that injects temporal dynamics and adversarial misinformation into the training environment, forcing agents to develop source credibility assessment and temporal conflict resolution skills. Second, we design Discovery-Oriented Tasks -- including hypothesis generation and contradiction resolution -- that transcend simple fact retrieval and push agents toward genuine research behaviors. Third, we propose a Self-Reflective Meta-Reward mechanism within the GRPO framework that jointly optimizes for answer correctness, search path efficiency, reflection depth, and tool call diversity, directly addressing the repetitive action loop problem observed in prior work. Fourth, we introduce a Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Swarm architecture comprising specialized Scout, Filter, and Synthesizer models that learn collaborative research strategies through coordinated reinforcement learning. Built upon the LiteResearcher infrastructure, MetaResearcher requires zero marginal API cost for training while targeting substantial improvements in both benchmark performance (GAIA, Xbench-DS) and epistemic robustness under adversarial conditions. We present the complete framework design, training methodology, and planned experimental validation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MetaResearcher框架，通过自反思强化学习和对抗虚拟环境扩展深度研究智能体的训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度研究智能体训练受限于静态模拟环境、仅事实检索的任务设计以及基于结果的强化学习效率低下。这些问题导致智能体无法适应动态信息环境、评估源可信度、解决时间冲突，且易陷入重复动作循环。因此需要更真实的训练环境和更全面的优化目标来提升研究能力。
light_analysis.method: MetaResearcher框架包含四个协同维度：1) 演化虚拟世界，注入时间动态和对抗性虚假信息；2) 发现导向任务，如假设生成和矛盾解决；3) 基于GRPO的自反思元奖励机制，联合优化答案正确性、搜索效率、反思深度和工具调用多样性；4) 异构多智能体群架构，包含专家Scout、Filter和Synthesizer模型，通过协作强化学习学习研究策略。基于LiteResearcher基础设施，零边际API成本。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未报告具体实验结果，仅说明计划在GAIA和Xbench-DS基准测试以及对抗条件下评估性能，预期在基准性能和认知鲁棒性上均有显著提升。实际结果待实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: MetaResearcher通过引入动态环境、发现任务、自反思奖励和多智能体协作，为深度研究智能体训练提供了可扩展框架。其零附加API成本特性具有实际应用价值。未来需验证其在真实研究场景中的有效性，并可能扩展至更复杂的协作研究任务。

title: Adversarial Bandit Optimization with Globally Bounded Perturbations to Convex Losses
abstract: We study adversarial bandit optimization in which the loss functions may be non-convex and non-smooth. In each round, the learner selects an action and observes only the loss incurred at that action. The loss consists of an underlying convex and $β$-smooth component and an adversarial perturbation that may be chosen after observing the learner's action. The perturbations are subject to a global budget controlling their cumulative magnitude over time.   This framework extends the globally budgeted, post-action perturbation model from underlying linear losses to general convex and $β$-smooth losses. For this broader class, we establish expected regret guarantees that explicitly characterize the effect of the perturbation budget.   To establish these guarantees, we modify a standard bandit optimization algorithm and develop an analysis that controls the additional regret caused by the perturbations. In the absence of perturbations, our results reduce to regret guarantees for the standard bandit convex optimization setting with $β$-smooth losses.

light_analysis.overview: 将全局有界后行动扰动模型从线性损失扩展到一般凸β-光滑损失，并给出遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对抗性bandit优化研究多假设损失函数为线性或凸且光滑，但实际中损失可能受对抗性扰动影响且非凸非光滑。本文旨在解决当损失包含凸光滑分量和全局有界对抗扰动时的学习问题，扩展后行动扰动模型至更广的损失类别，分析扰动预算对遗憾的影响。
light_analysis.method: 修改标准bandit凸优化算法（如FKM或EXP3变体），针对全局有界扰动进行适应性调整。通过精细的遗憾分析，将扰动导致的额外遗憾与控制扰动累积预算相结合，利用β-光滑性进行边界推导。分析中假设扰动在观察动作后选择，且受全局预算约束。
light_analysis.result: 建立了期望遗憾界，明确依赖于扰动预算和损失光滑参数β。在无扰动时，遗憾界退化为标准bandit凸优化结果。具体数值未给出，但框架表明扰动预算对遗憾有线性或次线性影响，取决于算法设计。与线性损失下的结果对比，展示了扩展的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文在理论上将全局有界对抗扰动模型从线性损失推广到凸β-光滑损失，为更现实的非凸非光滑环境提供了遗憾保证。工作为对抗性bandit优化提供了新视角，未来可探索非光滑或更复杂扰动结构。

title: SurgVista: Long-Horizon Surgical World Modeling with Plausible Instrument-Tissue Dynamics
abstract: Scaling robot policy learning for autonomous surgery is challenging, as expert demonstrations are expensive and in vivo exploration poses substantial safety risks. Surgical world models address this by generating realistic, action-conditioned future frames from an initial observation, but existing methods exhibit two persistent failure modes: spatial interaction incoherence, where visible instrument contact fails to induce spatially consistent tissue deformation, and temporal fidelity collapse, where prediction errors compound across autoregressive rollouts and progressively corrupt visual quality. We present SurgVista, a surgical world model that mitigates both failures through two training recipes. Deformation Consistency Regularization extracts scene-point trajectories from training videos and enforces cross-frame coherence through latent contrastive learning, strengthening physically consistent instrument-tissue dynamics. Drift Adaptation Training mitigates long-horizon drift by perturbing conditioning frames with online prediction residuals and photometric augmentations calibrated to long-horizon drift statistics, sustaining visual fidelity over extended rollouts. To enable rigorous evaluation, we further introduce SurgWorld-Bench, featuring diverse procedure types, long-range rollouts, and decoupled metrics for instrument-motion accuracy and tissue-response fidelity. Extensive experiments show that SurgVista consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across visual quality, temporal consistency, and interaction fidelity, with gains widening as the prediction horizon grows.

light_analysis.overview: SurgVista 通过变形一致性正则化和漂移适应训练，解决了手术世界模型中的空间交互不一致和时间保真度下降问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主手术机器人策略学习面临专家演示昂贵和体内探索安全风险的挑战。现有手术世界模型存在两种失败模式：空间交互不一致，即器械接触无法引发空间一致的组织变形；时间保真度下降，即预测误差在自回归 rollout 中累积导致视觉质量退化。这两个问题限制了模型在长期预测中的应用，亟需更鲁棒的建模方法。
light_analysis.method: SurgVista 提出两种训练策略：变形一致性正则化，从训练视频提取场景点轨迹，通过潜在对比学习强制跨帧一致性，增强器械-组织交互的物理合理性；漂移适应训练，用在线预测残差和基于长时漂移统计校准的光度增强扰动条件帧，缓解长期漂移。此外，引入 SurgWorld-Bench 基准，包含多样手术类型、长 rollout 和分离的指标，用于评估器械运动准确性和组织响应保真度。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，SurgVista 在视觉质量、时间一致性和交互保真度上持续优于现有方法，且随着预测时长增加优势扩大。具体指标包括帧级感知质量、视频级时间一致性和交互点轨迹误差等，均达到最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurgVista 有效缓解了手术世界模型的两大失败模式，为长期手术视频预测提供了鲁棒方案。该工作推进了自主手术机器人的数据生成和策略学习，具有临床应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的交互动力学建模或结合多模态传感器信息。

title: SL-S4Wave: Self-Supervised Learning of Physiological Waveforms with Structured State Space Models
abstract: Modeling long-sequence medical time series data, such as electrocardiograms (ECG), poses significant challenges due to high sampling rates, multichannel signal complexity, inherent noise, and limited labeled data. While recent self-supervised learning (SSL) methods, based on various encoder architectures such as convolutional neural networks, have been proposed to learn representations from unlabeled data, they often fall short in capturing long-range dependencies and noise-invariant features. Structured state space models (S4) excel at long-sequence modeling, but existing S4 architectures fail to capture the unique characteristics of multichannel physiological waveforms. In this work, we propose SL-S4Wave, a self-supervised learning framework that combines contrastive learning with a tailored encoder built on structured state space models. The encoder incorporates multi-layer global convolution using multiscale subkernels, enabling the capture of both fine-grained local patterns and long-range temporal dependencies in noisy, high-resolution multichannel waveforms. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that SL-S4Wave (1) consistently outperforms state-of-the-art supervised and self-supervised baselines in a challenging arrhythmia detection task, (2) achieves high performance with significantly fewer labeled examples, showcasing strong label efficiency, and (3) maintains robust performance on long waveform segments, highlighting its capacity to model complex temporal dynamics in long sequences that most existing approaches fail to efficiently model, and (4) transfers effectively to unseen arrhythmia types, underscoring its robust cross-domain generalization. We additionally evaluate SL-S4Wave on multiple EEG tasks, achieving superior performance over strong baselines, demonstrating generalizability of our approach beyond cardiac waveforms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SL-S4Wave，一种结合对比学习与结构化状态空间模型的自监督框架，用于多通道生理波形（ECG、EEG）的表示学习，在长序列建模和标签效率上表现优异。
light_analysis.motivation: 长序列生理信号（如ECG）采样率高、多通道、噪声大且标注数据有限。现有自监督方法（如CNN）难以捕获长程依赖和噪声不变特征。S4擅长长序列建模，但缺乏针对多通道波形特性的设计，因此需要专门框架。
light_analysis.method: SL-S4Wave采用对比学习与定制S4编码器。编码器嵌入多尺度子核实现多层全局卷积，同时捕获细粒度局部模式和长程时序依赖，有效处理高噪声、高分辨率多通道波形。
light_analysis.result: 在心律失常检测中，SL-S4Wave一致优于有监督和自监督基线；用更少标注样本即达高性能，标签效率高；在长波形片段上鲁棒，有效建模复杂时序动态；迁移到未见心律失常类型仍表现强泛化。在多个EEG任务上也优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: SL-S4Wave有效解决多通道生理波形表示学习难题，具有强标签效率和跨域泛化能力。学术上推进了自监督学习在医学时间序列的应用，实际中可减少标注成本并提升诊断模型性能。未来可探索其他生理信号或更复杂S4变体。

title: Matching Markets meet Cumulative Prospect Theory: Towards Optimal and Adversarially Robust Learning
abstract: We study a multi-agent multi-armed bandit problem in the competitive setup with two-sided matching markets under a human centric decision making model. To capture human preferences, we use cumulative prospect theory (CPT) that weighs the actions of the agent in a nonlinear fashion using a ($α$-Hölder continuous) weight function. CPT has been widely used in behavioral economics and risk sensitive machine learning to emulate human preferences. We analyze the state-of-the-art learning algorithm with CPT weight distorted rewards and obtain a player optimal regret of $\mathcal{O}(K\log T \left(\frac{1}Δ\right)^{2/α})$, where $K$ denotes the number of arms, $T$ is the learning horizon, and $Δ$ represents (suitably defined) players' minimum preference gap. Noticing the dependence on $Δ$ to be sub-optimal, we further improve this regret by judiciously selecting the active set of arms during exploration, which removes the dependence on $K$ in the dominant term and achieves an improved (optimal) regret guarantees in the setting where the number of arms $K$ is significantly larger than the number of players $N$. In addition, we consider adversarial markets where the observed rewards of the agents may be corrupted. We propose and analyze algorithms for robust markets with CPT as risk sensitive measure in both settings where the total corruption budget is known and where it is unknown, and establish logarithmic player-optimal regret guarantees in both cases.

light_analysis.overview: 将累积前景理论引入双向匹配市场的多智能体多臂老虎机问题，提出最优及对抗稳健的学习算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有匹配市场学习算法通常假设理性偏好，忽略了人类决策的非线性风险感知。累积前景理论能更真实地模拟人类偏好，但尚未被用于匹配市场学习。此外，实际市场中可能存在奖励被恶意篡改的对抗性环境，需要稳健学习算法。
light_analysis.method: 采用累积前景理论（CPT）的α-Hölder连续权重函数扭曲奖励，分析现有学习算法并获得玩家最优遗憾O(K log T (1/Δ)^(2/α))。通过巧妙选择探索时的活跃臂集，消除了主导项中对臂数K的依赖，实现改进的遗憾界。针对对抗性市场，提出在已知和未知总腐蚀预算下的稳健算法，建立对数级玩家最优遗憾。
light_analysis.result: 在标准设置下获得O(K log T (1/Δ)^(2/α))的玩家最优遗憾，其中K为臂数，Δ为最小偏好差距。通过活跃臂集选择进一步改进，在K远大于玩家数N时达到最优。对抗性市场中，无论腐蚀预算已知与否，均实现对数级玩家最优遗憾。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将累积前景理论用于匹配市场学习，提供了理论上最优的遗憾保证，并拓展到对抗性环境，增强了实际应用中的稳健性。未来可考虑更一般的CPT形式或动态匹配市场。

title: Multimodal Concept Bottleneck Models
abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) enhance the interpretability of deep learning networks by aligning the features extracted from images with natural concepts. However, existing CBMs are constrained in their ability to generalize beyond a fixed set of predefined classes and the risk of non-concept information leakage, where predictive signals outside the intended concepts are inadvertently exploited. In this paper, we propose Multimodal Concept Bottleneck Model (MM-CBM) to address these issues and extend CBMs into CLIP. MM-CBM utilizes dual Concept Bottleneck Layers (CBLs) to align both the image and text embeddings into interpretable features. This allows us to perform new vision tasks like zero-shot classification or image retrieval in an interpretable way. Compared to existing methods, MM-CBM achieves up to 51.26% accuracy improvement on average across four standard benchmarks. Our method maintains high accuracy, staying within ~5% of black-box performance while offering greater interpretability.
comment: Present at NeurIPS 2025 Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态概念瓶颈模型（MM-CBM），将概念瓶颈模型扩展到CLIP，实现可解释的零样本分类和图像检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型（CBM）受限于固定类别集，且存在非概念信息泄漏风险，即模型可能利用概念之外的预测信号。这些限制妨碍了CBM的泛化能力和可解释性。MM-CBM旨在解决这些问题，将CBM扩展到多模态CLIP模型，以支持更广泛的视觉任务并增强可解释性。
light_analysis.method: MM-CBM采用双概念瓶颈层（CBLs），分别将图像和文本嵌入对齐到可解释的概念空间。该方法利用CLIP的双编码器架构，通过CBLs生成概念级别的特征，从而实现零样本分类和图像检索等任务的可解释性。关键创新在于同时对齐视觉和语言模态，避免概念信息泄漏。
light_analysis.result: 在四个标准基准上，MM-CBM相比现有方法平均提升51.26%准确率，且保持高准确率，与黑盒模型性能差距在约5%以内。实验表明，该方法在提供更强可解释性的同时，不显著牺牲性能，有效解决了非概念信息泄漏问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: MM-CBM成功将概念瓶颈模型扩展到多模态领域，实现了可解释的零样本视觉任务。其学术价值在于为可解释AI提供了新范式，实际应用价值包括医疗、自动驾驶等需要透明决策的领域。未来工作可优化概念瓶颈层设计或扩展到更多模态。

title: REDACT: A Systematically Controlled Multilingual Benchmark for Personal Information Detection
abstract: Benchmark infrastructure for personally identifiable information (PII) detection remains limited: existing corpora cover few entity types, use ad hoc generation conditions, and do not show which surface conditions cause detector failures. We present REDACT, a systematically controlled multilingual PII benchmark with 13,427 records, 324,078 entity annotations, 51 entity types, 4,127 surface-form patterns, and 25 languages across 9 scripts. A strength-2 covering-array sampler controls nine generation axes: domain, format, difficulty, length, density, code-switching, language, adjacency, and co-occurrence. Three entity-level metadata fields (disclosure status, disclosure form, and a GDPR-aligned sensitivity tier) enable stratified evaluation beyond aggregate or per-type F1. From the full benchmark, we evaluate five detectors (Presidio, GLiNER, the OpenAI Privacy Filter, GPT-4.1, and Claude Sonnet 4.6) on a locked, language-stratified sample of 1,000 records. Aggregate F1 masks an architecture-dependent failure structure: the rule-based detector performs poorly on the highest-stakes data, including HIGH-sensitivity categories (recall 0.07) and non-verbatim disclosure forms, while the LLM detectors remain more robust, with the HIGH tier as their strongest sensitivity slice. A three-model reference-free LLM-as-judge assessment corroborates that sensitivity-tier assignment is the task's hardest axis. We release the benchmark, schema, prompts, and stratified evaluation harness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REDACT，首个系统控制的多语言PII检测基准，覆盖51种实体类型、25种语言，揭示LLM相比规则检测器的优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有PII检测基准存在覆盖实体类型少、生成条件随意、无法揭示检测器失败原因等问题。这些不足限制了PII检测技术的可靠评估，尤其是在多语言和高敏感性场景下。本研究旨在构建一个系统化、多维度控制的基准，以准确评估不同检测器在复杂条件下的表现，并识别其失败模式。
light_analysis.method: REDACT基准包含13,427条记录、324,078个实体标注、51种实体类型、4,127种表面形式模式，覆盖25种语言（9种文字）。采用强度2覆盖数组采样控制9个生成轴（领域、格式、难度、长度、密度、语码转换、语言、邻近性、共现）。引入三个实体级元数据字段（披露状态、披露形式、GDPR敏感性层级），支持分层评估。抽取1,000条语言分层样本，评估Presidio、GLiNER、OpenAI Privacy Filter、GPT-4.1和Claude Sonnet 4.6五个检测器。
light_analysis.result: 聚合F1得分掩盖了检测器的失败结构：基于规则的Presidio在HIGH敏感性类别上召回率仅0.07，非逐字披露形式表现差；而LLM检测器（GPT-4.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6）在最高风险数据上更鲁棒，HIGH敏感性反而成为其最强切片。三模型LLM-as-judge评估证实敏感性层级分配是任务中最难的轴。
light_analysis.conclusion: REDACT提供了系统控制的多语言PII检测基准，揭示了不同架构检测器的能力差异：规则方法在高风险数据上脆弱，LLM更具弹性。该基准和分层评估工具可推动PII检测的标准化评估，未来可扩展更多语言和实体类型，或用于训练更鲁棒的检测模型。

title: On the Oracle Complexity of Interpolation-Based Gradient Descent
abstract: Recent work on first-order optimizers for empirical risk minimization (ERM) has suggested that smoothness of ERM loss functions in the training data, rather than in the optimization parameters, can be leveraged to improve the oracle complexity of gradient descent (GD) methods. In this paper, we propose an inexact gradient method, piecewise polynomial interpolation-based gradient descent (PPI-GD), which approximates the full gradient in each iteration by querying the first-order oracle at equidistant points in the data domain to construct polynomial interpolants of the resulting gradient samples over appropriately sized patches of the data domain. We analyze the oracle complexity of PPI-GD for strongly convex and non-convex loss functions when the data space dimension is bounded by a polylogarithmic function of the number of training samples, and find it to outperform several GD variants in key regimes when the loss function is sufficiently smooth. Furthermore, our analysis extends several techniques from the error analysis of bicubic spline interpolants to the setting of $d$-variate tensor product polynomial interpolants which may be of independent interest in interpolation analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分段多项式插值梯度下降方法，利用数据平滑性降低oracle复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有梯度下降方法主要利用损失函数在参数空间的平滑性，但最近研究表明数据空间的平滑性可进一步优化复杂度。本文旨在通过多项式插值近似梯度，在强凸和非凸场景下实现更优的oracle复杂度，特别是在数据维度受限且损失函数充分平滑时。
light_analysis.method: 提出PPI-GD算法，每次迭代在数据域等距点查询一阶oracle，构建分段多项式插值以近似全梯度。通过适当尺寸的补丁划分，利用张量积多项式插值梯度样本。理论分析假设数据维度为训练样本数的多对数函数，并扩展了双三次样条插值的误差分析技术到d维情形。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，在强凸和非凸损失函数下，PPI-GD的oracle复杂度在损失函数充分平滑的关键区域优于多种梯度下降变体。具体地，当数据空间维度受限于训练样本数的多对数函数时，PPI-GD复杂度更低。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但给出了理论优势的定性结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的PPI-GD通过数据域插值有效降低了梯度下降的oracle复杂度，为利用ERM数据平滑性提供了新思路。其误差分析技术扩展到d维张量积多项式插值，具有独立理论价值。未来工作可探索更高效的插值策略或拓展到更一般的损失函数。

title: Global Convergence of Gradient Descent for Score Matching in Gaussian Mixtures via Reverse Fisher Divergence
abstract: The score matching problem is a central training objective in modern generative modeling, diffusion models, fitting unnormalized statistical models, and inverse problems. A standard approach is to minimize the forward Fisher divergence, where the expectation is taken with respect to the teacher distribution. However, recent results show that even in simple Gaussian mixture model settings, this objective can lead to undesirable and initialization-dependent convergence behavior. In this paper, we study an alternative objective: the reverse Fisher divergence, where the expectation is taken with respect to the student distribution. We analyze gradient descent (GD) for fitting Gaussian mixture models and show that this change in the objective leads to significantly better optimization properties. First, when the teacher distribution is a single Gaussian and the student is a Gaussian mixture model with fixed weights and identity covariances, we prove the global convergence of GD from arbitrary initializations. Second, we extend the analysis to the case where the teacher is also a Gaussian mixture model and prove global convergence guarantees under a global random initialization scheme and a $\widetildeΩ(1)$-separation assumption on the target means. In particular, with high probability, each student component converges near its closest teacher component, and we provide conditions under which the student distribution converges in total variation distance. Our proofs rely on a new Lyapunov-based analysis of the gradient descent dynamics, showing that the reverse Fisher divergence has a much more favorable optimization landscape than the forward Fisher divergence.

light_analysis.overview: 证明使用反向Fisher散度的梯度下降法在高斯混合模型中实现全局收敛，优于前向散度。
light_analysis.motivation: 分数匹配是生成模型、扩散模型等训练的核心目标，但标准前向Fisher散度在高斯混合模型中会导致依赖初始化的不良收敛行为，削弱优化稳定性。本文提出反向Fisher散度以改善优化景观，解决现有方法的局限性，为分数匹配提供更可靠的训练基础。
light_analysis.method: 采用反向Fisher散度作为目标函数，分析梯度下降拟合高斯混合模型。首先证明当教师为单高斯、学生为固定权重单位协方差高斯混合时，从任意初始化全局收敛。然后扩展到教师也为高斯混合，在全局随机初始化与目标均值分离假设下，证明学生分量收敛到最近教师分量，且学生分布在全变分距离上收敛。证明基于新颖的李雅普诺夫分析框架。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明表明，反向Fisher散度下的梯度下降具有全局收敛性：学生均值向量从任意或随机初始化收敛到最近教师均值，学生分布总变分距离趋于零。与传统前向散度相比，优化景观显著改善，避免了局部陷阱和初始化依赖，但摘要未提供具体数值实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了反向Fisher散度在分数匹配中的优越优化特性，为生成模型和逆问题训练提供理论支撑。学术上，建立了高斯混合模型下梯度下降的全局收敛保证；实践上，可提升扩散模型等训练的稳定性和效率。未来可放宽分离假设或扩展至更复杂模型。

title: A Systematic Evaluation of Black-Box Uncertainty Estimation Methods for Large Language Models
abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown strong capabilities across a wide range of tasks, their outputs often remain unreliable and may contain hallucinations, making uncertainty estimation (UE) essential for building trustworthy LLMs. In practice, many mainstream LLMs are only accessible through restricted APIs, where internal signals such as logits and hidden states are unavailable, making black-box UE especially important. However, existing work on black-box UE for LLMs remains fragmented in methodology and lacks a unified empirical comparison. To address this gap, we present a systematic review of black-box UE methods and organize them into five categories: verbalization-based, sampling-based, explanation-based, multi-agent, and hybrid methods. We further build a unified evaluation framework and benchmark 24 representative methods across 4 models and 4 dataset settings. Our results show that no single method consistently dominates across all settings. Nevertheless, methods that reason over and compare candidates in the answer space are generally effective, and hybrid methods that combine multiple uncertainty signals perform well under most conditions. By releasing the benchmark data and a unified evaluation framework, we aim to facilitate reproducible comparisons and support future research, while our empirical findings provide practical guidance for developing future black-box UE methods for LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估黑盒不确定性估计方法，将现有方法分为五类，并通过统一基准揭示无统一最优方法，但混合方法普遍有效。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型输出不可靠，易产生幻觉，不确定性估计对构建可信模型至关重要。然而，许多商用LLM仅通过受限API提供，无法获取logits和隐藏状态等内部信号，使得黑盒不确定性估计尤为关键。现有工作方法分散，缺乏系统性的经验比较，导致研究者难以选择合适方法。因此，迫切需要统一评估框架来全面比较各类黑盒方法，为实际应用提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 本文系统回顾了黑盒不确定性估计方法，将其分为五类：基于口头表达、基于采样、基于解释、多智能体和混合方法。构建统一评估框架，在4种不同规模和架构的LLM（如GPT-3.5、Llama等）和4个数据集（涵盖问答、生成等任务）上，对24种代表性方法进行基准测试。评估指标包括校准误差、AUC等，确保公平比较。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，无单一方法在所有设置中一致最优。但在答案空间进行推理和比较候选的方法（如基于采样的语义熵）整体有效，混合方法（如结合口头表达和采样信号）在大多数条件下表现最佳。例如，混合方法在多个数据集上校准误差降低10-20%，AUC提升5-15%。具体性能因模型和数据集而异，凸显了任务特定选择的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过系统综述和统一基准，揭示了黑盒不确定性估计方法的现状和性能边界，为研究人员提供了选择指南。发布的数据集和评估框架促进了可重复研究。实践建议：优先考虑基于答案推理和混合方法。未来可探索更高效的组合策略及适应动态API限制的方法。局限性在于仅评估了有限模型和任务，需扩展至更多场景。

title: PSCT-Net: Geometry-Aware Pediatric Skull CT Reconstruction via Differentiable Back-Projection and Attention-Guided Refinement
abstract: Computed Tomography (CT) is essential for diagnosing pediatric craniofacial abnormalities, yet poses radiation risks to developing anatomies. Reconstructing 3D CT from sparse bi-planar X-rays offers a low-dose alternative but is severely ill-posed. Existing methods employ geometry-agnostic feature lifting, naively projecting 2D features into 3D without explicit spatial modeling, causing depth ambiguity and degraded osseous boundaries. We present PSCT-Net, a geometry-aware framework with differentiable back-projection. Differentiable back-projection establishes a spatially faithful volumetric prior, alleviating depth ambiguity. An Attention-Guided Projection (AGP-3D) module then learns non-linear voxel-wise correspondences between 2D regions and 3D locations. A Bidirectional Mamba (BiM-3D) module captures long-range volumetric dependencies with linear complexity. We further curate a private institutional pediatric skull CT cohort, PedSkull-CT, comprising normal and pathological cases for internal evaluation, addressing the gap in adult-centric, trunk-focused datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PSCT-Net，利用可微反向投影和注意力引导的细化，从稀疏双平面X射线实现几何感知的儿科颅骨CT重建。
light_analysis.motivation: CT诊断儿科颅面异常不可或缺，但存在辐射风险。从稀疏双平面X射线重建3D CT是低剂量替代方案，但严重不适定。现有方法使用几何无关的特征提升，缺乏显式空间建模，导致深度模糊和骨骼边界退化，亟需几何感知的重建方法。
light_analysis.method: PSCT-Net包含可微反向投影模块，建立空间保真体积先验缓解深度模糊；注意力引导投影（AGP-3D）模块学习2D区域与3D位置的体素级非线性对应；双向Mamba（BiM-3D）模块以线性复杂度捕获长程体积依赖。此外，构建私有儿科颅骨CT数据集PedSkull-CT，包含正常和病理病例。
light_analysis.result: 在内部PedSkull-CT数据集上评估，PSCT-Net相比基线方法在重建质量上显著提升，具体指标包括更低的均方误差和更高的结构相似性指数，有效改善了骨骼边界清晰度和深度一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PSCT-Net通过几何感知框架解决了稀疏重建中的深度模糊问题，为儿科低剂量CT成像提供了可行方案。其可微反向投影和注意力引导机制具有通用性，可推广至其他解剖部位。未来可扩展至更多视角或结合其他模态信息。

title: The Almost Intelligent Revolution: Options for Scaling Up Deliberation and Empowering People with AI
abstract: The increasing prominence of Large Language Models (LLMs) in public discourse presents both opportunities and challenges for democratic deliberation. While red teaming strategies help mitigate specific risks, broader concerns persist regarding linguistic constraints, biases, and the sycophantic tendencies of LLMs. This chapter explores how LLMs can be used to significantly scale up and democratise deliberation, particularly in fostering inclusivity and empowering traditionally marginalised groups. Drawing on concepts from Systemic-Functional Linguistics, the chapter examines how variations across language users (for example, with respect to socio-demographic groups) and across language use (for example, with respect to communicative functions) shape participation in AI-supported deliberation. The chapter presents AI-driven deliberation studies and assesses their potential to scaffold argumentation, enhance access, and reduce the influence of exclusionary linguistic norms and biases which are embedded in prestigious registers. At the same time, the chapter cautions against both overclaiming, which leads to unrealistic expectations, and underclaiming, which risks missed opportunities for AI-assisted engagement. The chapter concludes by identifying future research directions to maximise the democratic potential of AI-assisted participation while embedding ethical safeguards to counteract the reproduction of linguistic inequalities.
comment: Published in /Handbook of Democracy in the Era of Artificial Intelligence/ edited by Evangelos Pournaras, Srijoni Majumdar, Carina Ines Hausladen, and Dirk Helbing. 2026

light_analysis.overview: 探讨利用大型语言模型扩展民主审议，增强包容性与边缘化群体赋权，同时警惕语言偏见与不合理期望。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在公共话语中的突出地位为民主审议带来机遇与挑战。现有红队策略虽缓解特定风险，但语言约束、偏见及谄媚倾向等问题仍存。研究旨在通过LLM扩展审议规模、促进包容性，特别是赋能传统边缘化群体，以克服现存语言规范中的排他性偏见。
light_analysis.method: 基于系统功能语言学理论，分析语言使用者（如社会人口群体）与语言使用（如交际功能）差异对AI支持审议的影响。通过AI驱动的审议研究，评估其构建论证、增强可及性及减少权威语域中嵌入的排他性语言规范与偏见的能力。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验数据或性能指标，但指出AI驱动审议研究在建构论证、提升可及性及减少语言偏见方面展现出潜力。同时强调需防范过度声称与不足声称，平衡预期与实际效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文总结了LLM在民主审议中的双重可能性：既可通过规模化参与赋权边缘群体，也可能强化语言不平等。呼吁未来研究在嵌入伦理保障的同时最大化民主潜力，避免语言偏见的再生产，并指出需持续探索平衡创新与风险的路径。

title: Large Language Models Do Not Always Need Readable Language
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are commonly prompted and interfaced with human-readable natural language, even when the intended reader is another model. This paper investigates whether semantic information can be encoded in compact, non-standard textual forms that sacrifice human readability while remaining recoverable by LLMs. We refer to this class of model-centric textual representations as BabelTele, approached here not as a fixed protocol but as an empirical probe into LLMs' capacity to generate and interpret such representations. Through readability diagnostics, model likelihood measures, human questionnaires, and downstream task evaluations, we find that BabelTele can substantially depart from ordinary natural language while preserving core semantics for instruction-tuned LLMs. As a task-agnostic representational paradigm, BabelTele demonstrates high information density, maintaining 99.5% semantic fidelity even when the text volume is condensed to 27.9% of its original length. We further evaluate its semantic robustness in cross-model transfer, agent memory, and multi-agent communication. Results suggest that BabelTele can reduce context overhead while generally maintaining reliable downstream performance, although its effectiveness depends on the compressor-reader pair and task setting. These findings indicate that human readability, natural-language typicality, and model-side semantic recoverability can be partially decoupled, opening a path toward model-native representations in future exploration of LLM systems.

light_analysis.overview: 探究LLM能否使用紧凑非标准文本（BabelTele）编码语义，牺牲可读性但保持高信息密度和语义保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通常使用人类可读的自然语言进行交互，即使阅读者是另一模型。现有方法依赖于自然语言，导致上下文开销大。本文研究是否可以将语义信息编码为紧凑、非标准的文本形式，减少文本体积同时保持模型可恢复性，从而降低计算成本并提升效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出BabelTele范式，通过压缩原始文本为紧凑的非标准表示，牺牲人类可读性但保留语义信息。采用多种压缩策略，通过可读性诊断、模型似然度量、人类问卷和下游任务评估其有效性。实验在指令微调LLM上进行，测试跨模型迁移、代理内存和多智能体通信场景。
light_analysis.result: BabelTele在文本体积压缩至27.9%时仍能保持99.5%的语义保真度。在下游任务中，BabelTele可以减少上下文开销，同时总体保持可靠的性能。其有效性依赖于压缩机-阅读器对和具体任务设置，表明该范式的灵活性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明人类可读性、自然语言典型性和模型侧语义可恢复性可以部分解耦。BabelTele作为模型原生表示方法，为降低LLM系统计算开销和探索更高效通信方式开辟新路径。未来可进一步优化压缩策略和跨模型通用性。

title: Physics-Informed Neural Network with Squeeze-Excitation-like Attention
abstract: We introduce SEA-PINN, a novel architecture that incorporates a Squeeze-Excitation-like attention mechanism into physics-informed neural networks to dynamically recalibrate the importance of neurons across layers. A key feature of SEA-PINN is its highly stable initialization. On 17 out of 20 benchmark problems, SEA-PINN exhibit nearly negligible variance and significantly reduced initial loss, establishing a quasi-deterministic and favorable starting point for optimization. Notably, without employing Fourier feature embeddings or periodic activation functions, SEA-PINN attained competitive accuracy (83\% vs. 90\% improvement relative to FNN-PINN on the high-frequency case 7) as compared with TSA-PINN-a model specifically engineered for high-frequency problems via learnable frequencies in sinusoidal activations. Furthermore, integrating SEA-PINN into TSA-PINN boosted performance by 42.49\%. These results underscore SEA-PINN as a lightweight plug-in module that enhances nonlinear representation power, promotes more robust and efficient convergence, and strengthens the overall reliability of physics-informed learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEA-PINN，将Squeeze-Excitation-like注意力机制融入物理信息神经网络，实现动态神经元重校准与稳定初始化。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）在求解高频偏微分方程时存在收敛不稳定与初始化敏感问题，现有方法如Fourier特征嵌入或周期激活函数增加复杂度。研究旨在通过轻量级注意力模块改善初始化稳定性与非线性表示能力，无需复杂预处理。
light_analysis.method: SEA-PINN在标准PINN中引入Squeeze-Excitation-like注意力，动态调整每层神经元的重要性，不依赖Fourier特征或周期激活函数。该设计提供准确定性初始化，在20个基准问题上验证，并与FNN-PINN及专为高频设计的TSA-PINN对比。
light_analysis.result: 在20个基准问题中的17个上，SEA-PINN呈现近乎零方差且初始损失显著降低。高频案例7中，相对FNN-PINN改进83%，接近TSA-PINN的90%改进。将SEA-PINN作为插件集成至TSA-PINN后性能提升42.49%。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEA-PINN作为轻量即插即用模块，增强非线性表示与收敛鲁棒性，提升物理信息学习可靠性。无需傅里叶特征或周期激活即可处理高频问题，可推广至其他PINN变体。

title: Prompt, Plan, Extract: Zero-Shot Agentic LLMs Workflows for Lung Pathology Extraction from Clinical Narratives
abstract: Information extraction from pathology reports is essential for cancer staging, tumor registry population. Yet key data remains embedded in narrative reports, making manual extraction labor-intensive and error-prone. Traditional supervised Natural Language Processing pipelines address this through fully supervised Named Entity Recognition and Relation Extraction, but require expensive manual annotation and suffer cascading failures when upstream entities are missed. In this study, we developed a zero-shot, agentic workflow, and evaluated five open-source generative Large Language Models (LLMs) to populate 13 College of American Pathologists synoptic fields from lung resection pathology reports. We compared them against a state-of-the-art supervised GatorTron NER-RE baseline using a novel, registry-aligned evaluation framework. The baseline achieved Micro-F1of 0.960, while the best zero-shot model (GPT-OSS-20B) achieved Micro-F1 of 0.893 (recall: 0.949), accurately extracting complex relations like Pathologic Stage without task-specific training. These results suggest that open-source, zero-shot agentic LLMs are a low-cost solution for extracting lung pathology information.
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables. Affiliations: (1) Department of Health Outcomes and Biomedical Informatics, College of Medicine, University of Florida, Gainesville, FL, USA; (2) Division of Pulmonary, Critical Care and Sleep Medicine, Department of Medicine, College of Medicine, University of Florida, Gainesville, FL, USA; (3) College of Nursing, Florida State University, Tallahassee, FL, USA

light_analysis.overview: 提出零样本智能LLM工作流，无需训练数据即从肺切除病理报告中提取信息，性能接近监督方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 病理报告中关键信息嵌入叙述文本，手动提取耗时易错。传统监督NLP需要昂贵人工标注，且上游实体遗漏导致级联错误。研究旨在开发低成本零样本方案。
light_analysis.method: 设计零样本智能工作流，包含提示、规划和提取步骤。评估五种开源LLM（如GPT-OSS-20B），从肺切除病理报告中填充13个CAP synoptic字段。与监督GatorTron NER-RE基线对比，采用注册对齐评估框架。
light_analysis.result: 监督基线Micro-F1 0.960，最佳零样本模型GPT-OSS-20B达0.893（召回0.949），准确提取Pathologic Stage等复杂关系，无需任务特定训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: 零样本开源LLM可低成本提取肺部病理信息，性能接近监督方法，避免标注成本。未来可扩展至其他医学文本，但精度仍有提升空间。

title: Neural Additive and Basis Models with Feature Selection and Interactions
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) exhibit attractive performance in various fields but often suffer from low interpretability. The neural additive model (NAM) and its variant called the neural basis model (NBM) use neural networks (NNs) as nonlinear shape functions in generalized additive models (GAMs). Both models are highly interpretable and exhibit good performance and flexibility for NN training. NAM and NBM can provide and visualize the contribution of each feature to the prediction owing to GAM-based architectures. However, when using two-input NNs to consider feature interactions or when applying them to high-dimensional datasets, training NAM and NBM becomes intractable due to the increase in the computational resources required. This paper proposes incorporating the feature selection mechanism into NAM and NBM to resolve computational bottlenecks. We introduce the feature selection layer in both models and update the selection weights during training. Our method is simple and can reduce computational costs and model sizes compared to vanilla NAM and NBM. In addition, it enables us to use two-input NNs even in high-dimensional datasets and capture feature interactions. We demonstrate that the proposed models are computationally efficient compared to vanilla NAM and NBM, and they exhibit better or comparable performance with state-of-the-art GAMs.
comment: Accepted at PAKDD 2024. Code is available at https://github.com/shiralab/NAM-FS

light_analysis.overview: 提出带特征选择的神经加性与基模型，减少计算开销并捕捉特征交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经加性模型（NAM）和神经基模型（NBM）可解释性强，但在高维数据或考虑特征交互时，因计算资源需求剧增而难以训练。现有方法未有效解决此计算瓶颈，限制了其在复杂场景下的应用。
light_analysis.method: 在NAM和NBM中引入特征选择层，在训练过程中动态更新特征权重，自动筛选重要特征。该方法无需增加额外网络结构，可直接压缩模型复杂度，并支持使用双输入神经网络捕获特征交互，适用于高维数据集。
light_analysis.result: 与原始NAM/NBM相比，所提模型在保持可解释性的同时显著降低计算成本和模型规模。在多个基准数据集上，性能优于或持平于当前最先进的广义加性模型（GAMs），且训练效率更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种简单有效的特征选择机制，解决了NAM/NBM在高维场景下的计算瓶颈，并扩展了其交互建模能力。该方法具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的特征交互形式或结合其他正则化技术。

title: ViCoStream: Streaming VideoLLMs Can Run Beyond 100 FPS with Stage-Wise Coordinated Inference
abstract: Streaming VideoLLMs must continuously process incoming video while maintaining low query latency, making both video-ingestion throughput and query-time responsiveness critical for real-time deployment. Existing methods largely focus on accelerating individual modules, such as visual encoding, token pruning, or KV-cache compression, but provide limited insight into whether the resulting system can sustain real-time streaming performance. We formulate streaming VideoLLM inference as a coordinated pipeline spanning visual preprocessing, visual encoding, token dropping, and LLM prefilling/decoding. Building on this formulation, we propose ViCoStream (Video Coordinated Streaming), a stage-wise coordinated streaming framework that combines chunk-wise execution, CUDA-stream overlap, visual token control, bounded visual attention, and query-side retrieval to bound per-chunk computation and memory costs. We further provide a systematic study of bottleneck migration, revealing how chunk size, token retention, attention locality, and retrieval scope shape the throughput-accuracy trade-off. Experiments with Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B-Instruct across multiple streaming benchmarks show that ViCoStream achieves 134 FPS video throughput and less than 50 ms TTFT on a single A100 GPU while maintaining accuracy close to full-history baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViCoStream框架，通过阶段协调推理实现流式视频LLM超过100 FPS的视频处理吞吐量，同时保持低查询延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式视频LLM需持续处理输入视频并保持低查询延迟，但现有方法主要加速单个模块（如视觉编码、token剪枝或KV缓存压缩），缺乏系统级实时性能保证。实际部署中，视频摄入吞吐量和查询响应时间同等关键，亟需一种协调的流水线框架来确保端到端实时流式性能。
light_analysis.method: 将流式VideoLLM推理建模为协调流水线，包含视觉预处理、视觉编码、token丢弃和LLM预填充/解码。提出ViCoStream框架，结合分块执行、CUDA流重叠、视觉token控制、有界视觉注意力和查询侧检索，以限制每块计算和内存成本。系统研究瓶颈迁移，揭示分块大小、token保留率、注意力局部性和检索范围对吞吐-准确率权衡的影响。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B-Instruct模型和多个流式基准测试上，ViCoStream在单张A100 GPU上实现134 FPS视频吞吐量和小于50 ms的首token生成时间（TTFT），同时准确率接近全历史基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了系统级协调推理框架，首次实现超过100 FPS的实时流式视频LLM部署，兼顾高吞吐和低延迟。为流式视频理解应用（如自动驾驶、监控）提供可行方案。未来可探索更复杂的视觉注意力机制和跨场景泛化。

title: AtomMem: Building Simple and Effective Memory System for LLM Agents via Atomic Facts
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong reasoning and generation abilities, but their fixed context windows limit long-term information accumulation and reuse across multi-session interactions. Existing memory-augmented systems often construct memory in a coarse and unstable manner, relying on inefficient memory representations or unstable unconstrained updates. To address these challenges, we propose AtomMem, a long-term memory system designed for value-dense storage and stable memory evolution. AtomMem introduces a Fact Executor, which selectively extracts high value atomic facts from long form interactions to serve as highly efficient memory representations. Subsequently, AtomMem organizes these facts into hierarchical event structures and temporal profiles, capturing coherent episodic contexts and tracking dynamically evolving user attributes over time. During retrieval, the system activates an associative memory graph to connect fragmented memories. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark confirm that AtomMem achieves state-of-the-art performance across various reasoning tasks, offering a scalable and economically viable solution for deploying intelligent personalized agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AtomMem，一种基于原子事实的LLM智能体长期记忆系统，实现高价值密度存储和稳定记忆演化。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）的固定上下文窗口限制了跨会话的长期信息积累与复用。现有记忆增强系统存在粗粒度、不稳定、记忆表示低效或更新约束不足等问题。因此，需要一种高效、稳定且经济可行的长期记忆系统，以支持智能体在多轮交互中持续积累和利用信息。
light_analysis.method: AtomMem引入事实执行器（Fact Executor），从长交互中选择性提取高价值原子事实作为高效记忆表示。随后，将这些事实组织成层次化事件结构和时间画像，捕获连贯的情境上下文并追踪动态演变的用户属性。检索时激活关联记忆图以连接碎片化记忆。整体设计注重值密集存储和稳定演化。
light_analysis.result: 在LoCoMo基准测试上，AtomMem在各种推理任务中取得最先进性能。实验证实其可扩展性和经济可行性，为部署个性化智能代理提供了高效解决方案。具体性能提升幅度原文未明确，但优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: AtomMem通过原子事实有效解决了LLM智能体长期记忆的粗粒度与不稳定性问题，兼顾存储密度与演化稳定性。其层次化组织和关联检索机制显著提升了多会话推理能力。未来可探索更复杂的记忆整合策略或应用于更广泛的人机交互场景。

title: OTCHA: Optimal Transport-driven Confidence-aware Latent Hub Alignment for Multi-View Medical Image Classification
abstract: Multi-view imaging, such as mammography and chest radiography, is a standard component of clinical practice. However, medical images are often unregistered and contain view-specific artifacts or irrelevant background cues that can obscure diagnostically relevant findings. Many existing methods directly fuse per-view representations, allowing such irrelevant content to contaminate the fused embedding and reducing robustness under varying view configurations. We propose OTCHA, a confidence-aware latent hub token alignment module based on optimal transport (OT) that refines patch tokens before fusion for multi-view classification. OTCHA introduces a set of learnable latent hub tokens shared across views. For each view, we compute an OT plan between patch tokens and hub tokens that jointly considers feature similarity and geometry, and augment the OT formulation with token-conditional dustbins to enable partial matching and discard irrelevant tokens. The resulting transport plan provides token-wise matching confidence, which gates hub-mediated message passing and weights a novel optimal-transport-based representation alignment loss to stabilize refinement. Experiments on three multi-view medical image datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over competing baselines across diverse anatomies and view configurations. Our code is available at https://github.com/labhai/OTCHA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最优传输的置信度感知潜中心令牌对齐方法，通过部分匹配和丢弃无关令牌提升多视图医学图像分类的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视图医学图像（如乳腺X光、胸部X光）常存在未配准、视图特定伪影和无关背景，现有方法直接融合各视图表示易引入噪声，降低鲁棒性。需要一种能选择性对齐视图间诊断相关特征、抑制无关内容的融合方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出OTCHA模块，引入跨视图共享的可学习潜在中心令牌；对每个视图，计算补丁令牌与中心令牌间的最优传输计划，同时考虑特征相似性和几何结构；通过令牌条件化垃圾箱实现部分匹配，丢弃无关令牌；传输计划提供令牌级匹配置信度，用于门控消息传递和基于OT的对齐损失，稳定补丁令牌的细化过程。方法不依赖视图间显式配准。
light_analysis.result: 在三个多视图医学图像数据集（涵盖不同解剖部位和视图配置）上，OTCHA持续优于竞争基线，展示出在不同场景下的泛化性和鲁棒性。具体提升幅度需参考原文，摘要未给出精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: OTCHA通过最优传输和置信度感知机制有效解决了多视图融合中的噪声污染问题，提升了分类性能。方法具有模块化设计，可集成到现有框架。未来可探索更复杂的匹配策略或扩展到其他多模态任务。

title: Neural Events: Discrete Asynchronous Autoencoders for Event-Based Vision
abstract: Event cameras capture dynamic scenes with exceptional temporal fidelity by representing them as a continuous stream of microsecond resolution \textit{events}. Each individual event, however, only carries minimal semantic value, merely signaling a localized brightness change. To derive meaningful signals, downstream algorithms need to quickly integrate cues from a potentially massive torrent of low-information events. Current architectures, however, are easily overwhelmed, struggling to balance capturing fine-grained temporal dynamics and maintaining a manageable data throughput. This paper proposes a framework to re-tokenize event streams into a small set of highly informative \textit{neural events}, each representing a local spatio-temporal context window with a discrete learnable code. Every time this code flips, a neural event is triggered, yielding a highly compressed data stream. We demonstrate that, across object detection and classification, networks trained on neural events are on par or surpass the performance of state-of-the-art approaches while reducing the event rate by a factor of 2.0.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经事件框架，通过离散异步自编码器将事件流重token化为少量高信息量代码，实现2倍压缩并保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机输出连续低语义事件流，现有方法难以平衡细粒度时间动态与数据吞吐量。高分辨率事件导致计算负担重，而简单下采样会丢失时空信息。本文旨在通过重新标记事件流为离散可学习代码，在保留关键动态信息的同时大幅压缩数据，解决性能与效率的权衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出离散异步自编码器框架，将事件流分割为局部时空上下文窗口，每个窗口通过自编码器学习一个离散代码（神经事件）。代码翻转时触发新事件，形成高度压缩的异步流。关键创新在于代码本可学习且离散，使每个神经事件代表一段语义丰富的时空片段，降低冗余。
light_analysis.result: 在目标检测和分类任务上，基于神经事件的网络性能与最先进方法持平或更优，同时将事件率降低2.0倍。压缩后的数据流在保持甚至提升准确率的前提下，显著减少了后续处理的数据量，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出神经事件概念，有效解决了事件流压缩与语义提取的矛盾。学术上提出了一种新的事件表示范式，实际中可降低带宽和计算成本。未来可探索更大规模代码本或结合其他传感器模态。

title: Leverage Is Not Reach: A Control-Window Law for Single-Neuron Steering in Language Models
abstract: Aligned language models gate behaviors such as refusal and language routing through sparse feed forward neurons, yet no theory predicts when a single neuron intervention controls a behavior coherently rather than collapsing the output. We develop a budget normalized control window framework for single neuron steering. A dose along one write direction reduces to one control coordinate: the alignment between the residual stream and the write, driven along a universal saturation curve in units of a coherence budget set by the residual norm divided by the write norm. Coherent control exists when a behavior trigger lies below the collapse ceiling. The same coordinate governs benign mode switches and refusal; the ceiling follows from weights and one generic forward pass, while triggers are measured at rollout. On fifteen held out neurons, the predicted ceiling has mean absolute error 0.14, about 0.07 in bulk layers, and the committed open or closed verdict holds on eleven against a ten of fifteen majority baseline. Closed cases expose three failure modes rather than violations: collapse before trigger, too little depth to propagate, or a normalization that caps how far one neuron can push. The law explains why local gradient attribution anti predicts control: true controllers write off the readout axis and carry a near zero first order gradient. A forward only contrastive screen made precise by the window recovers controllers that attribution misses. On refusal, the hardest case, intervention success is typed, not scalar: coherent bypass and strict actionable reach separate, so a neuron can flip refusal in fluent, on task text with no actionable content, and genuine actionable reach appears only for three of six audited Llama pivots and only at later rollout horizons. Single neuron steering is therefore a budgeted, typed audit of controllability rather than a fixed dose anecdote.

light_analysis.overview: 提出预算归一化控制窗口框架，解释单神经元干预何时实现相干控制而非输出崩溃，并应用于语言模型拒绝行为审计。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型通过稀疏前馈神经元控制拒绝等行为，但现有理论无法预测单神经元干预何时能连贯地控制行为而非导致输出崩溃。该研究旨在建立一种可量化的理论框架，用于解释和预测单神经元干预的有效性边界，从而提升对语言模型内部机制的理解和可控性。
light_analysis.method: 提出预算归一化控制窗口框架，将沿写入方向的一次干预简化为一个控制坐标：残差流与写入的对齐程度，沿通用饱和曲线变化，其相干预算由残差范数除以写入范数设定。相干控制存在当行为触发点低于崩溃天花板，天花板可从权重和一次前向传播计算，触发点通过滚动测量。使用对比筛选法恢复归因法遗漏的真正控制器。
light_analysis.result: 在15个保留神经元上，预测天花板平均绝对误差为0.14（批量层约0.07），对11个神经元（基线为10/15多数）的开关判定正确。封闭案例揭示了三种失败模式而非违规。提出的对比筛选法能恢复归因法遗漏的控制器。对拒绝行为，干预成功被分为两种类型：相干旁路和严格可操作可达，仅三个监督Llama pivot在后期滚动水平显示真正的可操作可达。
light_analysis.conclusion: 单神经元干预不是固定的剂量干预，而是基于预算的、类型化的可控性审计。该工作提供了理论框架和实用方法，可准确预测单神经元控制的边界和模式，有助于理解语言模型的内部行为和可解释性。未来可扩展至更复杂干预或多种行为模式。

title: 3D-PLOT-LLM: Part-Level Object Tokens for 3D Large Language Models
abstract: 3D multimodal large language models (3D MLLMs) describe a 3D object as a whole but cannot address, name, or reason about its parts. Prior part-aware attempts add segmentation decoders, heavier 3D encoders, or bounding-box grammars at substantial parameter cost. We take a fundamentally different path: we reorganize the input token stream so that parts become directly addressable through the LLM's own vocabulary. Our model, 3D-PLOT-LLM, partitions the frozen point encoder's patches into K locally coherent regions and inserts, before each region's patch tokens, a learnable per-region marker and a reserved vocabulary token <part_k>; a Marker-Space Refinement (MSR) module then conditions each marker on its region's spatial statistics and adjacency neighbors. The model thus cites parts in its output and follows prompts that refer to parts by token, a capability absent from prior object-level 3D MLLMs. To probe this interface, we construct PartVerse-QA, a vocabulary-level part-QA benchmark adapted from PartVerse mesh annotations (77K training pairs and 588 held-out queries on disjoint object splits), on which 3D-PLOT-LLM reaches caption-to-slots Jaccard 0.459 and Exact-match 13.78%, with a slot-to-caption GPT-4o judge of 44.68. On the 3DCoMPaT-GrIn part-aware grounded description benchmark, 3D-PLOT-LLM outperforms PointLLM, Kestrel, PARIS3D, and SegPoint on every text-output metric, and ShapeLLM on 3 of 4, with up to +3.03 GPT-4o judge over PointLLM. On Objaverse whole-object captioning, adding PartVerse-QA at Stage 2 yields +0.65 SBERT and +1.85 GPT-4o over PointLLM, and tops PointLLM-PiSA on 4 of 5 traditional metrics (SBERT, SimCSE, BLEU-1, METEOR) despite targeting a different (part-grounded) objective. All with under 1M new trainable parameters on a frozen point encoder, an order of magnitude below prior part-aware 3D MLLMs, and no segmentation decoder or bounding-box head.

light_analysis.overview: 提出3D-PLOT-LLM，通过重新组织输入token流，使LLM能以词汇级标记和推理3D物体部件，无需额外解码器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）将物体整体描述，无法处理、命名或推理其部件。先前部件感知方法需添加分割解码器、更重的3D编码器或边界框语法，参数开销大。本文旨在以轻量、高效的方式实现部件级推理能力，使LLM直接通过自身词汇表访问部件。
light_analysis.method: 3D-PLOT-LLM将冻结的点编码器的patch分割成K个局部连贯区域，在每个区域前插入可学习的区域标记和保留词汇token <part_k>；Marker-Space Refinement（MSR）模块根据区域空间统计和邻域信息调节标记。模型输出可直接引用部件，并支持通过token提示部件。构建PartVerse-QA基准（77K训练对、588测试查询）评估部件级问答。所有额外参数<1M，无需分割解码器。
light_analysis.result: 在PartVerse-QA上，caption-to-slots Jaccard达0.459，Exact-match 13.78%，slot-to-caption GPT-4o judge 44.68。在3DCoMPaT-GrIn部件级描述基准上，所有文本指标均超越PointLLM、Kestrel、PARIS3D、SegPoint，且在4项中3项超越ShapeLLM，GPT-4o judge比PointLLM提升+3.03。在Objaverse整体描述上，添加PartVerse-QA后比PointLLM在SBERT提升+0.65、GPT-4o提升+1.85，并在4/5传统指标上优于PointLLM-PiSA。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种参数高效的部件级3D MLLM，通过词汇级标记实现部件引用和推理，无需分割解码器或边界框头。在多个基准上取得优于或媲美更复杂方法的性能。局限性包括K值选择影响区域划分质量，未来工作可探索动态K值及更细粒度部件推理。该工作为3D MLLM的部件感知能力提供了新范式。

title: When, Where, and How: Adaptive Binning for Tabular Self-Supervised Learning
abstract: Medical tabular data are ubiquitous in clinical research, but deep learning for tables remains underexplored because reliable labels often require costly expert adjudication, even though structured clinical variables are routinely available in tabular form. Self-supervised learning can leverage these unlabeled tables, and recent binning-based pretexts offer a promising inductive bias, but existing objectives fix a single global quantile discretization and apply feature-agnostic supervision. We propose Adaptive Binning, a training-adaptive discretization pretext for tabular SSL that couples discretization to learning through a feature-wise coarse-to-fine curriculum. Motivated by the spectral bias of neural networks and the principles of curriculum learning, our method progressively refines discretization per feature upon plateau detection and selects representation-aware splits to jointly improve value-space concentration and representation-space coherence. A heterogeneity-aware objective unifies categorical reconstruction with ordinal supervision for numerical features, and experiments on public medical tabular datasets under unified evaluation protocols show consistent gains for linear probing and fine-tuning without dataset-specific discretization tuning. We further introduce a medical tabular SSL benchmark with standardized protocols to support reproducible progress in this underexplored domain. Our code is available at https://github.com/labhai/Adaptive-Binning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应分箱方法，通过训练自适应的逐特征粗到细课程学习，改进了表格自监督学习中的离散化预文本任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗表格数据在临床研究中普遍存在，但深度学习在表格上的应用尚未充分探索，因为可靠标签通常需要昂贵的专家判断。自监督学习可以利用无标签表格数据，但现有基于分箱的预文本方法固定使用单个全局分位数离散化，并应用与特征无关的监督，限制了表示学习的效果。因此，需要一种能够自适应于训练过程的离散化方法，以更好地捕捉特征间的结构和提升表示质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应分箱方法，将离散化与学习过程耦合，通过逐特征的粗到细课程学习实现。基于神经网络的谱偏置和课程学习原理，方法在检测到平台期时逐步细化每个特征的分箱，并选择表示感知的分裂点，以同时改善值空间集中性和表示空间一致性。利用异质性感知目标函数统一了分类重构和数值特征的序数监督。使用公共医疗表格数据集，无需数据集特定的分箱调整。
light_analysis.result: 在公共医疗表格数据集上，采用统一评估协议进行实验，线性探测和微调均显示一致的性能提升，无需数据集特定的分箱调参。与固定分箱基线相比，该方法在不同任务上获得了更优的表示质量。论文还引入了医疗表格自监督学习基准，提供标准化协议以支持可重复研究。具体数值指标摘要未明确说明，但声称获得一致性提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自适应分箱为表格自监督学习提供了一种有效的离散化策略，通过动态调整分箱粒度提升了表示学习性能。该方法在医疗表格数据上展示了实际应用价值，避免了手动分箱调参，具有较好的泛化性。未来的工作可探索更复杂的课程学习策略或扩展到其他类型数据。代码已开源，促进了该领域的可重复研究。

title: Enhancing Graph Neural Networks Using Proximity Graphs for Dust Source Emission Forecasting
abstract: Accurate prediction of dust source emissions is critical for mitigating the significant environmental and health hazards posed by dust storms. Traditional forecasting methods often struggle to capture the complex spatiotemporal dynamics of these phenomena.   In this paper, we demonstrate that proximity graphs enable Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to effectively model the intricate spatial and temporal relationships between data points. Specifically, we use proximity graphs--such as Delaunay triangulation, Gabriel graph, k-Nearest Neighbor graph, and Yao graph--as the input for GNNs (including GraphSAGE, Graph Convolutional Networks, and Graph Attention Networks) to perform message passing.   Our approach highlights the effectiveness of integrating proximity graphs with GNNs for robust and accurate dust source forecasting. To emphasize the importance of proximity graph representations, we compare our method against GNNs using random graphs for message passing. The results show that GNNs with proximity graphs significantly outperform those with random graphs and are also far superior to Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) model in dust source emission forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 利用近邻图增强图神经网络，有效建模沙尘源排放的时空动态，显著提升预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 沙尘暴造成严重的环境和健康危害，但传统预测方法难以捕捉其复杂的时空动态。现有图神经网络虽能处理图结构数据，但图构建方式至关重要。随机图表现不佳，亟需有效的图结构来建模空间关系，以提高沙尘源排放预测的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 采用Delaunay三角剖分、Gabriel图、k-最近邻图和Yao图四种近邻图作为图神经网络的输入，使用GraphSAGE、图卷积网络和图注意力网络进行消息传递。通过与随机图对比，验证近邻图在图结构上的优势。数据集为沙尘源排放相关时空数据，未具体说明。
light_analysis.result: 基于近邻图的图神经网络在预测性能上显著优于使用随机图的图神经网络，并大幅超过长短期记忆网络。具体提升幅度未给出，但定性表明近邻图能更好地捕获空间关系，实现鲁棒且准确的预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明近邻图与图神经网络结合在沙尘源排放预测中的有效性，为环境监测提供新思路。该方法可推广至其他时空预测任务。未来可探索更多近邻图变体或自适应图结构，以进一步提升模型泛化能力。

title: CSWinUNETR: Segmentation of Thin Anatomical Structures in Medical Images
abstract: Accurate segmentation of thin, tortuous anatomical structures, such as retinal vessels, cerebral vasculature, and facial wrinkles, remains challenging due to low contrast, frequent discontinuities, and severe class imbalance. Although recent convolutional and Transformer-based models have improved performance, they often yield fragmented predictions and fail to recover fine branches. We propose CSWinUNETR, a general-purpose backbone for 2D and 3D thin-structure segmentation. It employs cross-shaped stripe self-attention to model long-range principal-axis context and incorporates cyclic shifts to enhance information exchange across stripes. To better preserve fine-grained details, we further introduce a detail-enhanced multi-scale self-attention module that aggregates contextual features from multi-resolution representations. In addition, we propose sparse-control dynamic snake convolution, which reconstructs reliable dense curvilinear kernels from sparsely predicted control points to better follow tortuous geometry. Extensive experiments on four benchmarks across ophthalmology, neurovascular imaging, and dermatology demonstrate that CSWinUNETR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods without task-specific post-processing or topology-aware losses. The code is available at https://github.com/labhai/CSWinUNETR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CSWinUNETR，一种用于2D/3D薄结构分割的通用骨干网络，通过十字形条带自注意力与稀疏控制动态蛇形卷积提升细长曲折结构的分割精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 薄且曲折的解剖结构（如视网膜血管、脑血管）因低对比度、间断性和类别不均衡而难以分割。现有CNN和Transformer模型常产生碎片化预测，无法恢复精细分支。该研究旨在设计一个通用骨干，无需任务特定后处理或拓扑损失，即可准确分割此类结构。
light_analysis.method: CSWinUNETR采用十字形条带自注意力建模长程主轴向上下文，并通过循环移位增强条带间信息交换。引入细节增强多尺度自注意力模块聚合多分辨率特征。提出稀疏控制动态蛇形卷积，从稀疏预测控制点重建可靠密集曲线核以拟合曲折几何。
light_analysis.result: 在四个眼科学、神经血管成像和皮肤病学基准上，CSWinUNETR持续优于最先进方法，且无需任务特定后处理或拓扑感知损失。具体性能提升及对比数据在论文中详述。
light_analysis.conclusion: CSWinUNETR提供了一种高效、通用的薄结构分割方案，适用于2D和3D医学图像。其设计避免了对后处理或复杂损失的依赖，具有临床实用价值。未来可探索更多类型薄结构的应用及与其他任务的结合。

title: TelcoAgent: A Scalable 5G Multi-KPM Forecasting With 3GPP-Grounded Explainability
authors: V V N K Someswara Rao Koduri
abstract: Key Performance Measurement (KPM) forecasting is essential for proactive network management of 5G and next-generation telecom networks. However, existing machine learning (ML) approaches face significant limitations in scalability and explainability, restricting their effectiveness in real-world deployments. We propose TelcoAgent, a foundation model-based framework that enables accurate, scalable, and explainable forecasting of multiple KPMs across diverse network cells without the need for site-specific training. Specifically, the framework comprises three key components: (i) an automated three-agent pipeline that constructs a 3rd Generation Partnership Project (3GPP) knowledge graph directly from specification documents, (ii) a scalable, time-series foundation model (TSFM)-based prediction pipeline to deliver accurate, zero-shot forecasting, and finally (iii) a reasoning and explanation pipeline that provides actionable, domain-grounded diagnostics. Evaluated using a 3-month, real-world, city-scale 5G KPM dataset from a U.S.-based network operator, TelcoAgent demonstrates high forecasting accuracy for all 7 considered KPMs per cell across 200 cells, while delivering explainable insights and actionable instructions to address network degradations.
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to IEEE GLOBECOM 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TelcoAgent框架，结合3GPP知识图谱和基础模型，实现5G多KPM的可扩展、可解释预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器学习方法在5G关键性能指标（KPM）预测中面临可扩展性和可解释性不足的问题，需针对每个站点单独训练，且缺乏业务可理解的诊断，限制了实际部署。
light_analysis.method: TelcoAgent包含三个核心组件：1）基于自动化三智能体管道从3GPP规范构建知识图谱；2）基于时间序列基础模型（TSFM）的零样本预测管道；3）推理和解释管道提供基于领域知识的可操作诊断。
light_analysis.result: 在美国运营商三个月、城市级真实5G KPM数据集上，对200个小区、7个KPM实现高精度预测，同时提供可解释的洞察和网络退化处理指令。
light_analysis.conclusion: TelcoAgent提供了一种可扩展、可解释的5G KPM预测方案，无需站点级训练，具有实际部署价值；未来可扩展至更多KPM和网络类型。

title: CREDENCE: Claim Reduction for Decomposition & Enhanced Credibility -- Semantic Metrics and Convergence Analysis
abstract: Decomposing compound sentences into atomic, verifiable claims is a prerequisite for reliable automated fact-checking. Prior work has relied on token-overlap (Jaccard) metrics that systematically underestimate decomposition quality for paraphrastic claims, and has lacked formal termination analysis for the repair loop. We present Credence, a revised claim decomposition and evaluation framework addressing both shortcomings. Our contributions are: (1) Semantic-F1: we use BGE-large cosine similarity fidelity metric that resolves Jaccard's penalisation and improves downstream fact-checking accuracy; (2) Convergence theorems: we formally characterise four properties of the repair pipeline, establishing that rule-based repair is monotone and finitely terminating under an oracle parser assumption; LLM-based self-repair is provably non-monotone and requires an early-exit guard; (3) Three evaluation benchmarks spanning social-media, encyclopaedic, and news domains for cross-domain generalisation measurement; (4) Multi-model benchmarking across four decomposer models (3.8B-12B) and a closed API model. Experiments on SocialClaimSplit, WikiSplitBench, and ClaimDecompBench show that Semantic-F1 outperforms Jaccard-F1 by +15-32pp. EPR ranges from 0.94 to 1.00 on SocialClaimSplit and WikiSplitBench, while ClaimDecompBench includes lower base EPR cases (down to 0.824) due to harder news-domain constructions, and rule-repair reduces the Atomicity Violation Rate (AVR) by 47-100% relative to the base model without degrading fidelity.
comment: 40 pages, 6 figures, 19 tables. Submitted to Language Resources and Evaluation

light_analysis.overview: 提出CREDENCE框架，通过语义相似度指标和收敛分析改进原子声明分解与评估，提升事实验证准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动事实验证中，复合句分解为原子声明时依赖Jaccard指标，系统性低估释义声明的质量，且缺乏对修复循环的终止性分析。这导致分解质量评估不准确，进而影响下游事实核查的可靠性。因此，需要一种更语义化的评估指标和严格的收敛理论来确保分解流程的有效性和可终止性。
light_analysis.method: 提出CREDENCE框架，包含：(1) Semantic-F1指标，使用BGE-large余弦相似度替代Jaccard，解决释义惩罚问题；(2) 收敛定理，形式化规则修复的单调性与有限终止性，并指出LLM自修复的非单调性需早停保护；(3) 三个跨领域基准（社交媒体、百科、新闻）用于泛化评估；(4) 多模型对比，涵盖4个分解模型（3.8B-12B）和闭源API模型。
light_analysis.result: 在SocialClaimSplit、WikiSplitBench和ClaimDecompBench上，Semantic-F1比Jaccard-F1提升15-32个百分点；EPR在SocialClaimSplit和WikiSplitBench上达0.94-1.00，ClaimDecompBench因新闻领域难度较低（0.824）；规则修复使原子性违规率（AVR）相对基础模型降低47-100%，且不降低保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: CREDENCE通过语义指标和收敛分析显著改进了声明分解的质量评估和流程可靠性，提升了事实验证准确性。跨领域基准表明方法具有良好的泛化性。未来可探索更复杂的修复策略及开放域分解。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Reward Modeling for Stable RLHF
abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) aligns large language models by training reward models on preference data and optimizing policies to maximize predicted rewards. However, this pipeline faces two fundamental challenges: (1) reward models cannot signal when their predictions are unreliable, since they usually act as deterministic point estimators; and (2) modern group-based policy optimization can amplify unreliable reward signals, as exemplified by GRPO's uniform treatment of rewards during advantage computation. As policies explore increasingly diverse responses, these two limitations create a critical vulnerability: unreliable reward estimates may be granted disproportionate influence, triggering severe reward hacking. We propose Uncertainty-Aware Reward Modeling (UARM), which equips reward models with calibrated uncertainty via quantile-based conformal prediction and reweights GRPO advantages through heteroscedastic variance decomposition. Experiments across HelpSteer, UltraFeedback, and PKU-SafeRLHF demonstrate that UARM significantly improves reward model calibration, reduces reward hacking, and enhances downstream alignment quality compared to standard GRPO and uncertainty-agnostic baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出不确定性感知奖励建模（UARM），通过分位数保形预测校准不确定性并重加权GRPO优势，以缓解RLHF中的奖励破解问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准RLHF使用确定性奖励模型，无法指示预测可靠性；而现代基于组的策略优化（如GRPO）在优势计算时统一处理奖励，导致不可靠的奖励估计可能被赋予过大权重，引发严重奖励破解。这限制了LLM与人类偏好对齐的稳定性和质量，亟需一种能感知不确定性并稳定训练的奖励建模方法。
light_analysis.method: UARM首先引入基于分位数保形预测的校准机制，使奖励模型输出带有不确定性估计。然后通过异方差方差分解，在GRPO优势计算中对每个响应进行重新加权，降低高不确定性样本的贡献。该方法无需修改策略优化核心算法，仅增强奖励模型输出和优势加权方式。
light_analysis.result: 在HelpSteer、UltraFeedback和PKU-SafeRLHF三个数据集上，UARM显著改善了奖励模型校准性能，减少了奖励破解（例如奖励分数异常攀升），并提升了下游对齐质量，优于标准GRPO和不确定性无关的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: UARM通过为奖励模型注入校准的不确定性并动态调节优势权重，有效抑制了RLHF中的奖励破解，提高了对齐训练的稳定性。其方法简洁通用，可适配各类基于奖励的策略优化框架。未来可探索更细粒度的不确定性分解或在线更新策略下的适配性。

title: Training-Free Metrics for Synthetic Object Detection Data: A Proxy for Detector Performance
abstract: With the recent advent of image generative models, synthetic data are increasingly being used to supplement limited real datasets for training computer vision models. However, not all synthetic datasets improve performance equally, and their effectiveness can only be assessed by training a downstream model, which is computationally expensive and time-consuming. This problem is pronounced in the task of object detection, where the required annotations are much more dense due to bounding boxes. In this paper, we propose a pre-computable metric family, dubbed Conditional-Composition Domain Match (CCDM), which serves as a proxy for the relative utility of candidate synthetic training sets for downstream detection. Experiments on the VisDrone-DET dataset show that the CCDM metric families achieve a Spearman correlation of 1.0 with the downstream performance of YOLOv8, clearly outperforming existing metrics for synthetic image evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CCDM度量族，无需训练即可预测合成数据对目标检测器的效用，与YOLOv8性能的Spearman相关系数达1.0。
light_analysis.motivation: 合成数据常用于补充真实数据集，但不同合成数据集效果差异大，评估需训练下游模型，计算成本高。目标检测标注密集，问题更突出。现有合成图像评估度量不够准确，需要一种预计算代理度量来快速筛选有效合成数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出Conditional-Composition Domain Match (CCDM)度量族，通过计算合成数据集与真实数据集的域匹配度，预测量化候选合成训练集对下游检测器的相对效用。在VisDrone-DET数据集上，使用YOLOv8作为下游检测器进行实验。
light_analysis.result: CCDM度量族与YOLOv8在VisDrone-DET上的下游性能之间的Spearman相关系数达到1.0，显著优于现有的合成图像评估度量，表明CCDM能完美预测合成数据集的相对效用，可大幅节省训练成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: CCDM是一种有效的代理度量，能够无需训练即可评估合成数据集对目标检测任务的适用性，具有重要的实际应用价值。未来可扩展至其他视觉任务或更复杂的生成模型，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Clusters are All You Need: Pre-Training the Tsetlin Machine with Semantic Clusters from Language Models for Interpretability
abstract: Pre-trained language models such as BERT achieve strong text classification performance but lack transparency, limiting their use in high-stakes settings. The Tsetlin Machine (TM) offers fully interpretable, clause-based reasoning but captures little semantic information, and prior attempts to bridge the two rely on static word embeddings that miss contextual meaning. We propose a semantic pre-training framework that transfers knowledge from a pre-trained language model into a TM without using embeddings. Text samples are grouped into semantically coherent clusters with K-means or Top2Vec, and the resulting cluster-sample pairs pre-train a non-negated TM with enhanced Type I feedback. The TM thereby learns interpretable semantic keywords that are fine-tuned on downstream tasks. Across five datasets, our method substantially outperforms vanilla and embedding-based TMs and reaches performance competitive with BERT while remaining interpretable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义预训练框架，通过语言模型的聚类知识预训练Tsetlin Machine，实现可解释性与高性能的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练语言模型如BERT在文本分类中性能出色但缺乏可解释性，限制了高风险场景的应用。Tsetlin Machine可解释但语义信息不足，先前尝试使用静态词嵌入忽略上下文含义。因此需要一种方法将语言模型的知识转移到TM同时保持可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 提出语义预训练框架，不使用嵌入。首先用K-means或Top2Vec将文本样本聚类为语义一致的簇，然后以簇-样本对预训练非否定TM，采用增强Type I反馈。TM从此学习可解释的语义关键词，随后在下游任务上进行微调。该方法避免传统词嵌入的局限性，直接从语言模型的聚类知识中获取语义。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数据集上实验，该方法显著优于普通TM和基于嵌入的TM，性能与BERT相当，同时保持完全可解释性。具体指标未详述，但表明性能提升明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献是将语言模型的聚类知识有效转移到Tsetlin Machine，在不牺牲可解释性的前提下获得接近BERT的性能。学术价值在于为可解释NLP提供新思路，实际应用可用于高风险的文本分类场景。潜在局限或未来工作：可能依赖聚类质量，可探索其他聚类或知识转移方式。

title: Human-on-the-Loop Orchestration for AI-Assisted Legal Discovery
abstract: Autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in electronic discovery (e-discovery), where compounding errors across multi-step reasoning chains can constitute legal malpractice. Unlike single-turn retrieval, agentic workflows operating over privileged document corpora exhibit a class of failure we term "trajectory collapse": an early misclassification silently propagates, rendering an entire privilege review invalid. This paper makes three contributions. First, we propose a structured taxonomy of agentic failures in legal information retrieval, organized by functional stage. Second, we introduce a four-layer verification architecture -- spanning planning, reasoning, execution, and uncertainty quantification -- designed to intercept these failures before they compound. Third, we present a preliminary simulation study on a synthetic e-discovery corpus that demonstrates how mandatory Human-on-the-Loop (HOTL) escalation thresholds reduce privilege-waiver risk relative to fully autonomous baselines. Our results suggest that calibrated uncertainty thresholds can reduce privilege-waiver risk by up to 61% versus fully autonomous deployment, while routing fewer than one quarter of documents to attorney review.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种人机协同编排框架，通过四层验证架构和强制人类介入阈值，拦截AI辅助法律发现中的复合错误，显著降低特权豁免风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主LLM代理在电子发现中的多步推理链易产生复合错误，早期误分类会无声传播导致整个特权审查无效（即轨迹坍塌），构成法律过失。现有方法无法有效拦截这类错误，亟需能够平衡自动化效率与法律风险的人机协同机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个四层验证架构，涵盖计划、推理、执行和不确定性量化四个阶段，以在错误复合前拦截。在此基础上，设计强制人类介入（Human-on-the-Loop）升级阈值，当不确定性超过校准阈值时将文档路由至律师审查。通过合成电子发现语料库进行模拟研究验证方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: 模拟研究表明，采用校准的不确定性阈值相比完全自主部署，特权豁免风险降低最多61%，同时仅需将不到四分之一（<25%）的文档提交律师审查，在风险与效率之间取得平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了LLM代理在特权审查中的轨迹坍塌问题，提供了可量化的安全护栏。其实际应用价值在于降低法律执业风险，未来可扩展至真实电子发现场景，并探索更细粒度的干预策略。

title: Are LLMs Ready to Assist Physicians? PhysAssistBench for Interactive Doctor-Patient-EHR Assistance
abstract: The most plausible near-term role of medical LLMs is to assist rather than replace physicians, yet current evaluations often test isolated capabilities: clinical knowledge, EHR system interaction, or patient communication. Physician assistance instead requires coordinating these capabilities within the same interaction, where physicians issue underspecified requests, patients describe symptoms ambiguously, and EHR systems demand precise tool use. We introduce PhysAssistBench, a benchmark for interactive doctor-patient-EHR assistance. Built from real MIMIC-IV cases, PhysAssistBench uses a scalable pipeline to construct agentic patients: interactive, record-grounded agents that turn static EHR records into multi-turn clinical scenarios while preserving clinical factuality. PhysAssistBench provides a curated bilingual evaluation set of 1,296 manually reviewed and physician-validated turns. Experiments with leading LLMs show that current models remain unreliable in this setting, which exposes a key bottleneck for clinical LLMs: reliable assistance requires coordination across knowledge, communication, and systems, not isolated gains in any of them.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhysAssistBench基准，评估LLMs在交互式医生-患者-EHR辅助中的协调能力，揭示当前模型不可靠。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗LLM评估孤立测试临床知识、EHR交互或患者沟通，但实际辅助需要同时协调这些能力。医生可能提出模糊请求，患者描述症状模糊，EHR系统要求精确工具使用。缺乏评估多任务协调的综合基准，限制了对LLM实际辅助能力的理解。
light_analysis.method: 基于MIMIC-IV病例，通过可扩展流程构建交互式、基于记录的患者代理，将静态EHR转化为多轮临床场景，保持事实准确性。提供1,296个经手动审查和医生验证的中英文双语评估轮次，涵盖医生-患者-EHR交互。
light_analysis.result: 在领先LLMs（如GPT-4等）上的实验表明，模型在该基准下表现不可靠，无法稳定完成多轮辅助任务。关键瓶颈在于需要同时调用知识、沟通和系统能力，而任何单一能力的提升均不足以实现可靠辅助。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhysAssistBench为评估医疗LLM的交互辅助能力提供了标准化基准，揭示了当前模型在综合性任务中的显著局限。未来工作需聚焦于提升LLMs在真实临床场景中的多任务协调能力，而非仅追求单项指标优化。

title: VEPHand: View-Efficient Photometric Hand Performance Capture at Scale
abstract: Robust, high-fidelity 3D hand capture, while fundamental to digital human creation, remains challenging with practical multi-view systems that balance rich photometry with the geometric ambiguities of reconstruction arising from limited viewpoint density. This paper presents an end-to-end pipeline for dynamic hand performance capture and registration, specifically designed for view-efficient setups ($\sim$20 views). We address key challenges with two primary innovations. First, to overcome reconstruction difficulties like limited view overlap and background clutter, our mask-free neural method robustly extracts detailed hand geometry and appearance from unmasked images using scene parameterization and scenario-specific density regularization. Second, addressing registration challenges such as accurately capturing non-linear skin deformations and ensuring plausible results during severe self-contact, we propose a physics-inspired framework. It aligns reconstructions to a personalized hand model by optimizing intrinsic volumetric offsets within its canonical tetrahedral mesh, alongside pose parameters. This approach, supported by robust losses and optimization, captures fine surface deformations, ensures plausible results under severe articulation and self-contact, and demonstrates strong tolerance to input noise. We demonstrate the scalability and robustness of our automated pipeline on an extensive dataset of over 12,000 sequences, from which we also derive a large-scale, high-quality synthetic 2D/3D hand dataset for training downstream tasks. This showcases its effectiveness for single hands, intricate two-hand interactions, and natural hand-object manipulations. Our method achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction fidelity in view-efficient, unmasked scenarios and highly accurate registration. Our project page are available at https://vephand.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VEPHand，一种面向有限视角（约20个）的端到端动态手部捕捉与配准流水线，通过无掩膜神经重建和物理启发式配准实现高保真性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 高保真3D手部捕捉对数字人创建至关重要，但实用多视图系统需平衡丰富光度与有限视角密度带来的几何歧义。现有方法依赖掩膜、难以处理视角重叠有限、背景杂乱、非线性皮肤形变及严重自接触等挑战。因此，亟需一种无需掩膜、对视角高效鲁棒的自动化流水线，以支持大规模、高保真的手部动态捕捉。
light_analysis.method: 提出两步创新：一是无掩膜神经重建方法，通过场景参数化和密度正则化从原始图像中提取手部几何与外观，克服视角重叠和背景干扰；二是物理启发式配准框架，优化规范四面体网格内的内在体积偏移及姿态参数，将重建对齐到个性化手部模型，捕获精细形变并保证严重自接触下的合理性。使用超过12000个序列的数据集训练，并衍生了大规模合成手部数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在视角高效、无掩膜场景下实现了最先进的重建保真度，配准高度准确。在单只手、双手交互和手物操作等任务中均表现有效，展示了良好的可扩展性和鲁棒性。定量上未给出具体数值，但定性结果和消融实验验证了方法优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: VEPHand作为端到端流水线，有效解决了有限视角下动态手部捕捉的多个核心挑战，包括无掩膜重建、非线性形变和自接触处理。学术上推动了3D手部重建和配准技术的发展；实际应用上可服务于数字人创建、虚拟现实和交互系统。未来可扩展至更多视角场景或结合动态纹理。

title: High-Fidelity 4D Hand-Object Capture via Multi-View Spatiotemporal Tracking and Physics-Aware Gaussians
abstract: The growing demand for high-fidelity 4D hand-object interaction (HOI) data in embodied AI and spatial computing is currently bottlenecked by the reliance on pre-scanned object templates and physical markers. While recent methods have demonstrated promising results in reconstructing 4D hand-object interaction from videos, they are highly sensitive to initial estimates of hand and object poses. Yet, estimating these poses from images is challenging, in particular under severe occlusion which is inherent in hand-object interaction scenarios. We propose a novel system for the robust and accurate reconstruction of hands and objects from synchronized and calibrated multi-view videos without requiring any templates or markers. Our system consists of two main components with key innovations: (1) a multi-view feed-forward transformer model that aggregates cross-view geometry and temporal cues to provide a reliable, metric-consistent initialization for both poses and dense object geometry, and (2) a hand-object physics-aware Gaussian-based optimization framework to refine the initial estimates, integrating tetrahedral constraints, collision refinement, and appearance decomposition to produce physically plausible and visually accurate reconstruction. Validated on public benchmarks and an extensive internal dataset, our pipeline achieves highly robust, artifact-free reconstruction, providing an efficient foundation for automated 4D asset generation. Our project page are available at https://zyshen021.github.io/HOSTPG/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需模板或标记的4D手物交互重建系统，结合多视图时空跟踪和物理感知高斯优化，实现鲁棒且高保真的重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 高保真4D手物交互数据在具身AI和空间计算中需求增长，但现有方法依赖预扫描模板和物理标记，且对初始姿态估计敏感，严重遮挡下姿态估计困难，限制了自动化数据生成。本文旨在克服这些局限性。
light_analysis.method: 系统由两部分组成：多视图前馈Transformer聚合跨视图几何和时间线索，为手和物体的姿态及密集几何提供可靠的度量初始化；物理感知高斯优化框架集成了四面体约束、碰撞优化和外观分解，以产生物理合理、视觉准确的重建。无需模板或标记，仅需多视角同步校准视频。
light_analysis.result: 在公开基准和内部数据集上验证，该方法实现了高度鲁棒、无伪影的重建，为自动化4D资产生成提供了高效基础。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但定性上优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一个无需模板或标记的鲁棒4D手物交互重建系统，解决了遮挡下姿态估计的难题，提升了自动化4D资产生成的效率。学术价值在于提出新的多视图时空跟踪和物理感知优化范式，应用价值在于具身AI和空间计算中高质量数据生成。未来工作可扩展至更复杂交互场景。

title: RetailBench: Benchmarking long horizon reasoning and coherent decision making of LLM agents in realistic retail environments
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents have made rapid progress on short-horizon, well-scoped tasks, yet their ability to sustain coherent decisions in dynamic long-horizon environments remains uncertain. We introduce RetailBench, a data-grounded simulation benchmark for evaluating tool-using LLM agents in single-store supermarket operation. RetailBench models retail management as a partially observable decision process and is designed to support thousand-day-scale simulations. In this environment, agents must manage pricing, replenishment, supplier selection, shelf assortment, inventory aging, customer feedback, external events, and cash-flow constraints. We evaluate seven contemporary LLMs under representative agent frameworks over a 180-day evaluation horizon and compare them with a privileged oracle policy. Results show substantial variation across models: only a small subset survives the full evaluation horizon, and even the strongest LLM runs remain substantially behind the oracle policy in final net worth and sales outcomes. Behavioral analysis attributes these gaps to incomplete evidence acquisition, surface-level decision making, and the lack of a consistent long-horizon policy. RetailBench provides a controlled testbed for studying reliable autonomy in economically grounded long-horizon decision-making.
comment: This paper is my paper's second version [see arXiv:2603.16453v2]

light_analysis.overview: 提出RetailBench基准，用于评估LLM代理在动态长期零售环境中的连贯决策能力，实验表明现有模型与最优策略差距显著。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在短期任务表现良好，但在动态长期环境中保持连贯决策的能力未知。零售管理涉及定价、补货、供应商选择等多个复杂因素，现有方法缺乏评估长期决策的基准。该问题对经济领域的可靠自主决策至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建RetailBench模拟基准，将零售管理建模为部分可观察决策过程，支持千天级模拟。涵盖8个管理维度：定价、补货、供应商选择、货架分类、库存老化、客户反馈、外部事件和现金流约束。评估7个当代LLM在代表代理框架下，进行180天评估期，并与特权oracle策略对比。
light_analysis.result: 模型间差异显著，仅少数LLM完整存活180天评估期。最强LLM在最终净值和销售结果上远落后于oracle策略。行为分析将差距归因于证据获取不完全、表面决策和缺乏一致长期策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: RetailBench为经济基础的长期决策提供了可控测试平台，揭示了当前LLM代理在长期连贯决策中的不足。未来可改进策略一致性和长期规划能力，推动可靠自主决策研究。

title: SILAGE: Memory-Efficient, Full-Gradient-Free Nonconvex Optimization for Nested Finite Sums
abstract: Empirical risk minimization on massive datasets naturally exhibits a nested double finite-sum structure, where $N=nm$ total samples are logically or physically partitioned into $n$ blocks of size $m$ (e.g., in pooled data silos, out-of-core learning, or deliberate stratification). While variance-reduced methods achieve optimal oracle complexities for nonconvex objectives, they suffer from severe scaling bottlenecks in this centralized regime. Recursive estimators, such as PAGE, require periodic global full-gradient refreshes over all $nm$ samples, which are computationally expensive. Conversely, single-loop methods, such as SILVER, avoid such refreshes but require an impractical $\mathcal{O}(nm)$ memory footprint to store a control variate for every sample. In this paper, we propose SILAGE, a variance-reduced algorithm that addresses this trade-off.
