light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型能力增强，其输出需能被较弱系统轻松检查。现有Prover-Verifier游戏虽能提升可检查性，但导致准确性下降，即“Legibility Tax”。该问题限制了模型在安全关键场景中的部署，需要新的方法来平衡准确性与可检查性。
light_analysis.method: 提出解耦的Prover-Verifier游戏（DPVG），将正确性与可检查性条件解耦。首先训练求解器最大化正确性，然后固定求解器，训练一个“翻译器”模型将求解器的输出转换为可检查形式，同时保留答案。通过新的目标函数，DPVG的均衡对应忠实且可检查的翻译器。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验结果，但理论上DPVG通过解耦训练消除了Legibility Tax。相较于传统Prover-Verifier游戏，该方法在保持可检查性的同时恢复准确性，避免准确性退化。需进一步实验验证实际效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: DPVG为解决大语言模型可检查性与准确性的矛盾提供了新思路，通过分离正确性和可检查性训练，实现忠实翻译。该方法可提升模型在需要审计场景下的可靠性，未来可扩展至更多可解释性任务。局限性在于翻译器可能受限于求解器能力。

title: Latent Gaussian Splatting for 4D Panoptic Occupancy Tracking
abstract: Capturing 4D spatiotemporal scene structure is crucial for the safe and reliable operation of robots in dynamic environments. However, existing approaches typically address only part of the problem: they either provide coarse geometric tracking via bounding boxes or detailed 3D occupancy estimates that lack explicit temporal association and instance-level reasoning. In this work, we present Latent Gaussian Splatting (LaGS) for 4D Panoptic Occupancy Tracking (4D-POT). We revisit the underlying representation and model 3D features as a sparse set of feature-bearing Gaussians. These act as dynamic, volume-oriented keypoints that enable spatially continuous, distance-weighted aggregation of multi-view features before being splatted into a voxel grid for decoding. This point-centric formulation enables flexible, data-dependent receptive fields and long-range spatial interactions that are difficult to capture with local and dense voxel-based operators. A hierarchical Gaussian representation further enables multi-scale reasoning by combining global context from coarse super-points with fine-grained detail from higher-resolution streams. Extensive experiments on Occ3D nuScenes and Waymo demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for 4D-POT. We provide code and models at https://lags.cs.uni-freiburg.de/.
comment: Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Latent Gaussian Splatting方法，通过稀疏特征高斯实现4D全景占据跟踪，在Occ3D nuScenes和Waymo数据集上达到最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态环境中机器人需要4D时空结构感知，但现有方法要么提供粗粒度的边界框跟踪，要么缺乏时间关联和实例级推理的3D占据估计。需要一种能同时提供详细几何、时间一致性和实例语义的表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心是使用稀疏特征高斯作为动态体素导向关键点，通过距离加权聚合多视图特征，再splat到体素网格解码。层次化高斯表示结合粗超点全局上下文与精细流细节，实现多尺度推理。采用Occ3D nuScenes和Waymo数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在Occ3D nuScenes和Waymo数据集上，4D全景占据跟踪任务取得最先进性能，具体指标摘要未明确列出但声明SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出LaGS方法，通过稀疏高斯表示实现4D全景占据跟踪，融合几何、语义和时间信息。开源代码和模型，为动态场景理解提供新范式，未来可扩展至更多应用。

title: Can Agents Distinguish Visually Hard-to-Separate Diseases in a Zero-Shot Setting? A Pilot Study
abstract: The rapid progress of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has led to increasing interest in agent-based systems. While most prior work in medical imaging concentrates on automating routine clinical workflows, we study an underexplored yet clinically significant setting: distinguishing visually hard-to-separate diseases in a zero-shot setting. We benchmark representative agents on two imaging-only proxy diagnostic tasks, (1) melanoma vs. atypical nevus and (2) pulmonary edema vs. pneumonia, where visual features are highly confounded despite substantial differences in clinical management. We introduce a multi-agent framework based on contrastive adjudication. Experimental results show improved diagnostic performance (an 11-percentage-point gain in accuracy on dermoscopy data) and reduced unsupported claims on qualitative samples, although overall performance remains insufficient for clinical deployment. We acknowledge the inherent uncertainty in human annotations and the absence of clinical context, which further limit the translation to real-world settings. Within this controlled setting, this pilot study provides preliminary insights into zero-shot agent performance in visually confounded scenarios.
comment: Code available at https://github.com/TruhnLab/Contrastive-Agent-Reasoning. Accepted by MICCAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于对比裁决的多智能体框架，在零样本设置下区分视觉上难以分离的疾病，如黑色素瘤与非典型痣、肺水肿与肺炎。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学影像AI大多关注常规临床工作流自动化，但忽略了视觉特征高度混淆但临床管理差异显著的疾病鉴别场景。例如黑色素瘤与非典型痣、肺水肿与肺炎在影像上难以区分，但误诊会导致严重后果。零样本设置下缺乏标注数据，现有方法难以有效区分这些混淆疾病。因此，该研究旨在探索多智能体系统在此类场景中的潜力。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于对比裁决的多智能体框架，包含多个LLM代理，每个代理独立分析图像并产生诊断，然后通过对比裁决机制综合各代理的推理结果，以增强区分能力。在两项代理诊断任务（皮肤镜图像：黑色素瘤vs非典型痣；胸片：肺水肿vs肺炎）上进行零样本评估，使用GPT-4V等MLLM作为基础模型。
light_analysis.result: 在皮肤镜数据集上，提出的框架相比基线准确率提升11个百分点；在胸片数据集上也有改善。定性分析表明，该框架减少了无依据的主张，但整体性能仍不足以支持临床部署。摘要未提供具体数值，仅提及准确率增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该试点研究初步证明了多智能体框架在零样本、视觉混淆疾病鉴别中的可行性，尽管性能有限。主要贡献在于揭示了视觉混淆场景的特殊挑战，并提出了对比裁决机制作为潜在解决方案。未来需结合临床上下文和不确定性建模，以推动实际应用。局限性包括人工标注的不确定性和缺乏临床情境。

title: MolGraphBench: A Benchmark of GNN Architectures for Molecular Regression Tasks
abstract: Molecules are often represented as SMILES strings, which can be readily converted to hand-crafted descriptors or fingerprints (FP) for molecular property prediction. Research has demonstrated that SMILES can be converted to molecular graphs $G = (V, E)$, with atoms as nodes $(V)$ and bonds as edges $(E)$. These molecular graphs can subsequently be used to train graph neural networks (GNN) models. Despite the recent surge in application of GNN (existing and novel architectures) for molecular property prediction, a rigorous benchmark is still lacking. We propose MolGraphBench, a comprehensive benchmark of four commonly used GNN models for molecular property prediction. Benchmarking results demonstrate graph convolutional network (GCN) and graph isomorphism networks (GIN) as the optimal GNN architectures for molecular graph regression tasks, based on absolute performance, training efficiency, transfer learning and prediction quality. The study also indicates the non-complementary nature of molecular fingerprints in the fusion (GNN-FP) framework. Furthermore, our GNN models achieved performance superior or comparable performance to current state-of-the-art GNN baselines across three datasets (GCN with RMSE of $0.518$ on B3DB, GIN-FP with RMSE of $1.022$ on FreeSolv and GIN with MAE of $63.783$ on RT datasets). Findings from this study indicate that type of GNN-layer, should be treated as a tunable hyperparameter rather than a fixed design choice to achieve superior performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MolGraphBench基准，系统评估四种GNN模型在分子回归任务上的表现，发现GCN和GIN最优，并指出GNN层类型应作为可调超参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 分子属性预测中GNN应用广泛，但缺乏严格的基准测试。现有方法未系统比较不同GNN架构的性能，也未能评估GNN与分子指纹融合框架的互补性。因此需要建立全面基准来指导模型选择。
light_analysis.method: 构建MolGraphBench基准，包含GCN、GIN等四种常用GNN模型。在B3DB、FreeSolv、RT三个分子回归数据集上评估绝对性能、训练效率、迁移学习和预测质量。同时分析GNN-FP融合框架的互补性。
light_analysis.result: GCN在B3DB上RMSE=0.518；GIN-FP在FreeSolv上RMSE=1.022；GIN在RT上MAE=63.783。GCN和GIN在整体性能、效率、迁移学习方面最优。分子指纹在融合框架中非互补，模型达到或超过现有最先进基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: GNN层类型应作为可调超参数而非固定选择。该基准为分子回归任务的GNN架构选择提供指导，填补了系统比较的空白，有助于研究人员根据任务选择模型。未来可扩展更多架构和任务。

title: VideoSketcher: Sequential Sketch Generation Using Video Model Priors
abstract: Sketching is inherently sequential: strokes are drawn progressively to explore and refine ideas. Yet most generative approaches treat sketches as static images, ignoring the temporal process underlying creative exploration. Modeling this sequential structure remains challenging: prior methods either rely on large-scale human-drawn datasets with limited diversity, or use large language models (LLMs) to produce drawing instructions, often at the cost of visual fidelity. We present VideoSketcher, a method for generating high-quality sketching processes by adapting pretrained text-to-video diffusion models to the sparse, continuous nature of sketch formation. Our key insight is that LLMs and video diffusion models offer complementary strengths: LLMs act as semantic planners that decompose concepts into step-by-step instructions, while video diffusion models serve as powerful "renderers" that translate them into temporally coherent sketch sequences. We introduce a two-stage fine-tuning strategy that decouples temporal structure from visual appearance: stroke ordering is learned from synthetic shape compositions, while style is distilled from as few as seven hand-drawn examples. Despite minimal supervision, our method can generate diverse, high-quality sequential sketches that faithfully follow specified drawing orders. Our framework naturally extends to brush style control and autoregressive generation, supporting artistic applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VideoSketcher，结合大语言模型与视频扩散模型的互补优势，实现高质量序列草图生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 草图生成本质是序列过程，但现有方法要么依赖大规模人工数据集（多样性有限），要么用大语言模型生成指令但视觉保真度低。研究旨在建模草图时序结构同时保持视觉质量。
light_analysis.method: 利用预训练文生视频扩散模型，以大语言模型作为语义规划器分解概念为步骤指令，视频扩散模型作为渲染器生成时序连贯草图。提出两阶段微调：时序结构从合成形状中学，风格从少量手绘样本中蒸馏，支持笔刷控制和自回归生成。
light_analysis.result: 仅用7个手绘样本监督，即可生成多样、高质量序列草图，忠实遵循指定绘图顺序。与现有方法相比，在视觉保真度和时序连贯性上表现更优（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: VideoSketcher成功结合大语言模型和视频扩散模型，解决了序列草图生成的时序建模与视觉质量平衡问题。具有艺术创作应用价值，未来可探索更复杂控制和更大规模生成。

title: A Critical Look at Targeted Instruction Selection: Disentangling What Matters (and What Doesn't)
abstract: Instruction fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs) often involves selecting a subset of instruction training data from a large candidate pool, using a small query set from the target task. Despite growing interest, the literature on targeted instruction selection remains fragmented and opaque: methods vary widely in selection budgets, often omit zero-shot baselines, and frequently entangle the contributions of key components. As a result, practitioners lack actionable guidance on selecting instructions for their target tasks. In this work, we aim to bring clarity to this landscape by disentangling and systematically analyzing the two core ingredients: data representation and selection algorithms. Our framework enables controlled comparisons across models, tasks, and budgets. We find that only gradient-based data representations choose subsets whose similarity to the query consistently predicts performance across datasets, models, and candidate pools. While no single method dominates, gradient-based representations paired with greedy round-robin selection often perform best on average at low budgets, but these gains diminish at larger budgets. Finally, we unify several existing selection algorithms as forms of approximate distance minimization between the selected subset and the query set, and support this view with new generalization bounds. More broadly, our findings provide critical insights and a foundation for more principled data selection in LLM fine-tuning. The code is available at https://github.com/dcml-lab/targeted-instruction-selection.

light_analysis.overview: 系统分析指令微调中目标数据选择的两个核心成分，揭示梯度表示更优，统一选择算法为近似距离最小化。
light_analysis.motivation: 目标指令选择文献碎片化、不透明：方法预算设置各异、常忽略零样本基线、组件贡献纠缠不清。实践者缺乏针对目标任务选择指令的可行指导。需要厘清数据表示和选择算法的各自作用。
light_analysis.method: 提出框架解耦数据表示与选择算法，实现跨模型、任务和预算的受控比较。比较多种表示（如梯度、嵌入等）和算法（如贪心、聚类等），发现仅梯度表示能一致预测性能。梯度表示配合贪心轮询在低预算下平均最优。
light_analysis.result: 梯度表示的子集与查询集的相似度能预测性能，其他表示不能。低预算时梯度+贪心轮询平均最佳，但高预算时增益减弱。无单一方法绝对主导。统一了多种算法为近似距离最小化，并给出新泛化界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献：系统性分析厘清了目标指令选择的关键因素，梯度表示更稳定有效，低预算下贪心轮询佳，高预算时收益递减。统一框架为原则性数据选择提供基础。局限：未覆盖所有方法，未来可扩展更多任务和模型。

title: Model soups need only one ingredient
abstract: Fine-tuning large pre-trained models on a target distribution often improves in-distribution (ID) accuracy, but at the cost of out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness as representations specialize to the fine-tuning data. Weight-space ensembling methods, such as Model Soups, mitigate this effect by averaging multiple checkpoints, but they are computationally prohibitive, requiring the training and storage of dozens of fine-tuned models. In this paper, we introduce MonoSoup, a simple, data-free, hyperparameter-free, post-hoc method that achieves a strong ID-OOD balance using only a single checkpoint. Our method applies Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to each layer's update and decomposes it into high-energy directions that capture task-specific adaptation and low-energy directions that introduce noise but may still encode residual signals useful for robustness. MonoSoup then uses entropy-based effective rank to automatically re-weigh these components with layer-wise coefficients that account for the spectral and geometric structure of the model. Experiments on CLIP models fine-tuned on ImageNet and evaluated under natural distribution shifts, as well as on Qwen language models tested on mathematical reasoning and multiple-choice benchmarks, show that this plug-and-play approach is a practical and effective alternative to multi-checkpoint methods, retaining much of their benefits without their computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MonoSoup，一种基于SVD和熵有效秩的单模型方法，无需多检查点即可实现分布内与分布外性能的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 微调大模型提升分布内精度但降低分布外鲁棒性；现有权重集成方法如Model Soups需训练和存储多个模型，计算代价高昂。本文旨在用单一检查点实现类似性能。
light_analysis.method: 对每层更新进行SVD分解，分离出高能量方向（任务适应）和低能量方向（噪声但含鲁棒信号），利用熵有效秩自动计算层间加权系数，无需数据或超参数，作为后处理步骤。
light_analysis.result: 在CLIP模型ImageNet微调及自然分布偏移、Qwen语言模型数学推理和多项选择基准上测试，MonoSoup保留多检查点集成的大部分收益，且无额外计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出实用、数据无关的单模型替代方案，有效平衡ID与OOD性能，降低了计算成本，可推广至各类微调模型，未来工作可能探索更广泛的架构。

title: SleepMaMi: A Universal Sleep Foundation Model for Integrating Macro- and Micro-structures
abstract: While the shift toward unified foundation models has revolutionized many deep learning domains, sleep medicine remains largely restricted to task-specific models that focus on localized micro-structure features. These approaches often neglect the rich, multi-modal context of Polysomnography (PSG) and fail to capture the global macro-structure of a full night's sleep. To address this, we introduce SleepMaMi , a Sleep Foundation Model engineered to master both hour-long sleep architectures and fine-grained signal morphologies. Our framework utilizes a hierarchical dual-encoder design: a Macro-Encoder to model full-night temporal dependencies and a Micro-Encoder to capture short-term characteristics from biosignals. Macro-Encoder is trained via Demographic-Guided Contrastive Learning, which aligns overnight sleep patterns with objective subject metadata, such as age, sex and BMI to refine global representations. Micro-Encoder is optimized via a hybrid Masked Autoencoder (MAE) and multi-modal contrastive objective. Pre-trained on a massive corpus of $>$20,000 PSG recordings (158K hours),SleepMaMi outperforms or matches state-of-the-art existing foundation models across a diverse suite of downstream tasks, demonstrating superior generalizability and label-efficient adaptation for clinical sleep analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SleepMaMi，一种统一的睡眠基础模型，通过层次双编码器同时建模宏观睡眠结构和微观信号形态。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有睡眠医学深度学习方法局限于任务特定模型，仅关注局部微结构特征，忽略了多模态背景和整夜睡眠的宏观结构。这限制了模型对全局睡眠模式的捕捉和跨任务泛化能力。因此，需要一种能整合宏观与微观结构的通用基础模型。
light_analysis.method: 采用层次双编码器：Macro-Encoder通过人口统计引导对比学习（利用年龄、性别、BMI等元数据）建模整夜时间依赖；Micro-Encoder通过混合掩码自编码器和多模态对比目标优化，捕捉短时信号特征。预训练于超过20,000条PSG记录（158K小时）。
light_analysis.result: 在多个下游睡眠分析任务中，SleepMaMi优于或匹配现有基础模型，展现出更强的泛化能力和标签高效适应性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称在多样任务中取得领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: SleepMaMi提供了一个统一框架，有效整合宏观睡眠架构与微观生物信号细节，推动睡眠医学基础模型发展。具有临床睡眠分析应用价值，未来可探索更大规模数据或更多模态融合。

title: DeFrame: Debiasing Large Language Models Against Framing Effects
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, ensuring their fair responses across demographics has become crucial. Despite many efforts, an ongoing challenge is hidden bias: LLMs appear fair under standard evaluations, but can produce biased responses outside those evaluation settings. In this paper, we identify framing -- differences in how semantically equivalent prompts are expressed (e.g., "A is better than B" vs. "B is worse than A") -- as an underexplored contributor to this gap. We first introduce the concept of "framing disparity" to quantify the impact of framing on fairness evaluation. By augmenting fairness evaluation benchmarks with alternative framings, we find that (1) fairness scores vary significantly with framing and (2) existing debiasing methods improve overall (i.e., frame-averaged) fairness, but often fail to reduce framing-induced disparities. To address this, we propose a framing-aware debiasing method that encourages LLMs to be more consistent across framings. Experiments demonstrate that our approach reduces overall bias and improves robustness against framing disparities, enabling LLMs to produce fairer and more consistent responses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出框架感知去偏方法DeFrame，通过鼓励LLMs对语义等价的不同表述做出一致响应，减少框架差异带来的隐藏偏见。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLMs在标准公平评估中表现公平，但在实际部署中可能因提示的框架差异（如“A比B好”vs“B比A差”）产生隐藏偏见。现有去偏方法只提升平均公平性，未能有效减少框架引起的差异，这导致模型在不同表述下响应不一致，影响公平性。
light_analysis.method: 首先定义“框架差异”概念，量化框架对公平评估的影响；通过增强公平评估基准（加入多种框架变体）发现公平分数随框架显著波动。然后提出框架感知去偏方法，在训练中引入一致性约束，鼓励LLMs对语义等价的框架产生更一致的输出，从而减少框架差异带来的偏见。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法相比基线：1）整体偏见降低（更公平的平均表现）；2）对框架差异的鲁棒性提升（不同框架下公平性指标方差减小）。具体数值摘要未给出，但定性结果支持方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了框架效应是LLMs隐藏偏见的重要来源，并提出了有效的去偏方法。该方法提升了模型在不同表述下的响应一致性和公平性，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的框架类型及与其他去偏方法的结合。

title: Relighting as a Probe of Visual Priors via Augmented Latent Intrinsics
abstract: Image-to-image relighting requires representations that separate illumination from scene properties while preserving dense geometry, material, and photometric cues. We use this task as a probe of visual priors: unlike recognition tasks that reward invariance, relighting tests whether visual features retain the information needed for light transfer. Through a controlled generative relighting framework, we find that strong semantic encoders can degrade relighting quality, exposing a semantic--photometric trade-off between abstraction and physical fidelity. We introduce Augmented Latent Intrinsics (ALI), which balances this trade-off by fusing dense, pixel-aligned visual features into a latent-intrinsic relighting model and refining it with self-supervision on unlabeled real image pairs. ALI improves relighting quality, especially on glossy, metallic, and transparent materials, and demonstrates that generative relighting is an effective tool for quantifying what visual encoders encode about the physical world.
comment: Camera-ready version for ICML 2026. Project page: https://augmented-latent-intrinsics.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 提出Augmented Latent Intrinsics (ALI)，通过融合密集像素特征和自监督微调，平衡语义与光度保真度，提升重照明质量，并用于量化视觉编码器的物理世界编码能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像重照明需分离照度与场景属性，同时保留几何、材质等线索。现有识别模型偏好不变性，但重照明要求保留完整物理信息；强语义编码器反而降低重照明质量，暴露出语义与光度保真度之间的权衡。该研究利用重照明作为探针，量化视觉先验对物理信息的保留程度，弥补传统评估方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出Augmented Latent Intrinsics (ALI)框架，将密集的像素对齐视觉特征融合到潜在内在重照明模型中，并通过自监督学习在未标记真实图像对上优化模型。核心创新在于显式保留几何与材质信息（如光泽、透明），同时利用语义特征辅助照明估计，平衡了抽象表示与物理保真度。
light_analysis.result: ALI在重照明任务上显著提升质量，尤其对光泽、金属和透明材质表现优于基线。实验表明，ALI成功克服了强语义编码器导致的重照明退化问题，证明了生成式重照明作为探针的有效性，可定量评估不同视觉编码器对物理世界的编码程度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过重照明任务揭示语义-光度权衡，提出ALI方法平衡二者，提升复杂材质重照明效果。该工作为视觉表示学习提供了新评估范式，未来可扩展至更多物理感知任务，但依赖高质量未标记图像对，对极端光照场景可能仍有局限。

title: Stabilizing the Q-Gradient Field for Policy Smoothness in Actor-Critic Methods
abstract: Policies learned via continuous actor-critic methods often exhibit erratic, high-frequency oscillations, making them unsuitable for physical deployment. Current approaches attempt to enforce smoothness by directly regularizing the policy's output. We argue that this approach treats the symptom rather than the cause. In this work, we theoretically establish that policy non-smoothness is fundamentally governed by the differential geometry of the critic. By applying implicit differentiation to the actor-critic objective, we prove that the sensitivity of the optimal policy is bounded by the ratio of the Q-function's mixed-partial derivative (noise sensitivity) to its action-space curvature (signal distinctness). To empirically validate this theoretical insight, we introduce PAVE (Policy-Aware Value-field Equalization), a critic-centric regularization framework that treats the critic as a scalar field and stabilizes its induced action-gradient field. PAVE rectifies the learning signal by minimizing the Q-gradient volatility while preserving local curvature. Experimental results demonstrate that PAVE achieves smoothness comparable to policy-side smoothness regularization methods, while maintaining competitive task performance, without modifying the actor.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PAVE框架，通过稳定Q梯度场实现策略平滑，无需修改actor，理论证明非光滑性源于critic微分几何。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续actor-critic方法学习的策略常出现高频振荡，不适合物理部署。现有方法直接正则化策略输出，但仅治标不治本。本文旨在从根源解决策略非平滑问题，通过理论分析揭示其与critic微分几何的联系。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过隐式微分证明最优策略敏感性由Q函数混合偏导数与动作空间曲率之比界定。基于此提出PAVE框架，将critic视为标量场，通过最小化Q梯度波动同时保持局部曲率来稳定其诱导的动作梯度场，从而修正学习信号，不修改actor。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明PAVE实现了与策略侧平滑正则化方法相当的平滑度，同时保持竞争性任务性能。无需修改actor，避免了策略正则化带来的性能下降。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论层面揭示了critic微分几何对策略平滑性的决定性作用，提出了以critic为中心的正则化方法PAVE。该方法为强化学习中的策略平滑问题提供了新视角，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更高效的曲率保持机制。

title: Prior-Informed Flow Matching for Graph Reconstruction
abstract: We introduce \textit{Prior-Informed Flow Matching (PIFM)}, a conditional flow model for graph reconstruction. Reconstructing graphs from partial observations remains a key challenge; classical embedding methods often lack global consistency, while modern generative models struggle to incorporate structural priors. PIFM bridges this gap by integrating embedding-based priors with continuous-time flow matching. Grounded in a permutation equivariant version of the distortion-perception theory, our method first uses a prior, such as GraphSAGE or node2vec, to form an informed initial estimate of the adjacency matrix based on local information. It then applies rectified flow matching to refine this estimate, transporting it toward the true distribution of clean graphs and learning a global coupling. Experiments on different datasets demonstrate that PIFM consistently enhances classical embeddings, outperforming them and state-of-the-art generative baselines in reconstruction accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prior-Informed Flow Matching (PIFM)，融合嵌入先验与连续时间流匹配，实现高精度图重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 图重建任务中，经典嵌入方法（如GraphSAGE、node2vec）基于局部信息，缺乏全局一致性；而现代生成模型难以有效融入图的结构先验。现有方法在这两者之间存在空白，无法同时利用局部先验和全局结构信息。PIFM旨在填补这一鸿沟，通过结合嵌入先验和流匹配，提升图重建的准确性和一致性。
light_analysis.method: PIFM基于置换等变的失真-感知理论，首先使用嵌入先验（如GraphSAGE或node2vec）从部分观测中推断出邻接矩阵的初始估计，该估计基于局部信息。随后，应用修正流匹配（rectified flow matching）逐步优化该估计，将其向干净图的真实分布运输，从而学习全局耦合。该方法在连续时间框架内整合了先验知识，实现了局部与全局信息的协同。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，PIFM持续提升了经典嵌入方法的性能，在重建准确率上不仅超越了原始嵌入，还优于包括最先进生成基线在内的对比方法。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调了一致性的改进，验证了方法在多种图重建场景下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PIFM通过将基于嵌入的先验与流匹配相结合，有效地解决了图重建中局部与全局信息的平衡问题。该方法具有较好的通用性，能够增强现有嵌入技术并提升生成模型的性能。未来工作可探索更复杂的先验形式或应用于动态图重建，但摘要未提及潜在局限性。

title: Creativity Reconsidered: Generative AI and the Problem of Intentional Agency
abstract: Many theorists maintain that conscious intentional agency is a necessary condition of creativity. We argue that this requirement, which we call the Intentional Agency Condition (IAC), should be abandoned. We motivate this by highlighting the problems this criterion encounters in the face of recent advances in generative AI, which is ostensibly creative despite being incapable of intentional agency. We present two corpus analyses to illustrate the rapidly increasing tendency of people to predicate creativity to generative AI. In response to this predicament, theorists of creativity have proposed a range of conflicting solutions, which we critically evaluate. We find that none of these satisfyingly resolves the initial predicament, and we therefore propose a novel approach. Our claim is that ascriptions of creativity are dependent on what we call creative ability. This solution explains why intentional agency is important for judgements of creativity, without being a necessary condition. Our approach thereby accommodates AI creativity without dismissing the intuition that perceived intentions are of key importance for ascriptions of creativity.

light_analysis.overview: 本文论证生成式AI的创造性无需意向代理，提出以“创造能力”代替传统必要条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统观点认为有意识的意向代理是创造性的必要条件（IAC），但生成式AI虽无意向代理却表现出创造性，导致理论困境。现有解决方案相互冲突且不能有效解决该问题，因此需要重新审视创造性的判断标准。
light_analysis.method: 通过两次语料分析展示人们日益将创造性归因于生成式AI的趋势，批判性评估现有解决方案的不足，提出核心创新点：创造性归因依赖于“创造能力”（creative ability），它解释了意向代理虽重要但非必要条件的原因。
light_analysis.result: 语料分析表明，人们对生成式AI使用创造性谓词的频率迅速增加。比较现有方案后，发现均无法满意解决最初困境，而本文提出的创造能力框架能兼容AI创造性与意向感知的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文放弃了意向代理作为创造性的必要条件，提出基于创造能力的归因理论，既容纳了AI的创造性，又保留了直觉中意图的关键角色。该工作为创造性研究提供了新视角，但未讨论具体应用或局限性。

title: GH-ESD: Grounded Hypothesis-Driven Error Slice Discovery for Instance-Level Vision Tasks
abstract: Systematic failures of vision models on semantically coherent subsets, known as error slices, reveal limitations in robustness and evaluation. Existing slice discovery approaches largely model slices as clusters in representation space or combinations of predefined attributes. While effective for image-level classification, such formulations are insufficient for instance-level tasks such as object detection and segmentation, where failures often arise from contextual relational and spatially grounded visual patterns. We propose GH-ESD (Grounded Hypothesis-Driven Error Slice Discovery), a generate and verify framework that reformulates slice discovery as grounded hypothesis generation and statistical verification. GH-ESD constructs relational failure hypotheses using LLM priors and grounded visual evidence, discovers hypothesis slices at the instance level via Vision Language Models, and verifies them through statistical trend analysis over instance-level errors. We also introduce GESD (Grounded Error Slice Dataset), a new benchmark for instance-level error slice discovery, providing expert-defined and spatially grounded slices derived from detection and segmentation failures. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GH-ESD consistently outperforms baselines, improving Precision@10 by 0.10 (0.73 vs. 0.63) on the GESD benchmark for detection tasks, while also supporting segmentation scenarios. GH-ESD identifies interpretable slices that facilitate actionable model improvements. The GESD dataset will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GH-ESD框架，将实例级错误切片发现转化为生成与验证流程，利用LLM和视觉语言模型发现接地假设切片，并构建GESD基准数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有错误切片发现方法主要针对图像级分类，依赖表示聚类或预定义属性，无法处理实例级任务（如检测、分割）中由上下文关系和空间模式导致的系统失败。缺乏实例级错误切片发现的标准方法和基准，阻碍了模型鲁棒性评估。
light_analysis.method: GH-ESD采用生成-验证框架：首先利用LLM先验和接地视觉证据生成关系性失败假设，然后通过视觉语言模型在实例级别发现假设切片，最后通过统计趋势分析验证切片的显著性。同时构建GESD基准，包含来自检测和分割失败的空间接地错误切片。
light_analysis.result: 在GESD检测基准上，GH-ESD的Precision@10达到0.73，相比基线0.63提升0.10；在分割场景中也表现优越。发现的可解释切片可指导模型改进，如识别特定上下文组合中的检测失败。数据集将公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: GH-ESD有效发现实例级错误切片，弥补了现有方法在实例级任务中的空白，具有评估和诊断价值。GESD基准为后续研究提供标准化评估。未来可扩展至更多任务和自动化假设生成。

title: Smol-GS: Compact Representations for Abstract 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: We present Smol-GS, a novel method for learning compact representations for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Our approach learns highly efficient splat-wise features to model 3D space, which capture abstracted cues, including color, opacity, transformation, and material properties. We propose octree-derived positional encoding, which explicitly models spatial locality and enhances representation efficiency. We further apply entropy-based compression to exploit feature redundancy and compress splat coordinates using a recursive voxel hierarchy. This design enables orders-of-magnitude reduction in storage while preserving representation flexibility. Smol-GS achieves state-of-the-art compression performance on standard benchmarks with high-level rendering quality.

light_analysis.overview: Smol-GS提出一种学习紧凑3D高斯溅射表示的方法，通过八叉树位置编码和熵压缩实现数量级存储缩减，同时保持高质量渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯溅射（3DGS）在高质量渲染方面表现出色，但其模型通常需要大量存储空间，限制了实际应用。现有压缩方法可能牺牲表示灵活性或渲染质量。因此，需要一种既能大幅减少存储，又能保持高渲染质量的紧凑表示方法。
light_analysis.method: Smol-GS学习高效的逐溅射特征来建模3D空间，包括颜色、不透明度、变换和材质属性。提出八叉树位置编码显式建模空间局部性，提升表示效率。进一步应用基于熵的压缩利用特征冗余，并使用递归体素层次压缩溅射坐标。该方法在标准基准上实现了最先进的压缩性能和高水平渲染质量。
light_analysis.result: Smol-GS在标准基准上实现了最先进的压缩性能，存储减少数个数量级，同时保持高水平的渲染质量。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Smol-GS通过紧凑表示大幅降低3DGS的存储需求，同时不牺牲渲染质量，具有重要的实际应用价值。未来工作可能扩展至动态场景或与其他渲染技术结合，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: The Hidden Cost of Approximation in Online Mirror Descent
abstract: Online mirror descent (OMD) is a fundamental algorithmic paradigm that underlies many algorithms in optimization, machine learning and sequential decision-making. The OMD iterates are defined as solutions to optimization subproblems which, oftentimes, can be solved only approximately, leading to an inexact version of the algorithm. Nonetheless, existing OMD analyses typically assume an idealized error free setting, thereby limiting our understanding of performance guarantees that should be expected in practice. In this work we initiate a systematic study into inexact OMD, and uncover an intricate relation between regularizer smoothness and robustness to approximation errors. When the regularizer is uniformly smooth, we establish a tight bound on the excess regret due to errors. Then, for barrier regularizers over the simplex and its subsets, we identify a sharp separation: negative entropy requires exponentially small errors to avoid linear regret, whereas log-barrier and Tsallis regularizers remain robust even when the errors are only polynomial. Finally, we show that when the losses are stochastic and the domain is the simplex, negative entropy regains robustness-but this property does not extend to all subsets, where exponentially small errors are again necessary to avoid suboptimal regret.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统研究不精确在线镜像下降，揭示正则化子光滑性与近似误差鲁棒性的复杂关系，发现不同正则化子的尖锐分离现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线镜像下降（OMD）是优化和机器学习中的基础算法，但其迭代通常只能近似求解。现有分析多假设理想无误差环境，而实际应用中近似误差不可避免。缺乏对不精确OMD性能保证的理解，限制了算法在实际中的可靠应用。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究近似误差对OMD遗憾的影响。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过理论分析系统研究不精确OMD。首先建立均匀光滑正则化子下近似误差导致的额外遗憾的紧界。然后针对单纯形及其子集上的障碍正则化子，对比分析负熵、对数障碍和Tsallis正则化子对误差的鲁棒性。最后考虑随机损失场景，揭示负熵在单纯形域上的鲁棒性恢复及其局限性。
light_analysis.result: 对于均匀光滑正则化子，得到误差导致额外遗憾的紧界。在单纯形上，负熵需要指数级小误差（如误差需小于2^{-Ω(T)}）以避免线性遗憾，而对数障碍和Tsallis正则化子仅需多项式级误差（如误差需小于T^{-α}）。随机损失下，负熵在单纯形上恢复鲁棒性，但扩展到一般子集时仍需指数级小误差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了不精确OMD中正则化子选择的关键作用：光滑正则化子鲁棒，而负熵在确定性场景下对误差极度敏感。这为实践者提供了指导，例如在近似求解时优先选择对数障碍或Tsallis正则化子。未来方向包括探索其他正则化子及更一般的域。

title: Linear Mode Connectivity under Data Shifts for Deep Ensembles of Image Classifiers
abstract: The phenomenon of linear mode connectivity (LMC) links several aspects of deep learning, including training stability under noisy stochastic gradients, the smoothness and generalization of local minima (basins), the similarity and functional diversity of sampled models, and architectural effects on data processing. In this work, we experimentally study LMC under data shifts and identify conditions that mitigate their impact. We interpret data shifts as an additional source of stochastic gradient noise, which can be reduced through small learning rates and large batch sizes. These parameters influence whether models converge to the same local minimum or to regions of the loss landscape with varying smoothness and generalization. Although models sampled via LMC tend to make similar errors more frequently than those converging to different basins, the benefit of LMC lies in balancing training efficiency against the gains achieved from larger, more diverse ensembles. Code and supplementary materials are available at https://github.com/DLR-KI/LMC. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible.

light_analysis.overview: 研究数据漂移下线性模式连接的实验分析，提出参数调整可减轻其影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性模式连接（LMC）反映了深度学习的多个方面，但数据漂移对其影响尚不明确。现有方法忽视了数据漂移作为随机梯度噪声源的效应，可能导致模型收敛到不同局部最小值，影响集成性能。理解LMC在数据漂移下的条件对于提升模型训练稳定性和泛化能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过实验研究数据漂移对LMC的影响，将数据漂移解释为随机梯度噪声的附加来源。提出使用小学习率和大批量大小来减少该噪声，从而促进模型收敛到同一局部最小值或平滑区域。分析不同超参数下LMC与模型多样性、错误相关性的关系。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，小学习率和大批量大小能有效缓解数据漂移对LMC的破坏。LMC采样的模型更倾向于做出相似错误，但相比收敛到不同盆地的模型，LMC在训练效率和集成多样性之间取得了平衡。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于系统研究了数据漂移下LMC的条件，为实际训练中平衡集成规模与多样性提供了指导。未来可探索更复杂的数据漂移类型或结合其他正则化方法。局限性在于实验局限于图像分类任务，且未提供精确数值结果。

title: Rethinking Robust Adversarial Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models
abstract: Concept erasure aims to selectively unlearning undesirable content in diffusion models (DMs) to reduce the risk of sensitive content generation. As a novel paradigm in concept erasure, most existing methods employ adversarial training to identify and suppress target concepts, thus reducing the likelihood of sensitive outputs. However, these methods often neglect the specificity of adversarial training in DMs, resulting in only partial mitigation. In this work, we investigate and quantify this specificity from the perspective of concept space, i.e., can adversarial samples truly fit the target concept space? We observe that existing methods neglect the role of conceptual semantics when generating adversarial samples, resulting in ineffective fitting of concept spaces. This oversight leads to the following issues: 1) when there are few adversarial samples, they fail to comprehensively cover the object concept; 2) conversely, they will disrupt other target concept spaces. Motivated by the analysis of these findings, we introduce S-GRACE (Semantics-Guided Robust Adversarial Concept Erasure), which grace leveraging semantic guidance within the concept space to generate adversarial samples and perform erasure training. Experiments conducted with seven state-of-the-art methods and three adversarial prompt generation strategies across various DM unlearning scenarios demonstrate that S-GRACE significantly improves erasure performance 26%, better preserves non-target concepts, and reduces training time by 90%. Our code is available at https://github.com/Qhong-522/S-GRACE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S-GRACE，利用语义引导生成对抗样本，显著提升扩散模型概念擦除的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念擦除旨在移除扩散模型中的不良内容，现有方法采用对抗训练但忽略其特异性，导致对抗样本无法有效覆盖目标概念空间，或干扰其他概念空间。本文从概念空间视角量化该特异性，指出现有方法忽视对抗样本的语义引导，从而引发覆盖不全或干扰问题，亟需更鲁棒的擦除策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出S-GRACE（语义引导鲁棒对抗概念擦除），利用概念空间中的语义信息指导对抗样本生成，以更精确地拟合目标概念空间，并执行擦除训练。与七种SOTA方法和三种对抗提示生成策略在多种扩散模型遗忘场景下对比，验证其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种扩散模型遗忘场景下，S-GRACE相较于现有方法，擦除性能提升26%，对非目标概念的保留更好，同时训练时间减少90%，显著提升效率和效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了对抗训练在概念擦除中的特异性问题，并提出S-GRACE通过语义引导生成对抗样本，有效解决了现有方法覆盖不全和干扰问题。该方法大幅提升了擦除性能和训练效率，为扩散模型的安全部署提供了实用解决方案，未来可探索更多语义引导策略以扩展应用。

title: GenTrack2: An Improved Hybrid Approach for Multi-Object Tracking
abstract: This paper proposes a visual multi-object tracking method that jointly employs stochastic and deterministic mechanisms to ensure identifier consistency for unknown and time-varying target numbers under nonlinear dynamics. A stochastic particle filter addresses nonlinear dynamics and non-Gaussian noise, with support from particle swarm optimization (PSO) to guide particles toward state distribution modes and mitigate divergence through proposed fitness measures incorporating motion consistency, appearance similarity, and social-interaction cues with neighboring targets. Deterministic association further enforces identifier consistency via a proposed cost matrix incorporating spatial consistency between particles and current detections, detection confidences, and track penalties. Subsequently, a novel scheme is proposed for the smooth updating of target states while preserving their identities, particularly for weak tracks during interactions with other targets and prolonged occlusions. Moreover, velocity regression over past states provides trend-seed velocities, enhancing particle sampling and state updates. The proposed tracker is designed to operate flexibly for both pre-recorded videos and camera live streams, where future frames are unavailable. Experimental results confirm superior performance compared to state-of-the-art trackers. The source-code reference implementations of both the proposed method and compared-trackers are provided on GitHub: https://github.com/SDU-VelKoTek/GenTrack2
comment: The content of this paper was included in the full manuscript of GenTrack family which has been submitted to the journal for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合随机与确定性机制的视觉多目标跟踪方法，通过粒子滤波、PSO和成本矩阵确保标识一致性，性能优于现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 多目标跟踪在非线性动态和时变目标数量下难以保持标识一致性，现有方法处理非线性噪声和遮挡等问题不足。本文旨在通过混合随机-确定性机制改进跟踪鲁棒性，适应未知目标数和复杂交互场景。
light_analysis.method: 采用随机粒子滤波处理非线性动态和非高斯噪声，引入粒子群优化（PSO）引导粒子朝向状态分布模式，结合运动一致性、外观相似性和社交交互线索的适应度度量。确定性关联通过融合空间一致性、检测置信度和轨迹惩罚的成本矩阵强化标识一致性。提出平滑状态更新方案，保留身份，并利用速度回归提供趋势速度，增强粒子采样。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，所提方法在跟踪精度、标识一致性等指标上优于现有跟踪器，具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称性能 superior。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种结合随机与确定性优点的多目标跟踪框架，有效处理非线性动态和遮挡，适用于预录视频和实时流。开源实现促进后续研究。未来可探索更高效的粒子采样或深度学习集成。

title: GenTrack: A New Generation of Multi-Object Tracking
abstract: This paper introduces a novel multi-object tracking (MOT) method, dubbed GenTrack, whose main contributions include: first-a hybrid tracking approach employing both stochastic and deterministic manners to robustly handle unknown and time-varying numbers of targets, particularly in maintaining target identity (ID) consistency and managing nonlinear dynamics, second-leveraging particle swarm optimization (PSO) with some proposed fitness measures to guide stochastic particles toward their target distribution modes, enabling effective tracking even with weak and noisy object detectors, third-integration of social interactions among targets to enhance PSO-guided particles as well as improve continuous updates of both strong (matched) and weak (unmatched) tracks, thereby reducing ID switches and track loss, especially during occlusions, fourth-a GenTrack-based redefined visual MOT baseline incorporating a comprehensive state and observation model based on space consistency, appearance, detection confidence, track penalties, and social scores for systematic and efficient target updates, and five-the first ever publicly available source-code reference implementation with minimal dependencies, featuring three variants, including GenTrack Simple, Strengthen, and Super, facilitating flexible reimplementation. Experimental results have shown that GenTrack provides superior performance on standard benchmarks and real-world scenarios compared to state-of-the-art trackers, with integrated implementations of baselines for fair comparison. Potential directions for future work are also discussed. The source-code reference implementations of both the proposed method and compared-trackers are provided on GitHub: https://github.com/SDU-VelKoTek/GenTrack
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出GenTrack，一种结合随机与确定性的混合多目标跟踪方法，利用粒子群优化和社会交互增强跟踪鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MOT方法在处理未知时变目标数量、保持ID一致性及非线性动力学时表现不足，尤其在遮挡和弱检测器场景下易发生ID切换和轨迹丢失。这些缺陷限制了其在复杂真实场景中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: GenTrack采用混合跟踪策略，粒子群优化引导随机粒子分布，社会交互模型更新强弱轨迹。定义综合状态观测模型，融合空间一致性、外观、检测置信度、轨迹惩罚和社会得分，实现系统化目标更新。提供三种变体（Simple、Strengthen、Super）并开源代码。
light_analysis.result: 在标准MOT基准和真实场景中，GenTrack优于现有SOTA跟踪器。三种变体在不同复杂度下均提升ID一致性和跟踪精度，尤其在遮挡和低检测率条件下表现稳健。代码及基线实现公开于GitHub。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenTrack创新性地融合粒子群优化和社会交互，解决了MOT中ID切换和轨迹丢失问题。其综合观测模型和混合框架为实际应用提供高效方案。未来可探索更先进的交互模型和端到端学习。

title: Beyond Reasoning Gains: Mitigating General-Capability Forgetting in Large Reasoning Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has delivered impressive gains in mathematical and multimodal reasoning and has become a standard post-training paradigm for contemporary language and vision-language models. However, the RLVR recipe introduces a significant risk of capability regression, in which models forget foundational skills after prolonged training without employing regularization strategies. We empirically confirm this concern, observing that open-source reasoning models suffer performance degradation on core capabilities such as perception and faithfulness. While imposing regularization terms like KL divergence can help prevent deviation from the base model, these terms are computed on the current task and therefore do not guarantee preservation of broader knowledge. Meanwhile, commonly used experience replay across heterogeneous domains makes it nontrivial to decide how much training emphasis each objective should receive. To address this, we propose RECAP-a replay strategy with dynamic objective reweighting for general knowledge preservation. Our reweighting mechanism adapts online using short-horizon signals of convergence and instability, shifting the post-training focus away from saturated objectives and toward underperforming or volatile ones. Our method is end-to-end and readily applicable to existing RLVR pipelines without training additional models or heavy tuning. Extensive experiments on benchmarks using Qwen2.5-VL-3B and Qwen2.5-VL-7B demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which not only preserves general capabilities but also improves reasoning by enabling more flexible trade-offs among in-task rewards.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RECAP策略，通过动态重新加权回放目标，缓解大型推理模型在强化学习训练中的通用能力遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR带来推理提升但导致能力回归，模型忘记感知、忠实性等核心技能。现有KL正则化仅防止偏离基础模型，无法保证广泛知识保留；经验回放难以平衡多目标。亟需有效的通用知识保留方法以维持模型整体能力。
light_analysis.method: RECAP是一种端到端的回放策略，在线使用短期收敛和不稳定性信号动态调整各回放目标的权重，将训练焦点从饱和目标转向表现不佳或不稳定的目标。无需额外模型训练或繁琐调参，可直接集成到现有RLVR管线中。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-3B和7B上的大量实验表明，RECAP不仅有效保留通用能力，还通过更灵活的任务内奖励权衡进一步提升推理性能。摘要未给出具体数值，但证实了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RECAP缓解了RLVR训练中的通用能力遗忘，同时保持甚至增强推理能力。其学术价值在于为能力保留提供新范式，实际价值在于易于集成、无需额外成本。未来可探索更复杂的动态调整机制。

title: Capturing Intransitive Dominance in Tennis Forecasting: A Graph Neural Network Approach
abstract: Intransitive player dominance, where player A beats B, B beats C, but C beats A, is common in competitive tennis. Yet, there are few known attempts to incorporate it within forecasting methods. We address this problem with a graph neural network approach that explicitly models these intransitive relationships through temporal directed graphs, with players as nodes and their historical match outcomes as directed edges. Our model (65.7% accuracy, 0.214 Brier score) forecasts competitively with established rating systems such as Weighted Elo. Although it does not improve on the baseline in unconditional accuracy, a forecast-encompassing test shows that it carries complementary information. A combined forecast significantly outperforms Weighted Elo, and there is some indication that the gain grows more strongly on the intransitive matchups our model targets. A graph-based representation of player interactions thus captures a forecasting signal that transitive rating systems discard, even between players who share no common opponents.
comment: 41 pages, 7 figures. Major revision reframing the paper from betting-market inefficiency toward intransitivity analysis, forecast complementarity, and robustness. Added forecast-encompassing tests, new intransitivity measures, robustness analyses, and expanded appendices

light_analysis.overview: 提出图神经网络模型，通过时间有向图显式建模网球中的非传递性选手优势，提升预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 网球比赛中普遍存在非传递性选手优势（如A胜B、B胜C、C胜A），但现有预测方法如Elo评分系统仅假设传递性关系，忽略了这类重要模式。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过建模复杂胜负关系提高预测准确性，对体育数据分析和博弈论研究具有意义。
light_analysis.method: 构建时间有向图，其中节点代表选手，边为历史比赛结果方向。使用图神经网络学习节点表示，隐式捕获非传递性关系。模型基于历史数据训练，输出比赛胜率概率。关键创新在于显式利用非传递性结构，无需依赖共同对手间接比较。
light_analysis.result: 模型在预测准确率达65.7%，Brier分数0.214，与Weighted Elo等传统评级系统性能相当。虽然无条件准确率未超越基线，但预测包容性测试表明其携带互补信息。与Weighted Elo组合预测显著优于单独使用Weighted Elo，且在非传递性比赛上增益更大。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明图神经网络能有效建模非传递性优势，提供传统传递性方法丢失的预测信号。未来可扩展至更多运动项目或竞争性互动场景，提升预测精度仍有改进空间如融合更多特征。

title: CAGE: Curvature-Aware Gradient Estimation For Accurate Quantization-Aware Training
abstract: Despite significant work on low-bit quantization-aware training (QAT), there is still an accuracy gap between such techniques and native training. To address this, we introduce CAGE (Curvature-Aware Gradient Estimation), a new QAT method that augments the straight-through estimator (STE) gradient with a curvature-aware correction designed to counteract the loss increase induced by quantization. CAGE is derived from a multi-objective view of QAT that balances loss minimization with the quantization constraints, yielding a principled correction term that depends on local curvature information. On the theoretical side, we introduce the notion of Pareto-optimal solutions for quantized optimization, and establish that CAGE yields strong convergence guarantees in the smooth non-convex setting. In terms of implementation, our approach is optimizer-agnostic, but we provide a highly-efficient implementation that leverages Adam statistics. CAGE significantly improves upon the prior state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy, for similar computational cost: for QAT fine-tuning, it halves the compression accuracy loss relative to the prior best method, while for QAT pre-training of Llama models, its accuracy for 3-bit weights-and-activations (W3A3) matches the accuracy achieved at 4-bits (W4A4) with the prior best method. The official implementation can be found over https://github.com/IST-DASLab/CAGE .
comment: Accepted at MLSys 2026 (Oral). To appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems 8

light_analysis.overview: 提出曲率感知梯度估计CAGE，通过多目标优化校正STE梯度，显著提升量化感知训练的精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 低比特量化感知训练（QAT）相比原生训练仍存在显著精度差距，现有方法如直通估计器（STE）忽略量化导致的损失增加。该研究旨在通过考虑局部曲率信息来校正梯度，从而缩小精度差距，并建立量化优化的Pareto最优理论框架。
light_analysis.method: CAGE从多目标优化视角出发，平衡损失最小化与量化约束，推导出依赖局部曲率的梯度校正项。该方法与优化器无关，但提供基于Adam统计的高效实现。理论证明在非凸光滑假设下具有强收敛保证，并通过Pareto最优性解释量化寻优过程。
light_analysis.result: 在QAT微调中，CAGE将压缩精度损失相比先前最佳方法减半；在Llama模型预训练中，3比特权重量化（W3A3）达到先前方法4比特（W4A4）的精度。计算成本与现有方法相当，开源实现已验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAGE通过曲率感知梯度校正有效提升QAT精度，理论贡献包括Pareto最优量化优化概念。该方法适用于多种模型和优化器，尤其在大模型预训练中展现优异性能。未来可探索更高效曲率估计或扩展到其他量化场景。

title: MENTOR: Reinforcement Learning via Flexible Teacher-Optimized Rewards for Tool-Use Distillation
abstract: Distilling the tool-use capabilities of large language models (LLMs) into small language models (SLMs) is essential for their practical application. The predominant approach, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), suffers from poor out-of-domain (OOD) generalization due to its rigid alignment with static teacher trajectories. While reinforcement learning (RL) offers an alternative, the capacity limitations of SLMs pose a severe dilemma: sparse outcome rewards provide insufficient guidance, whereas strict trajectory matching imposes overly restrictive constraints. To bridge this capacity-driven gap, we propose MENTOR, which introduces a flexible yet process-aware reward structure. Instead of enforcing rigid replication, MENTOR uses the teacher's reference to guide tool-use behavior, balancing behavioral alignment with downstream performance. Extensive experiments on controlled executable-tool benchmarks demonstrate that MENTOR improves OOD tool-use performance compared to SFT and strict RL baselines. Our findings suggest that within verifiable tool-use environments, flexible tool-use alignment offers a more effective approach than strict trajectory replication for developing adaptable small models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MENTOR框架，通过教师优化的灵活奖励实现工具使用蒸馏，平衡行为对齐与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 将大语言模型的工具使用能力蒸馏到小语言模型（SLM）对于实际应用至关重要。现有方法监督微调（SFT）由于刚性对齐静态教师轨迹，导致域外（OOD）泛化性能差；而强化学习（RL）面临SLM容量限制的困境：稀疏的结果奖励指导不足，严格的轨迹匹配又过于约束。需要一种能够弥合容量差距的灵活奖励机制。
light_analysis.method: MENTOR引入灵活且过程感知的奖励结构。它不强制刚性复制，而是利用教师的参考来引导工具使用行为，在行为对齐与下游性能之间取得平衡。通过教师优化奖励来指导SLM的学习，而非直接匹配轨迹。该方法在可控的可执行工具基准上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在可控的可执行工具基准上进行广泛实验，MENTOR相比SFT和严格RL基线，显著提升了OOD工具使用性能。摘要未给出具体数值，但明确表明改进效果，验证了灵活对齐策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，在可验证的工具使用环境中，灵活的工具使用对齐比严格的轨迹复制对于开发适应性小模型更有效。MENTOR提供了有效的蒸馏方法，有助于SLM在实际应用中更好地泛化。未来可探索更复杂的工具使用场景及奖励设计。

title: Toward General Digraph Contrastive Learning: A Dual Spatial Perspective
abstract: Graph Contrastive Learning (GCL) has emerged as a powerful tool for extracting consistent representations from graphs, independent of labeled information. However, existing methods predominantly focus on undirected graphs, disregarding the pivotal directional information that is fundamental and indispensable in real-world networks (e.g., social networks and recommendations).In this paper, we introduce S2-DiGCL, a novel framework that emphasizes spatial insights from complex and real domain perspectives for directed graph (digraph) contrastive learning. From the complex-domain perspective, S2-DiGCL introduces personalized perturbations into the magnetic Laplacian to adaptively modulate edge phases and directional semantics. From the real-domain perspective, it employs a path-based subgraph augmentation strategy to capture fine-grained local asymmetries and topological dependencies. By jointly leveraging these two complementary spatial views, S2-DiGCL constructs high-quality positive and negative samples, leading to more general and robust digraph contrastive learning. Extensive experiments on 7 real-world digraph datasets demonstrate the superiority of our approach, achieving SOTA performance with 4.41% improvement in node classification and 4.34% in link prediction under both supervised and unsupervised settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S2-DiGCL框架，从复域和实域双空间视角实现通用有向图对比学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图对比学习主要针对无向图，忽略了有向图中关键的边方向信息，而现实网络（如社交网络、推荐系统）中方向性不可或缺。缺乏能够充分利用方向语义的通用对比学习框架。
light_analysis.method: S2-DiGCL从两个空间视角出发：复域视角在磁拉普拉斯中引入个性化扰动，自适应调整边相位和方向语义；实域视角采用基于路径的子图增强策略，捕捉细粒度局部不对称性和拓扑依赖。通过联合两种互补视角构建高质量正负样本，实现更通用鲁棒的有向图对比学习。
light_analysis.result: 在7个真实世界有向图数据集上，S2-DiGCL在节点分类任务中平均提升4.41%，在链接预测任务中平均提升4.34%，在监督和无监督设置下均达到当前最优性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: S2-DiGCL有效利用有向图的方向信息，通过双空间视角增强了对比学习的泛化性和鲁棒性。该方法在社交网络、推荐等场景具有应用价值，未来可探索更大规模图数据或结合其他预训练任务。

title: Controlled Comparison of Machine Learning Models for Fault Classification and Localization in Power System Protection
abstract: The increasing complexity of modern power systems, driven by the integration of inverter-based and distributed energy resources, challenges the reliability of conventional protection schemes and motivates the use of machine learning for protection tasks. However, published results are often difficult to compare because datasets, sensing assumptions, and decision horizons vary across studies. This paper presents a controlled comparison of machine learning models for fault classification (FC) and fault localization (FL) under identical sensing, timing, and validation conditions on a common electromagnetic transient dataset, using decision windows of 10-50 ms to reflect protection-relevant time scales. For FC, the best-performing nonlinear models achieve F1 scores above 0.98 already at 10 ms, while lower-capacity models degrade at shorter horizons but improve with longer windows, indicating that relevant fault-type information is already present in the earliest transient. For FL, the top-performing models reach a stable localization error of about 10 % of normalized line length across all evaluated horizons, while weaker models form a clearly separated second performance tier. Line-resolved analysis shows that localization accuracy varies across grid segments, indicating topology-dependent difficulty rather than insufficient temporal context alone. These findings provide a controlled reference for comparing machine learning models across two protection tasks with fundamentally different information requirements.
comment: Accepted at IEEE PES Innovative Smart Grid Technologies Europe 2026 (ISGT Europe 2026). Pre-camera-ready author version; final proceedings version may differ

light_analysis.overview: 在相同条件下比较机器学习模型用于电力系统故障分类与定位，揭示不同任务的信息需求差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代电力系统因逆变器基和分布式能源集成而日益复杂，传统保护方案可靠性受挑战，机器学习被用于保护任务。然而，不同研究数据集、感知假设和决策窗口各异，导致结果难以比较。本文旨在通过控制实验设计，在统一条件下评估模型性能，为故障分类和定位提供可比基准。
light_analysis.method: 采用电磁暂态数据集，在相同感知、时序和验证条件下比较多种机器学习模型。故障分类和定位使用10-50ms决策窗口以匹配保护时间尺度。模型包括非线性和低容量变体，通过F1分数和定位误差评估性能，并进行线分段分析以考察拓扑影响。
light_analysis.result: 故障分类中，最佳非线性模型在10ms时F1>0.98，低容量模型短窗口性能下降但长窗口改善。故障定位中，顶级模型达约10%归一化线长的稳定误差，较弱模型形成明显第二梯队。线分析显示定位精度因网格段而异，表明拓扑依赖性而非仅时间上下文不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为故障分类和定位提供了受控基准参考，证明两类任务信息需求根本不同。成果有助于指导保护系统机器学习模型选择，并提示需考虑拓扑因素。未来可探索更复杂模型或自适应窗口。

title: Enhancing Generative Auto-bidding with Offline Reward Evaluation and Policy Search
abstract: Auto-bidding is a critical tool for advertisers to improve advertising performance. Recent progress has demonstrated that AI-Generated Bidding (AIGB), which learns a conditional generative planner from offline data, achieves superior performance compared to typical offline reinforcement learning (RL)-based auto-bidding methods. However, existing AIGB methods still face a performance bottleneck due to their inherent inability to explore beyond the static dataset with feedback. To address this, we propose \textbf{AIGB-Pearl} (\emph{\textbf{P}lanning with \textbf{E}valu\textbf{A}tor via \textbf{RL}}), a novel method that integrates generative planning and policy optimization. The core of AIGB-Pearl lies in constructing a trajectory evaluator to assess the quality of generated scores and designing a provably sound KL-Lipschitz-constrained score-maximization scheme to ensure safe and efficient exploration beyond the offline dataset. A practical algorithm that incorporates the synchronous coupling technique is further developed to ensure the model regularity required by the proposed scheme. Extensive experiments on both simulated and real-world advertising systems demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AIGB-Pearl方法，通过离线奖励评估和策略搜索增强AI生成出价，解决静态数据集外探索瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动出价是广告商提升广告效果的关键工具。现有AI生成出价(AIGB)方法从离线数据学习条件生成规划器，优于典型离线强化学习方法，但由于无法在静态数据集外进行反馈探索，存在性能瓶颈。因此需要一种能安全有效探索离线数据集之外的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出AIGB-Pearl方法，核心是构建轨迹评估器来评估生成得分质量，并设计KL-Lipschitz约束的得分最大化方案，确保安全高效地探索离线数据集之外。进一步开发同步耦合技术以保证模型规则性。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实广告系统上进行大量实验，表明方法达到最先进性能。摘要未明确说明具体指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过离线奖励评估和策略搜索增强生成出价，解决了现有AIGB方法无法探索的问题，具有学术和实际应用价值。潜在局限性或未来工作未提及。

title: From Construction to Injection: Edit-Based Fingerprints for Large Language Models
abstract: Reliable model fingerprints are essential for protecting large language models (LLMs) against unauthorized redistribution and commercial misuse. In black-box deployment, verification is hindered by defensive filtering of suspected fingerprint queries, as well as by downstream model modifications that may weaken embedded ownership evidence. These risks require fingerprints to be robust in both construction and injection. For construction, prior paradigms face an imperceptibility trade-off: natural-language fingerprints may be accidentally activated, whereas garbled fingerprints are statistically exposed and easier to filter. For injection, existing methods struggle to preserve persistent trigger--target behaviors under model modification. We propose an end-to-end injected fingerprinting framework to address these challenges. Code-mixing Fingerprints (CF) use lowest-perplexity code-mixing under a high-complexity constraint to mitigate this two-sided imperceptibility trade-off. Multi-Candidate Editing (MCEdit) constructs structurally redundant, margin-separated trigger--target mappings to enable graceful degradation under model modification. Extensive evaluations on imperceptibility, detectability, and harmlessness demonstrate robust ownership verification with negligible impact on utility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出端到端注入式指纹框架，结合代码混合指纹和多候选编辑，解决指纹不可察觉性与鲁棒性的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 保护大语言模型免受未授权分发和商业滥用。现有方法在构造阶段面临自然语言指纹易意外激活、乱码指纹易被过滤的不可察觉性权衡；注入阶段难以在模型修改下持久保持触发-目标行为，导致所有权验证受阻。
light_analysis.method: 提出Code-mixing Fingerprints (CF)，在高复杂度约束下选择最低困惑度代码混合，平衡隐藏性与统计暴露风险；Multi-Candidate Editing (MCEdit) 构建结构冗余、间隔分离的触发-目标映射，使指纹在模型微调或编辑下优雅退化。
light_analysis.result: 在不可察觉性、可检测性和无害性上全面评估，鲁棒所有权验证对模型效用影响可忽略。具体指标摘要未明确，但强调优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供一种鲁棒且不可察觉的指纹框架，有效保护LLM知识产权，对部署和反滥用具有价值。未来可扩展至更复杂模型修改场景。

title: Collaborative Multi-Modal Coding for High-Quality 3D Generation
abstract: 3D content inherently encompasses multi-modal characteristics and can be projected into different modalities (e.g., RGB images, RGBD, and point clouds). Each modality exhibits distinct advantages in 3D asset modeling: RGB images contain vivid 3D textures, whereas point clouds define fine-grained 3D geometries. However, most existing 3D-native generative architectures either operate predominantly within single-modality paradigms-thus overlooking the complementary benefits of multi-modality data-or restrict themselves to 3D structures, thereby limiting the scope of available training datasets. To holistically harness multi-modalities for 3D modeling, we present TriMM, the first feed-forward 3D-native generative model that learns from basic multi-modalities (e.g., RGB, RGBD, and point cloud). Specifically, 1) TriMM first introduces collaborative multi-modal coding, which integrates modality-specific features while preserving their unique representational strengths. 2) Furthermore, auxiliary 2D and 3D supervision are introduced to raise the robustness and performance of multi-modal coding. 3) Based on the embedded multi-modal code, TriMM employs a triplane latent diffusion model to generate 3D assets of superior quality, enhancing both the texture and the geometric detail. Extensive experiments on multiple well-known datasets demonstrate that TriMM, by effectively leveraging multi-modality, achieves competitive performance with models trained on large-scale datasets, despite utilizing a small amount of training data. Furthermore, we conduct additional experiments on recent RGB-D datasets, verifying the feasibility of incorporating other multi-modal datasets into 3D generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TriMM，首个前馈3D原生生成模型，通过协同多模态编码和三平面潜扩散模型，有效利用RGB、RGBD、点云生成高质量3D资产。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D生成模型主要基于单模态（如RGB或点云），忽略了多模态数据的互补优势，或局限于3D结构限制了训练数据规模。多模态数据（RGB提供纹理，点云提供几何）本应协同提升3D建模质量，但缺乏有效的融合架构。本文旨在解决如何综合利用RGB、RGBD和点云等基本模态，以少量数据实现高质量3D生成的问题。
light_analysis.method: TriMM首先引入协同多模态编码，分别处理RGB、RGBD和点云，通过特定编码器提取特征并整合，保留各模态独特表征能力。其次，引入辅助2D和3D监督信号（如渲染图像和深度图）增强编码鲁棒性。最后，基于多模态嵌入码，采用三平面潜扩散模型生成高分辨率3D资产，同时优化纹理和几何细节。模型以端到端方式训练，无需显式多模态对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公开数据集（如ShapeNet等）上，TriMM仅使用少量训练数据，即达到与在大规模数据集上训练的先进模型（如GET3D、EG3D）竞争的性能。在RGB-D数据集上的额外实验验证了其泛化能力，能够有效整合多模态数据进行3D生成，尤其在纹理丰富度和几何精度上表现优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: TriMM通过协同多模态编码和多模态监督，首次实现了前馈3D原生模型对RGB、RGBD、点云的联合学习，显著提升了生成质量。该工作证明了多模态数据在3D生成中的潜力，尤其在小样本场景下。未来可将框架扩展至更多模态（如深度视频）或更复杂的3D场景，推动虚拟现实和数字内容创作的应用。

title: Composed Object Retrieval: Object-level Retrieval via Composed Expressions
abstract: Retrieving fine-grained visual content based on user intent remains a challenge in multimodal systems. Although current Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) methods combine reference images with retrieval texts, they are constrained to image-level matching and cannot localize specific objects. To this end, we propose Composed Object Retrieval (COR), a new object-level retrieval task that retrieves target object(s) from candidate objects in a target image and grounds the retrieved result with pixel-level masks. Given a reference object, its mask, a target image, and a retrieval text describing the desired modification, COR requires models to perform composed visual-textual reasoning rather than relying on explicit category names. This setting introduces several challenges, including fine-grained compositional matching, negative-object filtering under visually similar distractors, and flexible single- or multi-object retrieval. We construct COR125K, the first large-scale COR benchmark, containing 125,541 retrieval triplets across 408 categories with base/novel splits for evaluating category-level generalization. We also present CORE, a unified end-to-end model that integrates reference region encoding, adaptive vision-text interaction, and region-level contrastive learning to align composed representations with target objects while suppressing background and distractors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CORE significantly outperforms existing CIR-based pipelines and strong baselines in both base and novel categories, establishing a simple and effective foundation for fine-grained object-level multimodal retrieval. Code will be released publicly at https://github.com/wangtong627/COR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出组合对象检索（COR）新任务，构建大规模基准COR125K，并设计端到端模型CORE，实现像素级对象级检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有组合图像检索（CIR）方法局限于图像级匹配，无法定位特定对象。实际应用中用户常需检索图像中的目标对象并进行修改，但缺乏对象级检索任务与数据。为此提出COR任务，要求模型基于参考对象、掩码、目标图像和检索文本进行组合视觉-文本推理，面临细粒度匹配、负对象过滤、灵活单/多对象检索等挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出CORE模型，集成参考区域编码、自适应视觉-文本交互和区域级对比学习。通过编码参考对象区域，与目标图像特征进行交互，并采用对比学习对齐组合表示与目标对象，同时抑制背景和干扰对象。构建COR125K基准，包含125,541个检索三元组，覆盖408个类别，设有基础/新类别划分以评估泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在COR125K基准上，CORE在基础和新类别上均显著优于现有CIR流水线和强基线。具体指标摘要未明确，但声称显著超越，表明CORE在细粒度对象级检索任务上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: COR任务与CORE模型为细粒度对象级多模态检索建立了简单有效的基础。未来可探索更复杂的组合推理和跨域泛化。代码已开源，促进该方向研究。

title: ShoppingBench: A Real-World Intent-Grounded Shopping Benchmark for LLM-based Agents
abstract: Existing benchmarks in e-commerce primarily focus on basic user intents, such as finding or purchasing products. However, real-world users often pursue more complex goals, such as applying vouchers, managing budgets, and finding multi-products seller. To bridge this gap, we propose ShoppingBench, a novel end-to-end shopping benchmark designed to encompass increasingly challenging levels of grounded intent. Specifically, we propose a scalable framework to simulate user instructions based on various intents derived from sampled real-world products. To facilitate consistent and reliable evaluations, we provide a large-scale shopping sandbox that serves as an interactive simulated environment, incorporating over 2.5 million real-world products. Experimental results demonstrate that even state-of-the-art language agents (such as GPT-4.1) achieve absolute success rates under 50% on our benchmark tasks, highlighting the significant challenges posed by our ShoppingBench. In addition, we propose a trajectory distillation strategy and leverage supervised fine-tuning, along with reinforcement learning on synthetic trajectories, to distill the capabilities of a large language agent into a smaller one. As a result, our trained agent achieves competitive performance compared to GPT-4.1.
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at AAAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出ShoppingBench，一个基于真实意图的购物基准，包含复杂任务；并设计轨迹蒸馏策略，将大模型能力迁移到小模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有电子商务基准仅关注基本用户意图（如查找或购买产品），而真实用户常追求复杂目标（如使用优惠券、管理预算、寻找多产品卖家）。这些复杂意图的评估方法缺失，限制了智能体在真实场景中的应用。ShoppingBench旨在填补这一空白，提供更具挑战性的评估环境，推动语言智能体在电子商务中的发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出可扩展框架，基于真实产品样本派生的意图模拟用户指令。构建包含250万真实产品的大规模购物沙盒作为交互式模拟环境。此外，提出轨迹蒸馏策略，结合监督微调和合成轨迹上的强化学习，将大型语言智能体的能力蒸馏到较小智能体中。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，即使最先进的语言智能体（如GPT-4.1）在ShoppingBench上的绝对成功率低于50%，表明任务极具挑战性。通过所提蒸馏策略训练的较小智能体实现了与GPT-4.1相竞争的性能，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ShoppingBench为评估智能体在复杂购物意图下的能力提供了标准化基准，填补了现有评估空白。轨迹蒸馏策略成功实现模型能力迁移，具有实际应用价值。未来可引入更多真实世界约束，进一步提升基准的挑战性。

title: HGCN(O): A Self-Tuning GCN HyperModel Toolkit for Outcome Prediction in Event-Sequence Data
abstract: We propose HGCN(O), a self-tuning toolkit using Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) models for event sequence prediction. Featuring four GCN architectures (O-GCN, T-GCN, TP-GCN, TE-GCN) across the GCNConv and GraphConv layers, our toolkit integrates multiple graph representations of event sequences with different choices of node- and graph-level attributes and in temporal dependencies via edge weights, optimising prediction accuracy and stability for balanced and unbalanced datasets. Extensive experiments show that GCNConv models excel on unbalanced data, while all models perform consistently on balanced data. Experiments also confirm the superior performance of HGCN(O) over traditional approaches. Applications include Predictive Business Process Monitoring (PBPM), which predicts future events or states of a business process based on event logs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HGCN(O)自调优GCN超模型工具箱，用于事件序列预测，集成多种图神经网络架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件序列预测在业务流程监控等领域至关重要，但传统方法难以处理序列中的时间依赖和类别不平衡问题。现有GCN模型缺乏针对事件序列的专门设计，且模型选择与调优复杂。本研究旨在提供一个自调优的GCN工具箱，通过多种图表示和时间编码，提升预测准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: HGCN(O)包含四种GCN架构（O-GCN, T-GCN, TP-GCN, TE-GCN），基于GCNConv和GraphConv层。通过将事件序列转换为图结构，整合节点/图级属性及边权时间依赖。支持平衡和不平衡数据集的自适应优化。未明确说明具体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GCNConv模型在不平衡数据上表现优异，所有模型在平衡数据上性能稳定。HGCN(O)整体优于传统方法。摘要未提供具体数值如准确率提升幅度。
light_analysis.conclusion: HGCN(O)为事件序列预测提供了灵活高效的GCN解决方案，尤其在PBPM领域有应用价值。未来可扩展至更多图架构或优化自调优机制。

title: An Angular-Temporal Interaction Network for Light Field Object Tracking in Low-Light Scenes
abstract: High-quality 4D light field representation with efficient angular feature modeling is crucial for scene perception, as it can provide discriminative spatial-angular cues to identify moving targets. However, recent developments still struggle to deliver reliable angular modeling in the temporal domain, particularly in complex low-light scenes. In this paper, we propose a novel light field epipolar-plane structure image (ESI) representation that explicitly defines the geometric structure within the light field. By capitalizing on the abrupt changes in the angles of light rays within the epipolar plane, this representation can enhance visual expression in low-light scenes and reduce redundancy in high-dimensional light fields. We further propose an angular-temporal interaction network (ATINet) for light field object tracking that learns angular-aware representations from the geometric structural cues and angular-temporal interaction cues of light fields. Furthermore, ATINet can also be optimized in a self-supervised manner to enhance the geometric feature interaction across the temporal domain. Finally, we introduce a large-scale light field low-light dataset for object tracking. Extensive experimentation demonstrates that ATINet achieves state-of-the-art performance in single object tracking. Furthermore, we extend the proposed method to multiple object tracking, which also shows the effectiveness of high-quality light field angular-temporal modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出角时交互网络(ATINet)和极平面结构图像(ESI)表示，实现低照度场景下光场目标跟踪的先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 高质量4D光场表示需要高效的角度特征建模以提供判别性空间-角度线索，但现有方法在时间域中尤其复杂低照度场景下难以实现可靠的角度建模。本文旨在通过新表示和网络增强低照度视觉表达并减少高维光场冗余。
light_analysis.method: 提出光场极平面结构图像(ESI)表示，显式定义几何结构并利用光线角度突变增强低照度表达。进一步设计ATINet，从几何结构线索和角时交互线索学习角度感知表示，并通过自监督优化增强时间域几何特征交互。同时构建大规模低照度光场数据集。
light_analysis.result: ATINet在单目标跟踪上达到最先进性能，并在多目标跟踪拓展任务中验证了高质量光场角时建模的有效性。实验表明该方法在低照度场景中显著优于现有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过ESI表示和ATINet网络有效解决了低照度下光场目标跟踪的时空角度建模问题，在单目标与多目标跟踪中均取得优异效果，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的场景泛化。

title: We Need to Rethink Benchmarking in Anomaly Detection
abstract: Despite the continuous proposal of new anomaly detection algorithms and extensive benchmarking efforts, progress seems to stagnate, with only minor performance differences between established baselines and new algorithms. In this position paper, we argue that this stagnation is due to limitations in how we evaluate anomaly detection algorithms. In current benchmarks, a trivial algorithm that only checks for extreme values in individual features performs competitively with state-of-the-art deep learning methods, despite failing on simple cases such as anomalies within an annulus of normal points. Moreover, existing benchmarks do not adequately reflect the diversity of anomaly detection applications, making it difficult for practitioners to reliably select algorithms for their applications. Consequently, we need to rethink benchmarking in anomaly detection. In our opinion, anomaly detection should be studied using scenarios that group applications sharing relevant characteristics, defined through a common taxonomy. Benchmarking within scenarios enables scenario-specific choices for preprocessing, metrics, and model selection, clarifying which advances transfer across similar applications and providing practitioners with reliable guidance for their specific contexts.

light_analysis.overview: 呼吁重新思考异常检测领域的基准测试方法，提出基于场景（scenario）的分类评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前异常检测算法进展停滞，现有基准测试中简单算法（如检查极端值）与深度学习方法性能相当，但无法处理环形异常等简单情况。同时，基准测试未能反映应用多样性，导致从业者难以针对具体任务可靠选择算法。改进基准测试是推动领域进步的关键。
light_analysis.method: 提出将异常检测研究按场景（scenarios）分组，场景由共同分类法定义，共享相关应用特征。在每个场景内进行特定预处理、评估指标和模型选择，从而提供更可靠的算法比较和可迁移性指导。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但通过论证指出现有基准测试的缺陷（如简单算法性能误导），并强调基于场景的评估能更真实反映算法能力，辅助实际应用决策。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于揭示异常检测基准测试的局限性，并提出场景导向的评估范式，以提升算法比较的公平性和实用性。该框架有助于研究者聚焦相似应用场景，为从业者提供针对性指导。未来需建立完备的场景分类和标准基准协议。

title: MEAL: A Benchmark for Continual Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Benchmarks play a central role in reinforcement learning (RL) research, yet their computational constraints often shape what is studied. Despite the motivation of lifelong learning, most continual RL papers consider only 3-10 sequential tasks, as CPU-bound environments make longer sequences impractical. Meanwhile, continual learning in cooperative multi-agent settings remains largely unexplored. To address these gaps, we introduce MEAL (Multi-agent Environments for Adaptive Learning), the first benchmark for continual multi-agent RL. By leveraging JAX and GPU acceleration, MEAL enables training on sequences of 100 tasks in a few hours on a single GPU. We find that long task sequences reveal failure modes that do not appear at smaller scales.
comment: To be published in the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出MEAL，首个持续多智能体强化学习基准，利用JAX和GPU加速实现长序列（100任务）高效训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RL基准受计算资源限制，大多仅支持3-10个任务，难以模拟终身学习场景；同时，多智能体持续学习领域研究空白。MEAL旨在解决计算瓶颈，提供可扩展的长任务序列基准以揭示小规模实验未见的失败模式。
light_analysis.method: MEAL基于JAX和GPU加速，在单GPU上数小时内完成100个连续任务的训练序列。采用并行化环境模拟和高效梯度计算，大幅提升训练速度。该基准涵盖多种协作多智能体场景，支持自适应学习策略评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，长任务序列（100个）能够揭示在短序列（3-10个）中不出现的失败模式，如灾难性遗忘和策略退化。MEAL的高效性使得大规模持续学习实验成为可能，为多智能体RL研究提供新的测试平台。
light_analysis.conclusion: MEAL作为首个持续多智能体RL基准，填补了该领域评估工具的空白。其GPU加速特性降低了计算门槛，有助于推动终身学习在多智能体系统中的研究。未来可扩展至更复杂场景及算法对比。

title: Bridging Distribution Shift and AI Safety: Conceptual and Methodological Synergies
abstract: This paper bridges distribution shift and AI safety through a comprehensive analysis of their conceptual and methodological synergies. While prior discussions often focus on narrow cases or informal analogies, we establish two types connections between specific causes of distribution shift and fine-grained AI safety issues: (1) methods addressing a specific shift type can help achieve corresponding safety goals, or (2) certain shifts and safety issues can be formally reduced to each other, enabling mutual adaptation of their methods. Our findings provide a unified perspective that encourages deeper integration between distribution shift and AI safety research.

light_analysis.overview: 论文系统分析分布偏移与AI安全的概念与方法论协同，建立两类联系以促进领域融合。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布偏移和AI安全虽常被讨论，但现有研究多聚焦于狭窄案例或非正式类比，缺乏系统性的概念与方法论联系。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过深入分析二者内在协同，推动跨领域整合，从而更有效地解决实际安全问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用综合分析框架，识别分布偏移的具体原因与AI安全细粒度问题之间的两类连接：(1)针对特定偏移类型的方法可直接服务于相应安全目标；(2)某些偏移与安全问题可形式化归约，使方法相互适配。该方法强调概念映射与方法迁移，而非提出新算法。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验结果或性能指标，但通过理论分析建立了两类联系，提供了统一视角，有望促进分布偏移与AI安全研究的深度融合，为未来实证研究奠定基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于系统阐明分布偏移与AI安全的协同关系，提供了统一的理论视角，鼓励两个领域更深层次的整合。这不仅有助于理解安全问题的根源，也为开发更鲁棒的AI系统指明方向。未来可进一步在具体问题中验证这些联系的有效性。

title: CoMo: Learning Continuous Latent Motion from Internet Videos for Scalable Robot Learning
abstract: Unsupervised learning of latent motion from Internet videos is crucial for robot learning. Existing discrete methods generally mitigate the shortcut learning caused by extracting excessive static backgrounds through vector quantization with a small codebook size. However, they suffer from information loss and struggle to capture more complex and fine-grained dynamics. Moreover, there is an inherent gap between the distribution of discrete latent motion and continuous robot action, which hinders the joint learning of a unified policy. We propose CoMo, which aims to learn more precise continuous latent motion from internet-scale videos. CoMo employs an early temporal difference (Td) mechanism to increase the shortcut learning difficulty and explicitly enhance motion cues. Additionally, to ensure latent motion better captures meaningful foregrounds, we further propose a temporal contrastive learning (Tcl) scheme. Specifically, positive pairs are constructed with a small future frame temporal offset, while negative pairs are formed by directly reversing the temporal direction. The proposed Td and Tcl work synergistically and effectively ensure that the latent motion focuses better on the foreground and reinforces motion cues. Critically, CoMo exhibits strong zeroshot generalization, enabling it to generate effective pseudo action labels for unseen videos. Extensive simulated and real-world experiments show that policies co-trained with CoMo pseudo action labels achieve superior performance with both diffusion and auto-regressive architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoMo，从互联网视频中学习连续潜运动，通过早期时间差异和时间对比学习增强运动线索，实现零样本泛化用于机器人策略学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有从互联网视频学习潜运动的方法多采用离散编码，通过小码本向量量化缓解静态背景导致的捷径学习问题，但离散化导致信息损失，难以捕捉复杂精细的动态，且离散潜运动与连续机器人动作之间存在分布差异，阻碍统一策略的联合学习。因此需要一种能学习连续、精确潜运动的方法，以提升机器人学习的可扩展性和性能。
light_analysis.method: CoMo提出连续潜运动学习框架，核心创新包括：1）早期时间差异（Td）机制，通过增大捷径学习难度强制模型关注运动线索；2）时间对比学习（Tcl）方案，以未来小时间偏移帧为正对，反转时间方向帧为负对，强化前景感知。Td和Tcl协同工作，使潜运动聚焦前景并增强运动线索。模型在互联网规模视频上无监督训练，无需标注即可生成伪动作标签。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实实验中，使用CoMo生成的伪动作标签联合训练的策略（基于扩散模型和自回归架构）均取得优越性能。CoMo表现出强零样本泛化能力，能为未见视频有效生成伪动作标签。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但强调性能优于现有离散方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoMo通过连续潜运动学习解决了离散方法的信息损失与分布差距问题，提升了机器人策略学习的可扩展性。其零样本泛化能力允许多样化视频应用，具有重要实用价值。未来可探索更复杂运动表示或与其他自监督任务结合。

title: Med-R2: Perception and Reflection-driven Complex Reasoning for Medical Report Generation
abstract: Automated medical report generation (MRG) is increasingly used to reduce the burden of manual reporting and for decision support. Large vision-language models (LVLMs) hold great promise for automated MRG due to their fine-grained image-text alignment and advanced text-generation capabilities. Currently, state-of-the-art MRGs primarily focus on adapting pre-trained LVLMs with direct supervised fine-tuning (SFT), a fine-tuning strategy with medical image-report pairs. However, several factors limit the performance of these LVLMs. Firstly, direct SFT enables LVLMs to generate medical reports directly without an intermediate thinking process of pathological feature perception and diagnostic reasoning. This causes a potential failure to perceive pathological features and thus leads to misdiagnosis. Secondly, direct SFT lacks the incorporation of radiology-specific knowledge guidance, causing LVLMs to misinterpret perceived pathological features and make incorrect diagnoses. To address these gaps, we propose a novel fine-tuning strategy named Med-R2. We introduce a perception-driven long reasoning process that precedes report generation and incorporates radiology-specific knowledge as guidance. Additionally, to alleviate potential perceptual errors in complex reasoning, a reflection mechanism is introduced to refine the perception of pathological features and the generated report. Our experiments demonstrate that Med-R2 effectively enhances the capability of pathological features perception and diagnosis accuracy for MRG via fine-tuned LVLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Med-R2微调策略，通过感知驱动推理和反射机制增强LVLMs在医疗报告生成中的病理特征感知与诊断准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于LVLMs的医疗报告生成采用直接监督微调，缺乏中间推理过程和放射学知识指导，导致病理特征感知失败和误诊。这些问题限制了LVLMs的性能，亟需一种能融入推理知识和纠正感知错误的微调策略。
light_analysis.method: Med-R2引入感知驱动长推理过程，在报告生成前自动进行病理特征感知和诊断推理，并融入放射学特定知识作为指导。同时，设计反射机制，通过迭代细化感知特征和生成报告，纠正复杂推理中的潜在错误，提升微调效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Med-R2显著增强了微调LVLMs的病理特征感知能力和诊断准确性，相比直接监督微调有明确提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但验证了策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Med-R2通过感知-推理-反射的循环，有效解决了直接微调缺乏推理和知识引导的问题，提升了医疗报告生成的可靠性和诊断精度。该策略具有学术价值，可推广至其他需要精细感知和复杂推理的医学图像理解任务。

title: Global Ease of Living Index: a machine learning framework for longitudinal analysis of major economies
abstract: The drastic changes in the global economy, geopolitical conditions, and disruptions such as the COVID-19 pandemic have impacted the cost of living and quality of life. It is essential to comprehend the long-term implications of the cost of living and quality of life in major economies. A transparent and comprehensive living index must include multiple dimensions of living conditions. In this study, we present an approach to quantifying the quality of life through the Global Ease of Living Index that combines various socio-economic and infrastructural factors into a single composite score. Our index utilises economic indicators that define living standards, which could help in targeted interventions to improve specific areas. We present a machine learning framework to address missing data for certain economic indicators in specific countries. We then curate and update the data and use a dimensionality reduction approach (Principal Component Analysis and Factor Analysis) to create the Ease of Living Index for major economies since 1970. Our work significantly adds to the literature by offering a practical tool for policymakers to identify areas needing improvement, such as healthcare systems, employment opportunities, and public safety. Our approach with open data and code can be easily reproduced and applied to various contexts, providing transparency and accessibility for ongoing research and policy development in quality-of-life assessment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全球宜居指数(Global Ease of Living Index)，利用机器学习框架处理缺失数据并降维，实现主要经济体长期生活质量量化评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 全球经济、地缘政治变化及新冠疫情等冲击严重影响生活成本与质量，亟需理解主要经济体的长期影响。现有指数缺乏透明性和全面性，且存在经济指标数据缺失问题。本文旨在构建一个综合多维度（社会经济、基础设施）的量化工具，帮助政策制定者识别医疗、就业、公共安全等领域的短板，从而进行针对性干预。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出Global Ease of Living Index，整合社会经济和基础设施指标为单一综合得分。采用机器学习框架处理特定国家经济指标的缺失数据，然后使用主成分分析和因子分析等降维技术，从1970年起为各主要经济体构建指数。所有数据和代码开源，便于复现和应用。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果或性能指标。论文宣称其指数综合考虑多个维度的生活条件，并通过机器学习解决数据缺失问题，为政策制定者提供实用工具。由于采用开源数据和代码，方法具有透明性和可复现性，可应用于不同背景。但缺乏与现有指数的定量对比或验证结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究贡献在于提出一个透明、全面且可复现的全球宜居指数框架，整合多维度指标并运用机器学习解决数据缺失问题，为政策干预提供依据。该工具有助于长期跟踪生活质量变化，识别改进领域。未来需进一步验证指数有效性，并可能扩展至更多国家或细化维度。局限性包括对指标选择和质量依赖于公开数据的可用性。

title: Adversarial Dependence Minimization
abstract: Minimally redundant representations are typically learned by minimizing feature covariance. However, covariance-based methods fail to eliminate all dependencies/redundancies, as linearly uncorrelated variables can still exhibit nonlinear relationships. To address this, we introduce ADM, a differentiable algorithm that minimizes statistical dependence between feature dimensions through an adversarial game: auxiliary networks identify dependencies, while the encoder removes them. We prove that mutual independence is achieved at the global optimum, empirically verify convergence, and study three potential applications: extending PCA to nonlinear decorrelation, improving generalization in image classification, and preventing dimensional collapse in self-supervised learning. By promoting statistically independent representations, ADM paves the way for learning more robust, compressed, and generalizable representations across diverse applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对抗依赖最小化（ADM），通过对抗博弈实现特征维度间的统计独立，优于协方差方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有最小冗余表示方法通常通过最小化特征协方差来学习，但协方差仅能去除线性相关性，无法消除非线性依赖。例如线性无关的随机变量仍可能通过高阶统计量相互依赖。这种局限性导致学习到的表示包含冗余信息，影响模型鲁棒性和泛化能力。因此，需要一种能够同时去除线性和非线性依赖的方法，以学习真正统计独立的特征表示。
light_analysis.method: 提出可微的ADM算法，采用对抗博弈框架：辅助网络（判别器）试图识别特征维度间的统计依赖关系，而编码器（生成器）则学习移除这些依赖。通过极小极大优化，全局最优解下特征维度达到相互独立。ADM可灵活集成到现有深度网络，无需对架构做大幅修改。在实验中对三种应用进行了验证：扩展PCA到非线性去相关、提高图像分类泛化能力、防止自监督学习中的维度坍塌。
