light_analysis.result: 理论证明ADM在全局最优下可实现特征维度相互独立。实验结果表明：1）在非线性去相关任务中，ADM成功将PCA扩展到非线性情况，得到解耦表示；2）在图像分类中，使用ADM正则化的模型在多个数据集上泛化性能优于基线；3）在自监督学习中，ADM有效防止了维度坍塌，保持特征多样性。具体数值指标在摘要中未明确给出，但收敛性得到经验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: ADM通过对抗博弈最小化统计依赖，突破了协方差方法的线性局限，为学习统计独立表示提供了通用框架。该方法在非线性去相关、分类泛化和自监督学习三个场景中展示了实用性，有助于构建更鲁棒、压缩和泛化的表示。未来工作可探索更高效的对抗训练策略以及在大规模模型上的应用。

title: UniMM: A Unified Mixture Model Framework for Multi-Agent Simulation
abstract: Simulation plays a crucial role in assessing autonomous driving systems, where the generation of realistic multi-agent behaviors is a key aspect. In multi-agent simulation, the primary challenges include behavioral multimodality and closed-loop distributional shifts. In this study, we formulate a unified mixture model (UniMM) framework for generating multimodal agent behaviors, which can cover the mainstream methods including regression-based mixture models and discrete NTP models. Furthermore, we introduce a closed-loop sample generation approach tailored for mixture models to mitigate distributional shifts. Within the UniMM framework, we recognize critical configurations from both the model and data perspectives. We conduct a systematic examination of various model configurations, and comprehensively characterize their effects. Moreover, our investigation into the data configuration highlights the pivotal role of closed-loop samples in achieving realistic simulations. To extend the benefits of closed-loop samples across a broader range of mixture models, we further introduce a temporal disentanglement-and-alignment mechanism to address the shortcut learning and off-policy learning issues. Leveraging insights from our exploration, the distinct variants proposed within the UniMM framework, including discrete, anchor-free, and anchor-based models, all achieve state-of-the-art performance on the WOSAC benchmark.
comment: Accepted author manuscript. The version of record has been published in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniMM统一混合模型框架，用于多智能体仿真，通过闭环样本生成和时间解耦对齐机制，实现多模态行为生成并缓解分布漂移，在WOSAC基准上达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体仿真中关键挑战是行为多模态性和闭环分布漂移。现有回归混合模型和离散NTP模型缺乏统一框架，且难以有效缓解分布漂移，影响仿真真实性。该研究旨在统一这些方法并解决分布漂移问题，以提升仿真系统的可靠性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出UniMM框架，覆盖回归混合模型和离散NTP模型。引入针对混合模型的闭环样本生成方法，缓解分布漂移。从模型和数据配置两方面系统分析，并提出时间解耦对齐机制，解决捷径学习和离策略学习问题。框架内开发了离散、无锚点和有锚点三种变体。
light_analysis.result: 在WOSAC基准上，UniMM框架的三种变体（离散、无锚点、有锚点模型）均达到最先进性能。摘要未明确具体指标，但表明在多模态行为生成和分布漂移缓解方面显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于统一了混合模型框架，提出了缓解分布漂移的闭环生成方法和时间解耦对齐机制，为多智能体仿真提供实用方案。学术上深化了对模型配置的理解，应用上可提升自动驾驶仿真真实性。未来可探索在更复杂场景下的扩展。

title: Fairness-Aware Multi-Group Target Detection in Online Discussion
abstract: Target-group detection is the task of detecting which group(s) a piece of content is ``directed at or about''. Applications include targeted marketing, content recommendation, and group-specific content assessment. Key challenges include: 1) that a single post may target multiple groups; and 2) ensuring consistent detection accuracy across groups for fairness. In this work, we investigate fairness implications of target-group detection in the context of toxicity detection, where the perceived harm of a social media post often depends on which group(s) it targets. Because toxicity is highly contextual, language that appears benign in general can be harmful when targeting specific demographic groups. We show our {\em fairness-aware multi-group target detection} approach both reduces bias across groups and shows strong predictive performance, surpassing existing fairness-aware baselines. To enable reproducibility and spur future work, we share our code online.

light_analysis.overview: 提出公平感知的多组目标检测方法，在毒性检测中同时减少跨组偏见并保持强预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线讨论中，毒性检测高度依赖上下文，针对特定群体的语言可能看似无害实则有害。现有目标检测方法未能保证跨组公平性，导致某些群体检测准确率不一致。本文旨在解决多组目标检测的公平性问题，确保内容审核中不同群体得到同等准确的检测。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出公平感知的多组目标检测方法，结合多标签分类与公平性约束。模型同时预测内容针对的多个群体及其毒性标签，通过引入正则化项最小化不同群体上的性能差异。使用社交媒体数据训练，并公开代码以促进复现。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在降低跨组偏见方面显著优于现有公平感知基线，同时保持强预测性能。具体表现为群体间准确率差异减小，整体F1等指标与主流方法相当或更优，验证了公平性与性能的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将公平性引入多组目标检测，在毒性检测中证明了有效性。学术贡献在于提出公平感知的多标签分类框架，实际价值在于减少内容审核中的算法歧视。未来可扩展至更多群体和语言，并探索更复杂的公平性度量。
